SkillGemIceNova.name: Ice Nova
SkillGemIceNova.description: Conjure a wave of ice in all directions, Knocking Back enemies based on how close they are to you. Casting Ice Nova targeting near a Frostbolt Projectile will cause it to originate from the Frostbolt instead of you. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to leave a patch of Chilled Ground.

SkillGemLeapSlam.name: Leap Slam
SkillGemLeapSlam.description:
Jump into the air, damaging and Knocking Back enemies with your mace where you land. Enemies you would land on are
pushed out of the way.

SkillGemMoltenCrash.name: Molten Crash
SkillGemMoltenCrash.description: Shapeshift into a burning monstrosity and leap through the air to crash down upon the earth, Slamming twice and creating Molten Fissures. Consumes Rage to create additional Molten Fissures.

SkillGemShieldCharge.name: Shield Charge
SkillGemShieldCharge.description: Channel to charge in the target direction. You will crash into enemies on your path, stopping your charge and dealing damage to enemies in an area, and extra damage to the enemies you collided with. While charging, your Shield is raised and you will Block all incoming Blockable hits.

SkillGemDetonateDead.name: Detonate Dead
SkillGemDetonateDead.description: Cause a Corpse to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

SkillGemVolatileDead.name: Volatile Dead
SkillGemVolatileDead.description: Consume a Corpse to create a volatile core that seeks out enemies and Ignites enemies near it. The core explodes at the end of its duration.

SupportGemFireInfusion.name: Fire Attunement
SupportGemFireInfusion.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Fire Damage but deal less Cold and Lightning Damage.

SupportGemMartialTempo.name: Rapid Attacks I
SupportGemMartialTempo.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster.

SupportGemMartialTempoTwo.name: Rapid Attacks II
SupportGemMartialTempoTwo.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster.

SupportGemMartialTempoThree.name: Rapid Attacks III
SupportGemMartialTempoThree.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Attack faster at the cost of Damage.

SupportGemScattershot.name: Multishot I
SupportGemScattershot.description: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.

SupportGemScattershotTwo.name: Multishot II
SupportGemScattershotTwo.description: Supports Projectile skills, making them fire extra Projectiles. Also lowers Attack and Cast speed of supported skills, as well as lessening their damage.

SupportGemNovaProjectiles.name: Nova Projectiles I
SupportGemNovaProjectiles.description: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire Projectiles in a circle. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above.

SupportGemAcceleration.name: Projectile Acceleration I
SupportGemAcceleration.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster.

SupportGemAccelerationTwo.name: Projectile Acceleration II
SupportGemAccelerationTwo.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and granting them a chance to Pierce Enemies.

SupportGemAccelerationThree.name: Projectile Acceleration III
SupportGemAccelerationThree.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel faster, and causing increases and reductions to Projectile speed to also apply to Damage.

SupportGemColdInfusion.name: Cold Attunement
SupportGemColdInfusion.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Cold Damage but deal less Fire and Lightning Damage.

SupportGemBullseye.name: Heightened Accuracy I
SupportGemBullseye.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy.

SupportGemBullseyeTwo.name: Heightened Accuracy II
SupportGemBullseyeTwo.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy, and never miss against Enemies on full Life.

SupportGemMagnifiedEffect.name: Magnified Area I
SupportGemMagnifiedEffect.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.

SupportGemMagnifiedEffectTwo.name: Magnified Area II
SupportGemMagnifiedEffectTwo.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect, making it larger.

SupportGemLightningInfusion.name: Lightning Attunement
SupportGemLightningInfusion.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Lightning Damage but deal less Cold and Fire Damage.

SkillGemRaiseZombie.name: Raise Zombie
SkillGemRaiseZombie.description: Consume a Corpse or Power Charge to create a short-lived Zombie. Zombies created from Power Charges are Empowered and also create two additional non-empowered Zombies.

SupportGemInspiration.name: Efficiency I
SupportGemInspiration.description: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

SupportGemInspirationTwo.name: Efficiency II
SupportGemInspirationTwo.description: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

SupportGemSupercritical.name: Supercritical
SupportGemSupercritical.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage with Critical Hits but have less Critical Hit chance.

SupportGemBludgeon.name: Knockback
SupportGemBludgeon.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Knock Back enemies.

SupportGemLifeThief.name: Life Leech I
SupportGemLifeThief.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life.

SupportGemLifeThiefTwo.name: Life Leech II
SupportGemLifeThiefTwo.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life.

SupportGemLifeThiefThree.name: Life Leech III
SupportGemLifeThiefThree.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Life and preventing Leech gained this way from being removed at full Life.

SupportGemSoulThief.name: Mana Leech
SupportGemSoulThief.description: Supports Attacks, causing their Physical damage to Leech Mana.

SupportGemOisinsOath.name: Oisín's Oath
SupportGemOisinsOath.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies, causing their Mana Leech to recover based on Elemental damage instead of Physical damage.

SupportGemChaosInfusion.name: Chaos Attunement
SupportGemChaosInfusion.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing them to Gain Chaos Damage but deal less Damage of other Types.

SkillGemFlickerStrike.name: Flicker Strike
SkillGemFlickerStrike.description: Teleport to a enemy and Strike them. Consumes Power Charges to perform additional teleporting Strikes on nearby enemies.

SkillGemSpark.name: Spark
SkillGemSpark.description: Launch a spray of sparking Projectiles that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.

SupportGemPierce.name: Pierce I
SupportGemPierce.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an enemy but deal less damage after doing so.

SupportGemPierceTwo.name: Pierce II
SupportGemPierceTwo.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an enemy.

SupportGemPierceThree.name: Pierce III
SupportGemPierceThree.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Pierce an unlimited number of enemies, losing damage as they do so.

SkillGemSummonSpectre.name: Spectre: {0}
SkillGemSummonSpectre.description: Summon the spirit of the bound monster as a Reviving Minion.

SkillGemFrostWall.name: Frost Wall
SkillGemFrostWall.description: Create a wall of Ice Crystals which holds back enemies. The Crystals explode if sufficiently damaged, or if pushed hard enough, damaging nearby enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to add another Lightning explosion if destroyed.

SkillGemEnervatingNova.name: Enervating Nova
SkillGemEnervatingNova.description: Unleash a Nova of Lightning damage to Electrocute enemies. Enemies close to you take no damage while enemies at the edge of the ring take significantly more damage. Enemies Hit can be Electrocuted by all Lightning damage for a short duration.

SupportGemHeavySwing.name: Heavy Swing
SupportGemHeavySwing.description: Supports Melee Attacks, boosting their Physical damage at the cost of Attack Speed.

SupportGemArcaneTempo.name: Rapid Casting I
SupportGemArcaneTempo.description: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.

SupportGemArcaneTempoTwo.name: Rapid Casting II
SupportGemArcaneTempoTwo.description: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster.

SupportGemArcaneTempoThree.name: Rapid Casting III
SupportGemArcaneTempoThree.description: Supports Spells, causing them to cast faster for each different Spell you've cast in the last eight seconds.

SkillGemTemporalChains.name: Temporal Chains
SkillGemTemporalChains.description: Curse all enemies in an area, Slowing them and making other effects on them expire more slowly.

SkillGemEnfeeble.name: Enfeeble
SkillGemEnfeeble.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, making them deal less damage.

SkillGemSnipersMark.name: Sniper's Mark
SkillGemSnipersMark.description: Mark a target. The next Critical Hit the target receives Activates the Mark, Consuming it to deal extra damage and grant you a Frenzy Charge.

SkillGemDespair.name: Despair
SkillGemDespair.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Chaos Resistance.

SkillGemLightningWarp.name: Lightning Warp
SkillGemLightningWarp.description: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the Cull threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a Debuff to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the Cull threshold during its duration. Can also be used on Ball Lightning Projectiles. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals Lightning damage to surrounding enemies. If targeting an enemy, the explosion also creates Shocked Ground. Creates a Lightning Infusion on successful use. Highlights enemies that can be Culled.

SkillGemVileDisruption.name: His Vile Intrusion
SkillGemVileDisruption.description: Target an enemy to either teleport inside the target's body if they are under the Cull threshold, causing it to violently explode, or to apply a Debuff to them, which will cause the same effect if that enemy falls under the Cull threshold during its duration. On teleport, the target is destroyed, and the explosion deals Physical damage to surrounding enemies and inflicts Impale.

SkillGemArmourBreaker.name: Armour Breaker
SkillGemArmourBreaker.description: Strike with a forceful blow, knocking enemies back and weakening their Armour.

SkillGemRainOfArrows.name: Rain of Arrows
SkillGemRainOfArrows.description: Fire a hail of arrows into the air, causing them to rain from above. Consumes a Frenzy Charge to fire more arrows.

SupportGemConcentratedEffect.name: Concentrated Area
SupportGemConcentratedEffect.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect, causing that area to be smaller but any area damage it deals to be higher.

SupportGemBloodlust.name: Bloodlust
SupportGemBloodlust.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to deal more damage against Bleeding enemies, but preventing them from inflicting Bleeding.

SkillGemFirestorm.name: Firestorm
SkillGemFirestorm.description: Rain a storm of flaming bolts over the targeted area. Can Consume all three types of Elemental Infusion, creating a much larger storm when Fire-Infused, causing lightning bolts when Lightning-Infused, and raining ice bolts when Cold-Infused.

SkillGemFallingThunder.name: Falling Thunder
SkillGemFallingThunder.description: Suffuse your Quarterstaff with electrical energy, then Slam the ground to deal damage in a large cone in front of you. Consumes your Power Charges to fire Lightning Projectiles forwards from the impact.

SkillGemPowerSiphon.name: Power Siphon
SkillGemPowerSiphon.description: Attempt to rip the lifeforce from an enemy. Enemies within Culling range will be highlighted and instantly killed on Hit, granting a Power Charge. Can only target Enemies in Culling range.

SkillGemLightningArrow.name: Lightning Arrow
SkillGemLightningArrow.description: Fire a charged arrow at the target. On hitting an enemy or wall, the arrow will fire Chaining Lightning beams at nearby enemies.

SkillGemDiscipline.name: Discipline
SkillGemDiscipline.description: Emit an Aura that grants you and Allies in your Presence additional Total Energy Shield.

SkillGemShockwaveTotem.name: Shockwave Totem
SkillGemShockwaveTotem.description: Raise a Totem that Slams the ground around it, repeatedly damaging nearby enemies. Jagged Ground erupts when hit by this Slam, damaging enemies standing on it. The Totem cannot create Jagged Ground. This Skill can be used while Shapeshifted.

SupportGemBlind.name: Blind I
SupportGemBlind.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit.

SupportGemBlindTwo.name: Blind II
SupportGemBlindTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit with increased effect.

SkillGemValakosCharge.name: Valako's Charge
SkillGemValakosCharge.description: While active, taking Lightning damage builds up charge on you. Reaching full charge expends all charge to Trigger this skill, creating a Chaining lightning bolt that arcs to nearby enemies.

SkillGemArc.name: Arc
SkillGemArc.description: An arc of Lightning stretches from the caster to a targeted enemy and Chains on to other nearby enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to deal more damage and Chain further.

SkillGemArcticArmour.name: Arctic Armour
SkillGemArcticArmour.description: While active, conjures an icy barrier that gains stages over time. While the barrier has stages, Melee Attacks that hit you will remove a stage to cause a burst of ice that deals Cold Spell damage to the attacker.

SupportGemFirePenetration.name: Fire Penetration I
SupportGemFirePenetration.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Fire resistance.

SupportGemFirePenetrationTwo.name: Fire Penetration II
SupportGemFirePenetrationTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits ignore enemy Fire resistance.

SupportGemColdPenetration.name: Cold Penetration
SupportGemColdPenetration.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Cold resistance.

SupportGemLightningPenetration.name: Lightning Penetration
SupportGemLightningPenetration.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Lightning resistance.

SupportGemChain.name: Chain I
SupportGemChain.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

SupportGemChainTwo.name: Chain II
SupportGemChainTwo.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

SupportGemChainThree.name: Chain III
SupportGemChainThree.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

SupportGemFork.name: Fork
SupportGemFork.description: Supports Projectile skills, making their Projectiles Fork.

SkillGemFlammability.name: Flammability
SkillGemFlammability.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Fire Resistance.

SkillGemHypothermia.name: Hypothermia
SkillGemHypothermia.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Cold Resistance.

SkillGemConductivity.name: Conductivity
SkillGemConductivity.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Lightning Resistance.

SkillGemElementalWeakness.name: Elemental Weakness
SkillGemElementalWeakness.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay, lowering their Elemental Resistances.

SkillGemIncinerate.name: Incinerate
SkillGemIncinerate.description: Gain fuel by spending Mana on any Skill, then use the accumulated fuel to conjure a torrent of Fire from your hand, Igniting enemies in front of you. The flames grow stronger the longer you Channel. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to also create Ignited Ground. Cannot gain fuel while using this skill.

SupportGemSpellEcho.name: Spell Echo
SupportGemSpellEcho.description: Supports Cascadable Spells you use yourself. Supported Spells Echo.

SupportGemElementalArmy.name: Elemental Army
SupportGemElementalArmy.description: Supports skills which create Minions, bolstering the Elemental Resistances of those Minions. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

SupportGemDeceleration.name: Projectile Deceleration I
SupportGemDeceleration.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel more slowly.

SupportGemDecelerationTwo.name: Projectile Deceleration II
SupportGemDecelerationTwo.description: Supports Projectile skills, making those Projectiles travel more slowly.

SupportGemVilentasPropulsion.name: Vilenta's Propulsion
SupportGemVilentasPropulsion.description: Supports Spell Skills that fire Projectiles, causing increases and reductions to cast speed to also apply to Projectile speed.

SkillGemPurityOfFire.name: Purity of Fire
SkillGemPurityOfFire.description: Emit an Aura that boosts the Fire Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

SkillGemPurityOfIce.name: Purity of Ice
SkillGemPurityOfIce.description: Emit an Aura that boosts the Cold Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

SkillGemPurityOfLightning.name: Purity of Lightning
SkillGemPurityOfLightning.description: Emit an Aura that boosts the Lightning Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

SkillGemImpurity.name: Impurity
SkillGemImpurity.description: Emit an Aura that boosts the Chaos Resistance of you and Allies in your Presence.

SkillGemFlameblast.name: Flameblast
SkillGemFlameblast.description: Channel to build destructive energy around you. Releasing the energy causes a devastating explosion that is larger and more intense the longer you Channelled for.

SkillGemBarrage.name: Barrage
SkillGemBarrage.description: Ready a volley of arrows or spears, Empowering your next Repeatable Bow or Projectile Spear Attack to Repeat multiple times. Consumes your Frenzy Charges on use to add additional repeats.

SkillGemBallLightning.name: Ball Lightning
SkillGemBallLightning.description: Fire a slow-moving Projectile that moves through enemies. The Projectile itself does not Hit enemies, but repeatedly discharges bolts of Lightning at nearby enemies. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to slow down over time, create Ignited Ground as it travels, and explode dealing Fire damage in an Area after it dissipates.

SkillGemBoneOffering.name: Bone Offering
SkillGemBoneOffering.description: Impale a Skeleton on a bone spike to shield your Minions while the spike remains, reducing the amount of damage taken from Hits. Taking a Hit that deals damage above a certain threshold will cause that Minion's shield to absorb all damage from that Hit, then explode.  The bone spike is itself a Minion, and shields itself. If it dies, shields on your other Minions disappear.

SkillGemHeraldOfAsh.name: Herald of Ash
SkillGemHeraldOfAsh.description: While active, enemies you sufficiently Overkill with non-Herald Attacks will cause an explosion that Ignites nearby enemies based on the Overkill damage dealt.

SkillGemHeraldOfIce.name: Herald of Ice
SkillGemHeraldOfIce.description: While active, Shattering an enemy with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause an icy explosion that deals Attack damage to surrounding enemies.

SkillGemHeraldOfThunder.name: Herald of Thunder
SkillGemHeraldOfThunder.description: While active, killing Shocked enemies with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause subsequent Attack Hits to release lightning bolts which deals Attack damage to all surrounding enemies.

SkillGemBlasphemy.name: Blasphemy
SkillGemBlasphemy.description: Turn socketed Curse skills into vile Auras, applying their effects to all nearby enemies.

SkillGemInfernalCry.name: Infernal Cry
SkillGemInfernalCry.description: Perform a Warcry, Empowering subsequent Melee Attacks if there are enemies nearby. Enemies in the warcry's area are destabilised and will Combust on death. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

SupportGemIceBite.name: Ice Bite I
SupportGemIceBite.description: Supports damaging skills and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with supported skills infuses your damage with Cold damage for a short time.

SupportGemIceBiteTwo.name: Ice Bite II
SupportGemIceBiteTwo.description: Supports damaging skills and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with supported skills infuses your damage with Cold damage for a short time.

SupportGemBhatairsVengeance.name: Bhatair's Vengeance
SupportGemBhatairsVengeance.description: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with Supported Skills infuses you and your allies with Cold damage for a short time.

SupportGemGlaciation.name: Freeze
SupportGemGlaciation.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more effective at Freezing enemies.

SupportGemConduction.name: Shock
SupportGemConduction.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Shock.

SkillGemShatteringSpite.name: Shattering Spite
SkillGemShatteringSpite.description: Stamp your spear, destroying all Bloodstone Lances on each enemy in your Presence to cause a damaging explosion around that enemy. Each explosion gains new benefits when reaching higher thresholds of Bloodstone Lances removed from an enemy, causing them to deal more damage, have increased area of effect, and Leech Life from enemies caught in the blast.

SkillGemRighteousDescent.name: Righteous Descent
SkillGemRighteousDescent.description: Leap into the air carried by divine wings, damaging enemies with your spear where you land. If there is a Fragment of Divinity near you or the targeted location, this attack will Consume it when you leap to become Empowered, dealing more damage and granting life and mana recovery. This skill does not use up its Cooldown when empowered.

SkillGemRollingMagma.name: Rolling Magma
SkillGemRollingMagma.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and lob a ball of magma that deals area damage as it hits the ground. The skill Chains, bouncing forward to deal damage multiple times. Impacts on Molten Fissures or Volcanos will activate them as though they were Slammed.

SkillGemFrostBomb.name: Frost Bomb
SkillGemFrostBomb.description: Create a pulsing Orb of frost. Each pulse inflicts Elemental Exposure on nearby enemies. When the Orb's duration ends, it Detonates, dealing Cold damage to surrounding enemies and leaving behind a Cold Infusion.

SkillGemOrbOfStorms.name: Orb of Storms
SkillGemOrbOfStorms.description: Create an Orb of electricity that fires Chaining Lightning bolts at nearby enemies. The Orb leaves behind a Lightning Infusion Remnant when it expires.

SkillGemEarthquake.name: Earthquake
SkillGemEarthquake.description: Smash the ground, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind Jagged Ground that slows enemies. The Jagged Ground erupts in a powerful Aftershock after a duration. Cannot create Jagged Ground on top of an existing patch, or if you already have the maximum number of active patches.

SkillGemContagion.name: Contagion
SkillGemContagion.description: Afflict a single enemy with a Debuff that deals Chaos damage over time. If the enemy dies while affected by Contagion, it spreads itself, Curses, and other Chaos damage over time Debuffs on the target to nearby enemies. This refreshes their durations. Reanimating or detonating a corpse affected by Contagion will cause the Minion or explosion to spread Contagion on hit.

SkillGemWither.name: Wither
SkillGemWither.description: Channel a debilitating hex that Withers enemies in the area.

SkillGemEssenceDrain.name: Essence Drain
SkillGemEssenceDrain.description: Fire a Projectile that applies a powerful Chaos damage over time debuff to enemies it hits.

SupportGemControlledDestruction.name: Controlled Destruction
SupportGemControlledDestruction.description: Supports Spells that Hit enemies, boosting their damage but preventing them from dealing Critical Hits.

SkillGemSunder.name: Sunder
SkillGemSunder.description: Slam the ground, creating a roiling fissure that damages enemies in a sequence of areas in front of you. A number of enemies hit by the wave will release a shockwave, damaging other enemies. Hitting an enemy with Fully Broken Armour applies Sundered Armour, making it take additional increased Physical damage.

SkillGemFrostbolt.name: Frostbolt
SkillGemFrostbolt.description: Fire a slow-moving Piercing Projectile that is effective at Chilling enemies and explodes on colliding with terrain.

SupportGemElementalFocus.name: Elemental Focus
SupportGemElementalFocus.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Elemental Damage but be unable to inflict Elemental Ailments.

SkillGemDarkPact.name: Dark Pact
SkillGemDarkPact.description: Sacrifice the life of a Minion to deal Chaos damage in an area around it. If you have no Minions, your own life is sacrificed instead.

SkillGemAbyssalPact.name: Abyssal Pact
SkillGemAbyssalPact.description: Sacrifice some of a damageable Minion's life to deal Physical damage in an area around it.

SkillGemSkeletalWarrior.name: Skeletal Sniper
SkillGemSkeletalWarrior.description: Activate to summon long-ranged, Reviving Skeletal Snipers that can fire a gas arrow on Command.

SkillGemSkeletalReaver.name: Skeletal Reaver
SkillGemSkeletalReaver.description: Activate to summon aggressive, Reviving Skeletal Reavers that can enrage on Command. Skeletal Reavers do more Attack Damage and gain increased Attack speed based on their Rage

SkillGemSkeletalBrute.name: Skeletal Brute
SkillGemSkeletalBrute.description: Activate to summon hard-hitting, Reviving Skeletal Brutes that can Stun Primed enemies and Warcry on Command. This Warcry Intimidates nearby enemies and Consumes Freeze on enemies and allies to deal damage in an Area around them.

SkillGemSkeletalSniper.name: Skeletal Sniper
SkillGemSkeletalSniper.description: Activate to summon long-ranged, Reviving Skeletal Snipers that can fire a gas arrow on Command.

SkillGemSkeletalFrostMage.name: Skeletal Frost Mage
SkillGemSkeletalFrostMage.description: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Frost Mages that can envelop your Minions in an icy shield on Command.

SkillGemSkeletalStormMage.name: Skeletal Storm Mage
SkillGemSkeletalStormMage.description: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Storm Mages that can call down a lightning strike on dead Skeletons on Command.

SkillGemSkeletalArsonist.name: Skeletal Arsonist
SkillGemSkeletalArsonist.description: Activate to summon bomb-throwing, Reviving Skeletal Arsonists that can detonate other Minions on Command.

SkillGemSkeletalCleric.name: Skeletal Cleric
SkillGemSkeletalCleric.description: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Clerics that heal other minions and revive fallen Skeletons.

SkillGemAzmerianWolf.name: Azmerian Wolf
SkillGemAzmerianWolf.description: Summons an ancient Reviving Azmerian Wolf that can howl, calling to spirits convening an Eternal Hunt on Command. It Maims when attacking foes, and can lunge to bite and inflict Bleeding, or howl to inspire nearby allies.

SkillGemMistRaven.name: Mist Raven
SkillGemMistRaven.description: Summons a mysterious undamageable Mist Raven that can be Commanded to dive at target location, crashing through an otherworldly mirror and damaging enemies in an area. The raven grants you a Frenzy Charge for each enemy it Culls.

SkillGemSpiralingConspiracy.name: Spiraling Conspiracy
SkillGemSpiralingConspiracy.description: A flock of mist ravens circle you, dealing damage over time in an area. Their numbers are bolstered by slain foes, or in the Presence of dangerous enemies, but the flock as a whole is considered a single minion. You can Command some of them to take flight, leaving the flock to assail your enemies.

SupportGemWildfire.name: Wildfire
SupportGemWildfire.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, Spreading Ignites it inflicts to nearby enemies after a delay.

SupportGemLacerate.name: Bleed I
SupportGemLacerate.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to inflict Bleeding.

SupportGemLacerateTwo.name: Bleed II
SupportGemLacerateTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to inflict Bleeding.

SupportGemLacerateThree.name: Bleed III
SupportGemLacerateThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Bleeding.

SupportGemLacerateFour.name: Bleed IV
SupportGemLacerateFour.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Melee Physical Damage to Bleeding Enemies, but be unable to inflict Bleeding itself. Supported Skills also inflict Incision on Hit.

SupportGemEnvenom.name: Poison I
SupportGemEnvenom.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies.

SupportGemEnvenomTwo.name: Poison II
SupportGemEnvenomTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies.

SupportGemEnvenomThree.name: Poison III
SupportGemEnvenomThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Poison enemies and causing it to inflict more powerful Poisons against Bleeding Enemies.

SupportGemMaim.name: Maim
SupportGemMaim.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Maim enemies.

SupportGemImmolate.name: Immolate
SupportGemImmolate.description: Supports Attacks, granting them extra Fire damage against Ignited enemies but making them unable to Ignite enemies themselves.

SupportGemLastingShock.name: Lasting Shock
SupportGemLastingShock.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies or inflicts Shock, causing its Shocks to be inflicted less often but last longer.

SupportGemBrutality.name: Brutality I
SupportGemBrutality.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types.

SupportGemBrutalityTwo.name: Brutality II
SupportGemBrutalityTwo.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types.

SupportGemBrutalityThree.name: Brutality III
SupportGemBrutalityThree.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types, as well as giving Hits from that skill a chance to ignore Physical Damage reduction.

SupportGemMomentum.name: Momentum
SupportGemMomentum.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal more damage if you move a sufficient distance while using the skill. Teleportation does not count towards the distance travelled.

SupportGemArcaneSurge.name: Arcane Surge
SupportGemArcaneSurge.description: Supports Spells you cast yourself, tracking the mana you spend to cast them. Spending enough mana grants a burst of Mana Regeneration and Cast Speed.

SkillGemVulnerability.name: Vulnerability
SkillGemVulnerability.description: Curse all targets in an area after a short delay. making Hits against them ignore a portion of their Armour.

SupportGemWitheringTouch.name: Withering Touch
SupportGemWitheringTouch.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to Wither enemies on Hit.

SkillGemSoulrend.name: Soulrend
SkillGemSoulrend.description: Fire a Piercing Projectile that seeks out enemies. Enemies hit are inflicted with a Debuff that Hinders them and deals Chaos damage over time for a short duration.

SupportGemExpand.name: Expand
SupportGemExpand.description: Supports Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time. The Seals are broken when cast, increasing area of effect. Cannot support Channelling Skills or Skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

SupportGemUnleash.name: Unleash
SupportGemUnleash.description: Supports Repeatable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time. The Seals are broken when cast, each causing the Spell to Repeat. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

SupportGemZarokhsRevolt.name: Zarokh's Revolt
SupportGemZarokhsRevolt.description: Supports Repeatable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them over time and giving them a moderate Cooldown. The Seals are broken when cast, each causing the Spell to Repeat. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown or gain seals.

SupportGemCloseCombat.name: Close Combat I
SupportGemCloseCombat.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

SupportGemCloseCombatTwo.name: Close Combat II
SupportGemCloseCombatTwo.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

SupportGemRage.name: Rage I
SupportGemRage.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit.

SupportGemRageTwo.name: Rage II
SupportGemRageTwo.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit.

SupportGemRageThree.name: Rage III
SupportGemRageThree.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to grant Rage on Hit. Supported Skills have signficantly higher Attack speed while you or supported minion are not at maximum Rage.

SkillGemPlagueBearer.name: Plague Bearer
SkillGemPlagueBearer.description: While active, stores a portion of the Poison Damage you deal. Using this Skill unleashes the stored Poison to damage and Poison enemies around you.

SupportGemFeedingFrenzy.name: Feeding Frenzy I
SupportGemFeedingFrenzy.description: Supports skills which create Minions, making them deal and take more damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

SupportGemMeatShield.name: Meat Shield I
SupportGemMeatShield.description: Supports skills which create Minions, granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

SupportGemMeatShieldTwo.name: Meat Shield II
SupportGemMeatShieldTwo.description: Supports skills which create Minions, granting them less damage taken but making them deal less damage.

SupportGemBrutusBrain.name: Brutus' Brain
SupportGemBrutusBrain.description: Supports skills which create Minions, causing those Minions to be unable to deal or take Damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

SupportGemInfernalLegion.name: Infernal Legion I
SupportGemInfernalLegion.description: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Ignite. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

SupportGemInfernalLegionTwo.name: Infernal Legion II
SupportGemInfernalLegionTwo.description: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Ignite. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

SupportGemInfernalLegionThree.name: Infernal Legion III
SupportGemInfernalLegionThree.description: Supports skills which create Minions which can be damaged, causing them and enemies near them to Ignite. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

SkillGemArtilleryBallista.name: Siege Ballista
SkillGemArtilleryBallista.description: Deploy a Ballista Totem that fires bolts skyward, to explode a short time after landing.

SupportGemSecondWind.name: Second Wind I
SupportGemSecondWind.description: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemSecondWindTwo.name: Second Wind II
SupportGemSecondWindTwo.description: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemSecondWindThree.name: Second Wind III
SupportGemSecondWindThree.description: Supports Skills which have a cooldown, giving them extra uses of that cooldown and causing them to recover your Life when a Skill is used and goes on cooldown. Cannot support Meta, instant, or Triggered Skills, and cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SkillGemSeismicCry.name: Seismic Cry
SkillGemSeismicCry.description: Perform a damaging Warcry, Knocking Back nearby enemies and Heavy Stunning enemies that are Primed for Stun. If an enemy is Heavy Stunned or a currently Heavy Stunned enemy is Hit, this Skill Empowers subsequent Slams to perform an additional Aftershock. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

SkillGemEarthshatter.name: Earthshatter
SkillGemEarthshatter.description: Slam the ground, sending out a fissure that deals area damage to enemies it passes under and thrusts a spike from the ground when it ends. Warcries performed near the spike will cause it to shatter, damaging surrounding enemies.

SkillGemSigilOfPower.name: Sigil of Power
SkillGemSigilOfPower.description: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful Spell Damage Buff to you and Allies while standing in it. The Buff becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.

SkillGemSigilOfLife.name: Rite of Restoration
SkillGemSigilOfLife.description: Place a Sigil on the ground, providing a powerful Buff to you and Allies standing in it which grants Life Regeneration and amplifies Armour, Evasion and Energy Shield. The Buff becomes more powerful the more mana you spend while standing in the Sigil.

SkillGemFlameWall.name: Flame Wall
SkillGemFlameWall.description: Create a wall of Fire in front of you, which Ignites everything within its area. Any Projectiles fired through the wall by you and Allies deal added Fire damage. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to also add Lightning damage to the Projectiles.

SupportGemImpendingDoom.name: Impending Doom
SupportGemImpendingDoom.description: Supports Curse skills you cast yourself, causing them to trigger Doom Blast on Cursed enemies when the Curse expires.

SkillGemHexblast.name: Hexblast
SkillGemHexblast.description: Detonate a Curse on every enemy in an area, causing explosions of Chaos damage but removing the Curse. Can only detonate Curses for which at least half of the duration has expired.

SkillGemExsanguinate.name: Exsanguinate
SkillGemExsanguinate.description: Expel your own blood as Chaining blood tendrils in a cone in front of you. Enemies Hit by the tendrils take Physical damage and are inflicted with Bleeding.

SkillGemReap.name: Reap
SkillGemReap.description: Conjure a bloody scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing Physical damage to enemies and applying Critical Weakness. Cannot be Triggered.

SupportGemLifetap.name: Lifetap
SupportGemLifetap.description: Supports any Skill, turning its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit.

SupportGemAtaluiBloodletting.name: Atalui's Bloodletting
SupportGemAtaluiBloodletting.description: Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit. Supported Skills Gain a portion of their Life cost as extra Physical Damage.

SupportGemBehead.name: Behead I
SupportGemBehead.description: Supports Strike skills, causing them to steal a Modifier from Rare monsters they kill.

SupportGemBeheadTwo.name: Behead II
SupportGemBeheadTwo.description: Supports Strike skills, causing them to steal two Modifiers from Rare monsters they kill.

SupportGemEinharsBeastrite.name: Einhar's Beastrite
SupportGemEinharsBeastrite.description: Supports Melee Strike skills, causing them to steal a Modifier from Rare monsters they kill for a lengthy duration, while being unable to damage enemies not on low Life. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

SupportGemExecute.name: Execute I
SupportGemExecute.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

SupportGemExecuteTwo.name: Execute II
SupportGemExecuteTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

SupportGemExecuteThree.name: Execute III
SupportGemExecuteThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life, as well as dealing more damage while you are on Low Life.

SkillGemBoneshatter.name: Boneshatter
SkillGemBoneshatter.description: Attack enemies with a melee Strike. The Strike will cause a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. Upon causing a Heavy Stun it will also create a Shockwave, dealing a large amount of damage in an area.

SkillGemEyeOfWinter.name: Eye of Winter
SkillGemEyeOfWinter.description: Fire a single Eye Projectile which does not Hit enemies. The Eye constantly releases damaging shard Projectiles in a spiral as it flies. If the Eye passes over an Elemental Ground Surface or Orb, it will take on that surface's effect causing shards to deal more damage of the corresponding Type.

SkillGemTornado.name: Tornado
SkillGemTornado.description: Create a storm that sucks in enemies and deals Physical damage over time. A Tornado that overlaps an Elemental Ground Surface absorbs that surface's Debuff, applying it to enemies inside the Tornado and causing the Tornado to deal extra damage of that element.

SupportGemOvercharge.name: Overcharge
SupportGemOvercharge.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making its Shocks more effective but reflecting them back to you as well.

SkillGemLightningConduit.name: Lightning Conduit
SkillGemLightningConduit.description: Call down Lightning to hit all enemies in a cone in front of you, dealing significantly more damage to Shocked enemies. If there is a Shocked enemy in the target area, additional lightning bolts are distributed among the targets hit. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast.

SkillGemGalvanicField.name: Galvanic Field
SkillGemGalvanicField.description: Gain a Buff that boosts your Shock chance. Shocking an enemy consumes the Buff to attach an Orb of electricity to that enemy. The Orb fires bolts of electricity at nearby enemies until it expires.

SkillGemVolcanicFissure.name: Volcanic Fissure
SkillGemVolcanicFissure.description: Slam the ground, creating a branching Molten Fissure that deals damage as it travels and remains for a duration. Using a different Slam on a Molten Fissure creates a spreading Aftershock.

SkillGemRapidAssault.name: Rapid Assault
SkillGemRapidAssault.description: Perform a series of six rapid stabs. The final stab inflicts Bleeding and leaves a spearhead stuck in the target, Maiming them for a duration. Detonator Skills will cause the stuck spearheads to explode, dealing further damage to the target and other nearby enemies.

SkillGemDisengage.name: Disengage
SkillGemDisengage.description: Jump back as you rupture the earth in front of you with spearpoints, damaging enemies. Consumes the Parried Debuff on Hitting enemies to release a shockwave and grant you a Frenzy Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills, and causes Strikes and Projectiles to miss you while jumping. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.

SkillGemBloodHunt.name: Blood Hunt
SkillGemBloodHunt.description: Lunge at a target and skewers them. Hitting an enemy that has suffered Blood Loss will cause a blood explosion and also Consume Bleeding. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.

SkillGemWhirlingSlash.name: Whirling Slash
SkillGemWhirlingSlash.description: Perform a circular slash that kicks up a Whirlwind around you, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Leaving the area collapses the storm, dealing damage and causing Knockback.

SkillGemSpearfield.name: Spearfield
SkillGemSpearfield.description: Stab the ground causing multiple spears to burst out of the ground in front of you in a large area. The spears remain for a duration, or explode when enemies touch them, damaging and Maiming them.

SkillGemDemonMagus.name: Demon Magus
SkillGemDemonMagus.description: Activate to summon a Reviving Demon Magus which casts socketed Spells in order.

SkillGemLightningSpear.name: Lightning Spear
SkillGemLightningSpear.description: Throw a single copy of your spear. When it hits an enemy it bursts, firing secondary lightning bolt Projectiles at multiple other enemies within a large area around it. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to cause the main spear to split into multiple copies on impact, each of which then bursts.

SkillGemGlacialLance.name: Glacial Lance
SkillGemGlacialLance.description: Throw a single Piercing lance that leaves icy fragments in its wake. The fragments Chill nearby enemies. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to cause the glacial fragments created by the first Projectile to explode outwards after a short duration, peppering enemies with shrapnel.

SkillGemAxeChop.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Chop
SkillGemAxeChop.description: DNT-UNUSED Bring your axe down in a sweeping slash, creating a slash along a line in the ground, with a chance to cause bleeding.

SkillGemAxeSlash.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Slash
SkillGemAxeSlash.description: DNT-UNUSED Step forward and swing your axe, knocking enemies back to drag them with your attack.

SkillGemWhirlingAssault.name: Whirling Assault
SkillGemWhirlingAssault.description: Advance while hitting enemies around you with a series of spinning Strikes.

SkillGemRollingSlam.name: Rolling Slam
SkillGemRollingSlam.description: Slam the ground to Stun enemies and knock them away, then continue forward and perform a devastating second Slam.

SkillGemEscapeShot.name: Escape Shot
SkillGemEscapeShot.description: Leap backwards, firing an icy arrow which can Chill or Freeze enemies around the location from which you escaped. This arrow will create Ice Fragments on impact.

SkillGemSuperchargedSlam.name: Supercharged Slam
SkillGemSuperchargedSlam.description: Channel to charge up a heavy swing, drawing earth from the ground to enlarge your mace. Release to Slam the ground, dealing damage in an area around the impact, followed by Aftershocks dealing damage in a larger area. This Skill has its own Attack time, which is not affected by your weapon's attack speed and cannot be modified.

SkillGemEvasiveStrike.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Evasive Strike
SkillGemEvasiveStrike.description: DNT-UNUSED Leap back before dashing forward, taking out enemies in a path.

SkillGemWindBlast.name: Wind Blast
SkillGemWindBlast.description: Batter enemies at range by generating a gust of wind as you swing. Enemies will be Dazed and Knocked Back based on how close they are to you.

SkillGemBladeDance.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Blade Dance
SkillGemBladeDance.description: DNT-UNUSED Perform a slashing attack that moves you through the battlefield, slicing all around you.

SkillGemClawRake.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Claw Rake
SkillGemClawRake.description: DNT-UNUSED Perform two upwards slashes, causing massive claw marks in the ground.

SkillGemSpinningFlail.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Spinning Flail
SkillGemSpinningFlail.description: DNT-UNUSED Advance forward, striking enemies around you with whirling swings of your flail.

SkillGemAxeExecute.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Execute
SkillGemAxeExecute.description: DNT-UNUSED Perform a heavy melee attack, dealing massive damage to enemies on low life.

SkillGemAxeLeapingChop.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Leaping Chop
SkillGemAxeLeapingChop.description: DNT-UNUSED Leap forward, dealing massive damage at the end of the attack.

SkillGemAxeWhirlingSlash.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Whirling Slash
SkillGemAxeWhirlingSlash.description: DNT-UNUSED Ready your axe then spin, dealing high damage to enemies and causing them to bleed.

SkillGemAxeRaisedChop.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Raised Chop
SkillGemAxeRaisedChop.description: DNT-UNUSED Raise your weapon and channel rage into it, before slashing downwards and dealing massive damage to enemies the path of the attack.

SkillGemAxeHeavyCleave.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Axe Heavy Cleave
SkillGemAxeHeavyCleave.description: DNT-UNUSED Ready your axe as it charges with flame, then swing in a massive flaming arc, sending out a slow wave of fire.

SkillGemKnifeFlip.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Knife Flip
SkillGemKnifeFlip.description: Fire an arc of knives in front of the caster which deals physical damage.

SkillGemWaveOfFrost.name: Wave of Frost
SkillGemWaveOfFrost.description: Flip backwards and send forth a Freezing wave in front of you, immediately Freezing enemies which are Primed for Freeze.

SkillGemIceStrike.name: Ice Strike
SkillGemIceStrike.description: Perform a fast icy Strike. Using this Attack three times in quick succession causes a final strike that is slower and more powerful.

SupportGemJaggedGround.name: Jagged Ground I
SupportGemJaggedGround.description: Supports Slam skills. Supported Skills will consume Endurance Charges on use to create Jagged Ground. Cannot Support Skills which consume Endurance Charges.

SupportGemJaggedGroundTwo.name: Jagged Ground II
SupportGemJaggedGroundTwo.description: Supports Slam skills. Aftershocks caused by Supported Slam Skills always create patches of Jagged Ground.

SupportGemInevitableCritical.name: Inexorable Critical I
SupportGemInevitableCritical.description: Supports any skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to accumulate Critical Hit chance over time.

SupportGemInevitableCriticalTwo.name: Inexorable Critical II
SupportGemInevitableCriticalTwo.description: Supports any skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to accumulate Critical Hit chance over time, but also reduce your Critical Damage Bonus.

SupportGemRuthless.name: Ruthless
SupportGemRuthless.description: Supports Attacks, causing repeated uses to be more effective at Stunning enemies.

SupportGemFastForward.name: Compressed Duration I
SupportGemFastForward.description: Supports any skill that has a duration making that duration shorter.

SupportGemFastForwardTwo.name: Compressed Duration II
SupportGemFastForwardTwo.description: Supports any skill that has a duration making that duration shorter.

SupportGemFistOfWar.name: Fist of War I
SupportGemFistOfWar.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds.

SupportGemFistOfWarTwo.name: Fist of War II
SupportGemFistOfWarTwo.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds.

SupportGemFistOfWarThree.name: Fist of War III
SupportGemFistOfWarThree.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a very powerful Ancestral Boost infrequently.

SupportGemUnbreakable.name: Unbreakable
SupportGemUnbreakable.description: Supports any skill that you can use, making you harder to Stun while using it.

SupportGemPersistence.name: Prolonged Duration I
SupportGemPersistence.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.

SupportGemPersistenceTwo.name: Prolonged Duration II
SupportGemPersistenceTwo.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration longer.

SupportGemPersistenceThree.name: Prolonged Duration III
SupportGemPersistenceThree.description: Supports any skill that has a duration, making that duration significantly longer while applying a cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

SupportGemImpactShockwave.name: Impact Shockwave
SupportGemImpactShockwave.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills and Wind Attack Skills, causing them to create an Aftershock that damages enemies around the target when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

SupportGemHexBloom.name: Hex Bloom
SupportGemHexBloom.description: Supports Curses, spreading their effects when a Cursed enemy dies.

SkillGemGlacialCascade.name: Glacial Cascade
SkillGemGlacialCascade.description: Sweep your Quarterstaff upwards, releasing an icy fissure which deals damage in a series of bursts culminating in a large spike. Frozen enemies hit by the final spike are dealt heavy damage but the Freeze is Consumed. Ice Crystals hit by the final spike explode.

SkillGemComet.name: Comet
SkillGemComet.description: Call down a mass of ice from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to cause a devastating blast of ice and fire.

SkillGemBladeNova.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Blade Nova
SkillGemBladeNova.description: Fire an arc of knives in front of the caster which deals physical damage.

SkillGemStaffConsecrate.name: Consecrate
SkillGemStaffConsecrate.description: Create an area of Consecrated Ground around you.

SkillGemRipwireBallista.name: Artillery Ballista
SkillGemRipwireBallista.description: Deploy a Ballista Totem that rains down a salvo of Pinning, Maiming bolts.

SkillGemManaTempest.name: Mana Tempest
SkillGemManaTempest.description: Create a storm of arcane energies that Empowers your Mana-costing Spells while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. The storm will dissipate when you exit it or run out of Mana.

SkillGemDarkTempest.name: His Dark Horizon
SkillGemDarkTempest.description: DNT-UNUSED Create a storm of deathly energies that Empowers your Mana-costing Spells with Cold damage while you remain inside it. Maintaining the storm constantly drains your Mana, and spending more causes it to drain faster. As the storm persists it creates slowly expanding Chilled Ground. Enemies that enter the eye of the storm are Blinded. When you leave the storm, or run out of Mana, the storm ends and unleashes a death-wave, damaging enemies on the Chilled Ground.

SkillGemKillingPalm.name: Killing Palm
SkillGemKillingPalm.description: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, Culling enemies if their life is low enough and performing additional dashing Strikes to other Cullable targets in range if your target was Culled. Each enemy killed by this strike grants a Power Charge, with higher Rarity monsters granting additional Charges. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.

SkillGemCrushingFear.name: Crushing Fear
SkillGemCrushingFear.description: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, Culling enemies if their life is low enough. When this skill kills an enemy you draw out their final fears, crushing them to create a shockwave. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.

SkillGemShatteringPalm.name: Shattering Palm
SkillGemShatteringPalm.description: Dash to an enemy and Strike them with an Attack that manifests a wave of cold, coating nearby enemies in shards of ice. Dealing enough damage to these enemies will shatter the shards, causing an icy explosion that deals Attack damage.

SkillGemVolcano.name: Volcano
SkillGemVolcano.description: Uplift a volcano from the earth, damaging enemies standing on it and releasing a spray of molten Projectiles. While the volcano persists, Slamming it will cause another Projectile spray. Channelling this Skill for longer makes the initial eruption more violent, but does not affect subsequent Projectile sprays.

SkillGemWolfPack.name: Wolf Pack
SkillGemWolfPack.description: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf Companions. The pack treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.

SkillGemHyenaCackle.name: Cackling Companions
SkillGemHyenaCackle.description: Activate to summon a cackle of Hyena Companions. The cackle is treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Hyenas in the cackle. Hyenas whoop when they first appear, Hindering nearby enemies, and have a chance to Maim enemies they Hit.

SupportGemFrostNexus.name: Frost Nexus
SupportGemFrostNexus.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to create patches of Chilled Ground around Frozen enemies.

SupportGemFrozenVortex.name: Frozen Vortex
SupportGemFrozenVortex.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to create an icy vortex on Shattering an enemy.

SkillGemSpiralVolley.name: Spiral Volley
SkillGemSpiralVolley.description: Load your Bow with a volley of enchanted arrows and fire them in a circle as you spin forward, firing directly at targets if possible. Consumes Frenzy Charges to cause the arrows to deal more damage and Chain to other targets. Each target can only be Hit once.

SkillGemBearMaul.name: Maul
SkillGemBearMaul.description: Shapeshift into a Bear and rake enemies with your claws, generating Rage on Hit.

SkillGemRend.name: Rend
SkillGemRend.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and perform a wide slash with your wingtip claws. Consumes a Power Charge if possible to grant you a Buff that gives you extra Lightning damage. While you have the Buff, Rend covers a much larger area but is slower.

SkillGemWolfPounce.name: Pounce
SkillGemWolfPounce.description: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and leap to a target location, damaging enemies in an area around where you land. Predator's Mark will be Triggered targeting the highest Rarity enemy Hit, or if a Mark gem is socketed into this Skill, that Mark will be Triggered instead. Using this Skill allows any Wolf Minions you have to leap immediately.

SkillGemLightningBolt.name: Lightning Bolt
SkillGemLightningBolt.description: Call down a Shocking bolt of Lightning to strike enemies in a small area.

SkillGemBearRampage.name: Rampage
SkillGemBearRampage.description: Shapeshift into a Bear and charge forward, Slamming the ground as you run. Channelling ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending Rage.

SupportEnervation.name: Enervation
SupportEnervation.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to regenerate mana on shocking an enemy. Cannot support skills which create Minions, or skills used by Totems or Traps.

SupportGemShockSiphon.name: Shock Siphon
SupportGemShockSiphon.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Energy Shield when it kills a Shocked enemy.

SkillGemStaffUnleash.name: Unleash
SkillGemStaffUnleash.description: Augment yourself with temporal magic for a short duration, Empowering the next Repeatable Spell you cast to Repeat multiple times. Cannot Empower Skills with a Cooldown.

SupportGemCoursingCurrent.name: Shock Conduction
SupportGemCoursingCurrent.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to also Shock nearby enemies when you Shock an enemy.

SupportGemCoursingCurrentTwo.name: Shock Conduction II
SupportGemCoursingCurrentTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to also Shock nearby enemies when you Shock an enemy. Always Shocks enemies which are Drenched.

SupportGemDeepFreeze.name: Deep Freeze
SupportGemDeepFreeze.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Freeze it inflicts to last longer.

SkillGemThunderstorm.name: Thunderstorm
SkillGemThunderstorm.description: Conjure a thunderstorm which causes lightning strikes and torrential rain in an area. Enemies in the area are Drenched, causing them to become Shocked or Frozen more easily. Plants in the area become Overgrown.

SupportGemIgnition.name: Ignite I
SupportGemIgnition.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite.

SupportGemIgnitionTwo.name: Ignite II
SupportGemIgnitionTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite.

SupportGemIgnitionThree.name: Ignite III
SupportGemIgnitionThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Ignite and causing inflicted Ignites to deal their damage more quickly.

SupportGemSearingFlame.name: Searing Flame I
SupportGemSearingFlame.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but its Hits to deal less damage.

SupportGemSearingFlameTwo.name: Searing Flame II
SupportGemSearingFlameTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but its Hits to deal less damage.

SupportGemEternalFlame.name: Eternal Flame I
SupportGemEternalFlame.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing its Ignites to be inflicted less often but last longer.

SupportGemEternalFlameTwo.name: Eternal Flame II
SupportGemEternalFlameTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing its Ignites to last longer.

SupportGemEternalFlameThree.name: Eternal Flame III
SupportGemEternalFlameThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to refresh Ignites on Critical Hit.

SupportGemEssenceHarvest.name: Essence Harvest
SupportGemEssenceHarvest.description: Supports Skills which create Reviving Persistent Minions. When those Minions die, you Recoup a percentage of your maximum Mana.

SkillGemFuriousSlam.name: Furious Slam
SkillGemFuriousSlam.description: Shapeshift into a Bear and Slam the ground with great force, causing a pair of shockwaves. Can spend Rage to create larger shockwaves that leave behind Jagged Ground.

SkillGemFerociousRoar.name: Ferocious Roar
SkillGemFerociousRoar.description: Shapeshift into a Bear and roar in defiance, immediately gaining Rage if there are enemies nearby and Empowering subsequent Attacks to Break Armour. Alternatively, socketing a human-form Warcry into this Skill triggers that Warcry instead, and augments its damage and area. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

SkillGemCastOnShock.name: Cast on Shock
SkillGemCastOnShock.description: While active, gains Energy when you Shock enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SupportGemInvocation.name: Invocation
SupportGemInvocation.description: Supports Spell skills, causing them to reduce the cast time of other skills when used. Cannot support Totem skills, Channelling skills, Triggering skills, instant skills, or skills with a Reservation.

SkillGemCastOnFreeze.name: Cast on Freeze
SkillGemCastOnFreeze.description: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastOnIgnite.name: Cast on Ignite
SkillGemCastOnIgnite.description: While active, gains Energy when you Ignite enemies and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastOnElementalAilment.name: Cast on Elemental Ailment
SkillGemCastOnElementalAilment.description: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze, Shock, or Ignite enemies, and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastOnMeleeKill.name: Cast on Melee Kill
SkillGemCastOnMeleeKill.description: While active, gains Energy when you kill enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastOnCritical.name: Cast on Critical
SkillGemCastOnCritical.description: While active, gains Energy when you Critically Hit enemies and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastWhenStunned.name: Cast when Stunned
SkillGemCastWhenStunned.description: While active, gains Energy when you are Stunned and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastWhenDamageTaken.name: Cast when Damage Taken
SkillGemCastWhenDamageTaken.description: While active, gains Energy when you take damage and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SupportGemExploitWeakness.name: Exploit Weakness
SupportGemExploitWeakness.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more Damage against enemies with Broken Armour but preventing them from Breaking Armour themselves. Cannot support skills that Consume Broken Armour.

SupportGemDevastate.name: Devastate
SupportGemDevastate.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to apply Broken Armour to enemies when causing a Heavy Stun to enemies.

SkillGemBarrierInvocation.name: Barrier Invocation
SkillGemBarrierInvocation.description: While active, gains Energy when your Energy Shield is damaged by Enemy Hits. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

SkillGemCastOnDodge.name: Cast on Dodge
SkillGemCastOnDodge.description: While active, gains Energy when you dodge roll and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastWhileChannelling.name: Cast while Channelling
SkillGemCastWhileChannelling.description: While active, gains Energy while you're channelling a skill and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastOnMeleeStun.name: Cast on Melee Stun
SkillGemCastOnMeleeStun.description: While active, gains Energy when you Stun enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SupportGemEnragedWarcry.name: Enraged Warcry I
SupportGemEnragedWarcry.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

SupportGemEnragedWarcryTwo.name: Enraged Warcry II
SupportGemEnragedWarcryTwo.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

SkillGemLingeringIllusion.name: Lingering Illusion
SkillGemLingeringIllusion.description: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will drop a Remnant that grants you a Power Charge on pickup.

SkillGemGhostDance.name: Ghost Dance
SkillGemGhostDance.description: While active, causes you to periodically gain Ghost Shrouds. If you are Hit while you have a Ghost Shroud, it is immediately consumed to recover Energy Shield based on your Evasion.

SkillGemBindSpectre.name: Bind Spectre
SkillGemBindSpectre.description: Capture the spirit of a defeated monster, transforming this gem to instead allow you to summon the monster's ghost as a Reviving Minion.

SkillGemShroud.name: Shroud
SkillGemShroud.description: Gain Stealth after not using Skills or being Hit for a short time.

SkillGemSummonMercenaryCompanion.name: Summon Companion
SkillGemSummonMercenaryCompanion.description: Summon a Reviving Companion to aid you in combat. The Mercenary will use socketed Attacks, and can be given equipment in the Skills Panel.

SkillGemAncestralWarriorTotem.name: Ancestral Warrior Totem
SkillGemAncestralWarriorTotem.description: Consume 3 Endurance Charges to Raise a Totem that conjures spirit warriors. Each warrior uses a socketed Mace Skill once, then disappears. Cannot use Channelling Skills or Skills with Cooldowns.

SkillGemSpellTotem.name: Spell Totem
SkillGemSpellTotem.description: Consume any combination of 3 Power and/or Endurance Charges to raise a Totem that uses socketed Spells. Cannot use Skills with Cooldowns.

SkillGemMetaBowTotem.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Meta Bow Totem
SkillGemMetaBowTotem.description: Place a ballista totem which uses the socketed bow or wand attack skills.

SkillGemExplosiveGrenade.name: Explosive Grenade
SkillGemExplosiveGrenade.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a devastating fiery blast when its fuse expires.

SkillGemFlashGrenade.name: Flash Grenade
SkillGemFlashGrenade.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a Blinding, Stunning explosion when its fuse expires.

SkillGemOilGrenade.name: Oil Grenade
SkillGemOilGrenade.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that bursts in a spray of Oil when the fuse expires or when it impacts an Enemy, dealing minimal damage but covering the ground and nearby enemies in Oil. Oil created this way can be Ignited by Detonator Skills or Ignited Ground.

SkillGemGasGrenade.name: Gas Grenade
SkillGemGasGrenade.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that causes a burst of Poison gas when its fuse expires, damaging enemies and leaving behind a growing Poison cloud. Burning effects or Detonator skills will cause the cloud to explode in a fiery blast.

SkillGemVoltaicGrenade.name: Voltaic Grenade
SkillGemVoltaicGrenade.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that discharges an Electrocuting Lightning blast when its fuse expires, causing all Lightning Hits against enemies to contribute to Electrocution buildup for a duration.

SkillGemPainOffering.name: Pain Offering
SkillGemPainOffering.description: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike to send nearby Minions into a frenzy as long as the spike remains, making their skills faster and harder hitting.  The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.

SkillGemTempestFlurry.name: Tempest Flurry
SkillGemTempestFlurry.description: Perform a series of aggressive Strikes. When used in quick succession, the third use Strikes three times, and the fourth use performs a Final Strike that calls down a powerful Shocking bolt.

SkillGemStaggeringPalm.name: Staggering Palm
SkillGemStaggeringPalm.description: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, instantly Heavily Stunning enemies which are Primed for Stun and performing additional dashing Strikes to other Primed targets in range if your first target was Stunned. Heavy Stunning an enemy with this Skill grants you a Buff that causes your Quarterstaff Attacks to also fire Projectiles for a short duration. Heavy Stunning additional enemies adds to the Buff's duration.

SkillGemChargedStaff.name: Charged Staff
SkillGemChargedStaff.description: Consume all Power Charges to charge your Quarterstaff with electricity, adding Lightning damage and a Lightning shockwave to your Quarterstaff Attacks. Reusing this skill while the Buff is active adds to the Buff's duration and damage.

SkillGemSiphoningStrike.name: Siphoning Strike
SkillGemSiphoningStrike.description: Dash to a target and Strike them with your Quarterstaff. If the target is Shocked, Consume their Shock to release a Lightning shockwave around the target and grant you a Power Charge. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.

SkillGemTempestBell.name: Tempest Bell
SkillGemTempestBell.description: Build Combo by successfully Striking Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum Combo, use this skill to cause the Bell on your staff to grow to massive size as you drop it on the ground. The Bell damages enemies on impact and can be Hit by your skills, creating a damaging shockwave. Elemental Ailments applied to the Bell cause its shockwaves to deal extra damage of the corresponding type, and Hits which would have caused Knockback increase the area of effect of the shockwaves.

SkillGemChaosbolt.name: Chaos Bolt
SkillGemChaosbolt.description: Fire a burst of Chaos energy at the target.

SkillGemCoilingBolts.name: Coiling Bolts
SkillGemCoilingBolts.description: Simultaneously fires a Physical Projectile and a Chaos Projectile at the target. These projectiles Chain through any number of Cursed targets.

SkillGemFrozenLocus.name: Frozen Locus
SkillGemFrozenLocus.description: Leap backward and crack the ground with your staff to call forth an Ice Crystal which can be damaged by you and enemies. If the Crystal is destroyed it causes an icy explosion. This skill can be used while using other skills.

SkillGemBonestorm.name: Bonestorm
SkillGemBonestorm.description: Channel to conjure a swarm of bone spikes in the air, then release to fire them at enemies and explode. Shrapnel Impales enemies Hit, causing subsequent Attack Hits against those targets to deal extra damage. Consumes your Power Charges to cause much larger explosions.

SkillGemBoneCage.name: Bone Cage
SkillGemBoneCage.description: Raise a ring of bone spikes around you. The spikes are destroyed when enemies touch them, damaging and Pinning those enemies. Raising a new ring of spikes destroys the previous one.

SupportGemSpreadingFrost.name: Spreading Frost
SupportGemSpreadingFrost.description: Supports any skill that hits enemies, causing them to Chill enemies near enemies they Freeze.

SupportGemNeuralOverload.name: Neural Overload
SupportGemNeuralOverload.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Nearby enemies are marked when they are Primed for Electrocution, and hitting a marked enemy with a supported skill will Electrocute them.

SupportGemPinpointCritical.name: Pinpoint Critical
SupportGemPinpointCritical.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to Critically Hit more often but deal less damage with Critical Hits.

SupportGemPerpetualCharge.name: Perpetual Charge
SupportGemPerpetualCharge.description: Supports skills that consume Power, Frenzy or Endurance Charges on use, giving them a chance not to remove each Charge while still gaining the benefits of consuming them.

SupportGemCorrosion.name: Corrosion
SupportGemCorrosion.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Poison it applies to also Break enemy Armour. Cannot support skills that Consume Fully Broken Armour.

SkillGemUnearth.name: Unearth
SkillGemUnearth.description: Raise spikes of bone from the earth in front of you, damaging enemies. The bones of Corpses and dead Reviving Minions in the area are ripped out and reassembled into short-lived Bone Construct Minions that fight for you. Larger Corpses create more than one Bone Construct.

SkillGemDetonatingArrow.name: Detonating Arrow
SkillGemDetonatingArrow.description: Channel to charge up before firing off a burning arrow. At maximum stages, the arrow will create a Detonating explosion at the end of its flight.

SkillGemPoisonBurstArrow.name: Poisonburst Arrow
SkillGemPoisonBurstArrow.description: Fire a virulent arrow that creates a burst of Poison on hit, affecting all enemies in an area.

SkillGemFirebolt.name: Firebolt
SkillGemFirebolt.description: Launch a fiery Projectile towards a target. The Projectile explodes on impact, damaging foes in a small area.

SkillGemToxicGrowth.name: Toxic Growth
SkillGemToxicGrowth.description: Fire a rain of Toxic Pustules into the air. The Pustules deal damage on impact, then Detonate after a delay. They can also be Poisoned, causing them to Detonate faster and more violently.

SkillGemStormcallerArrow.name: Stormcaller Arrow
SkillGemStormcallerArrow.description: Fire an arrow that embeds where it lands for a short duration. At the end of the duration, a Lightning Bolt strikes the arrow, disintegrating it and damaging enemies, with a high chance to Shock. Shocking any enemy with the Bolt also applies Shock to all enemies near the impact.

SkillGemPhantasmalArrow.name: Phantasmal Arrow
SkillGemPhantasmalArrow.description: Fires an arrow that embeds where it lands for a short duration. At the end of the duration, the arrow explodes in spectral flame, turning it to ashes and damaging enemies, with a high chance to Ignite. Igniting any enemy with the Explosion also applies Ignite to enemies within range.

SkillGemLightningRod.name: Lightning Rod
SkillGemLightningRod.description: Fire an arrow that drops from above, creating a Lightning burst. The arrow remains in the ground, and any Chaining Lightning beams can Chain to it. When Chained to, the arrows charge up for a brief period before releasing another Lightning burst. The Lightning Arrow Skill reduces this delay, causing bursts to happen more quickly.

SkillGemSnipe.name: Snipe
SkillGemSnipe.description: Channel to charge up your bow before releasing a powerful shot. Releasing with Perfect Timing causes the arrow to explode on impact and Consume Freeze on directly Hitting. Consuming Freeze enhances the explosion.

SkillGemGasArrow.name: Gas Arrow
SkillGemGasArrow.description: Fire a noxious arrow at the ground, creating a cloud of flammable poisonous gas at the end of its flight. The cloud will detonate if hit by a Detonator skill or if an Ignited enemy touches it, creating a fiery explosion.

SkillGemSolarOrb.name: Solar Orb
SkillGemSolarOrb.description: Create a fiery Orb that periodically releases fiery pulses. Enemies that are very close to the Orb are Ignited. Flameblast can target a Solar Orb to be centred on the Orb instead of your location.

SkillGemFireball.name: Fireball
SkillGemFireball.description: Launch a large ball of Fire which explodes on impact. The explosion Consumes a Fire Infusion if possible to launch a ring of smaller firebolts.

SkillGemElectrocutingArrow.name: Electrocuting Arrow
SkillGemElectrocutingArrow.description: Fire an electrifying arrow that explodes in an Area on Hit. Hitting an enemy will attach an Electrocuting Rod to them, causing all incoming Lightning damage to build up Electrocution. This rod is removed when the enemy is next Electrocuted.

SkillGemColdSnap.name: Snap
SkillGemColdSnap.description: Consume the elemental energy from a Frozen, Shocked or Ignited enemy, creating an elemental blast that leaves behind an Infusion Remnant. The blast will spread to other enemies affected by the same Ailment, but those blasts cannot spread further. Can also be cast on a Frostbolt to create a larger cold blast.

SkillGemPerfectStrike.name: Perfect Strike
SkillGemPerfectStrike.description: Channel to charge up your weapon with Fire. Releasing with Perfect Timing will create a damaging wave of intense Fire.

SkillGemShieldBlock.name: Raise Shield
SkillGemShieldBlock.description: Raise your Shield to Block all incoming Blockable hits. Release immediately after Blocking when an enemy is close to perform a Shield Bash, damaging and Stunning enemies. While your Shield is raised you cannot be Light Stunned by hits you Block, but Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you. You cannot Evade while your Shield is raised, but Evasion instead grants an equal chance to avoid this Heavy Stun buildup.

SkillGemResonatingShield.name: Resonating Shield
SkillGemResonatingShield.description: Repeatedly hammer your Shield with your weapon causing damaging shockwaves in an area around you. Enemies hit by the shockwave lose Armour for a duration. While Channelling Resonating Shield, your Shield is raised and you will Block all incoming Blockable hits.

SkillGemManaRemnants.name: Mana Remnants
SkillGemManaRemnants.description: Conjure surging arcane energy to restore your Mana. While active, enemies you kill affected by Elemental Ailments have a chance to spawn a Mana Remnant, and Critically Hitting a target with Elemental Ailments spawns a Mana Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Mana Remnant grants you Mana which can Overflow maximum Mana.

SkillGemSanguineRevelry.name: Sanguine Revelry
SkillGemSanguineRevelry.description: Conjure hateful energy to fuel your Rage and Life. While active, Bleeding enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Hateful Remnant, and Hitting a Bleeding target spawns a Hateful Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Hateful Remnant grants you Rage and recovers Life based on your current Rage.

SkillGemMagmaBarrier.name: Magma Barrier
SkillGemMagmaBarrier.description: While active, increases your Block Chance passively and imbues your Shield with lava over time. When fully imbued, your next Block with your Shield raised will expend the lava to Trigger the Magma Spray skill and grant you an Endurance Charge.

SkillGemFreezingShards.name: Freezing Shards
SkillGemFreezingShards.description: Launch icy Projectiles in a sweeping arc. Multiple Projectiles can hit the same enemy.

SkillGemVineArrow.name: Vine Arrow
SkillGemVineArrow.description: Fire an arrow into the air that lands after a short delay, damaging enemies and causing a plant to spring up at the impact location. The plant sprouts vines that latch onto nearby enemies, Slowing their movement speed and dealing Chaos damage over time. The plant can be Poisoned, causing it to deal more damage.

SkillGemRhoaMount.name: Rhoa Mount
SkillGemRhoaMount.description: Harnesses a Companion Rhoa you can mount while you're wielding a Bow or Spear.
