While mounted you can use Bow, thrown Spear, and Mark Skills, and are much less slowed while using Skills, but being Hit will cause Heavy Stun buildup. While you aren't mounted, the Rhoa will attack your enemies alongside you with its beak, but can be damaged.

SupportGemBurstingPlague.name: Bursting Plague
SupportGemBurstingPlague.description: Supports skills that can Poison enemies, causing Poisoned enemies to gain Plague over time and explode in a Plague Burst on death. Cannot support the skills of Minions.

SkillGemCorpseCloud.name: Decompose
SkillGemCorpseCloud.description: Consume a Corpse to create a cloud of flammable Poisonous gas. Any Burning effects or Detonator skills will explode the gas cloud, creating a fiery explosion.

SupportGemFortress.name: Fortress I
SupportGemFortress.description: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage.

SupportGemFortressTwo.name: Fortress II
SupportGemFortressTwo.description: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage and have lowered Area of Effect.

SupportGemAhnsCitadel.name: Ahn's Citadel
SupportGemAhnsCitadel.description: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a fissure.

SupportGemFrostfire.name: Frostfire
SupportGemFrostfire.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Consume Freeze on Igniting a Frozen enemy to boost the effect of the Ignite. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze or Ignite.

SupportGemStormfire.name: Stormfire
SupportGemStormfire.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies. Enemies Shocked by Supported Skills take a percentage of damage from Ignite as Lightning damage as well as Fire damage.

SupportGemOverabundance.name: Overabundance I
SupportGemOverabundance.description: Supports Skills which have a Limit, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".

SupportGemOverabundanceTwo.name: Overabundance II
SupportGemOverabundanceTwo.description: Supports Skills which have a Limit, increasing that Limit at the cost of their duration. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit".

SupportGemOverabundanceThree.name: Overabundance III
SupportGemOverabundanceThree.description: Supports Skills which have a Limit, doubling that Limit, but Cursing yourself on Supported Skill use. Only applies to restrictions that use the word "Limit". Cannot support Persistent Skills.

SupportGemElectrocute.name: Electrocute
SupportGemElectrocute.description: Supports any Skill which can deal Damage. Lightning Damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Shock.

SupportGemEonyrsThunder.name: Eonyr's Thunder
SupportGemEonyrsThunder.description: Supports any Skill which can deal damage. Lightning damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Shock. Enemies slain while Electrocuted by Supported Skills explode, dealing a percentage of their maximum Life as Lightning damage.

SkillGemRagingSpirits.name: Raging Spirits
SkillGemRagingSpirits.description: While active, Fire Spells you use yourself will also summon Raging Spirits, which are short-lived flaming skulls that rush at nearby enemies and rapidly Attack them, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them.

SupportGemEnergyBarrier.name: Energy Barrier
SupportGemEnergyBarrier.description: Supports any skill that you can use, causing Energy Shield recharge to begin immediately if you are Stunned while using it.

SupportGemWindWave.name: Wind Wave
SupportGemWindWave.description: Supports any skill that you can use, triggering a blast of wind that Knocks Back enemies if you are Stunned while using it.

SupportGemBitingFrost.name: Biting Frost I
SupportGemBitingFrost.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

SupportGemBitingFrostTwo.name: Biting Frost II
SupportGemBitingFrostTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze, leaving them Chilled. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

SupportGemElementalDischarge.name: Elemental Discharge
SupportGemElementalDischarge.description: Supports any Spell that Hits enemies, causing it to Consume Elemental Ailments on hit to trigger an Elemental Discharge. Cannot support the skills of Minions or skills which already Consume Elemental Ailments.

SupportGemHourglass.name: Hourglass
SupportGemHourglass.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use yourself, causing it to deal significantly more damage but gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

SupportGemFieryDeath.name: Fiery Death
SupportGemFieryDeath.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it Ignites to have a chance to explode on death.

SkillGemTwister.name: Twister
SkillGemTwister.description: Whip up a twister with a flick of your Spear. The twister moves forward erratically, Blinding and repeatedly Hitting enemies within. If a twister touches a Whirlwind from your other skills, it Consumes the Whirlwind to create additional twisters that deal more damage. Passing over Elemental Ground Surfaces or Consuming an elemental Whirlwind will grant twisters extra damage of that element.

SkillGemDetonateMinion.name: Detonate Minion
SkillGemDetonateMinion.description: Detonate an allied Minion whose current Life is below a threshold, dealing heavy Attack damage to nearby enemies.

SkillGemExplosiveSpear.name: Explosive Spear
SkillGemExplosiveSpear.description: Hurl a single payload Spear that pierces through enemies and lodges in terrain where it lands. The Spear will explode at the end of its Detonation Time or if Detonated. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if you have one to explode immediately, dealing more damage in a cross-shaped area and creating Ignited Ground.

SkillGemSpearWindVortex.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Spear Vortex
SkillGemSpearWindVortex.description: DNT-UNUSED Performs a sweeping Spear Attack which draws Enemies in range closer to you.

SkillGemElementalSiphon.name: Elemental Siphon
SkillGemElementalSiphon.description: Dash to an enemy and nullify their Resistance. Hitting an enemy with positive Elemental Resistance will reduce their highest Elemental Resistance to 0 for a duration and triggers Infuse Weapon, granting your Spear the maximum possible Surges corresponding to the removed Resistance. If this skill doesn't remove any Resistances, its cooldown is reset. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.

SkillGemThunderousLeap.name: Thunderous Leap
SkillGemThunderousLeap.description: Leap into the air and plunge your Spear into the ground at the target location, emitting a Lightning-charged shockwave.

SkillGemWindDancer.name: Wind Dancer
SkillGemWindDancer.description: While active, periodically grants stages of a buff that gives you more Evasion per stage. Being Hit by an Enemy while you have this buff consumes all stages to damage and Knock Back enemies around you.

SupportGemDeadlyHeralds.name: Deadly Herald
SupportGemDeadlyHeralds.description: Supports Herald Skills, making their triggered effects deal more damage at the expense of higher Spirit cost.

SupportGemInfusion.name: Infusion
SupportGemInfusion.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, making the Buff they grant more powerful.

SupportGemManaFlare.name: Mana Flare
SupportGemManaFlare.description: Supports any Spell that Hits enemies, causing it to trigger a Mana Flare on Critical Hit. The Mana Flare consumes your Mana to deal Fire damage. Cannot support the skills of Minions.

SupportGemLockdown.name: Lockdown
SupportGemLockdown.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing any Pin buildup it inflicts to be stronger the closer the enemy is to you.

SupportGemOverpower.name: Stun I
SupportGemOverpower.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

SupportGemOverpowerTwo.name: Stun II
SupportGemOverpowerTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun more quickly.

SupportGemOverpowerThree.name: Stun III
SupportGemOverpowerThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to build up Stun significantly more quickly, at the cost of Damage.

SupportGemMobility.name: Mobility
SupportGemMobility.description: Supports skills that can be used while moving, allowing you to move faster while using them.

SupportGemPin.name: Pin I
SupportGemPin.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun.

SupportGemPinTwo.name: Pin II
SupportGemPinTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun, as well as granting Critial Hit Chance against Immobilised enemies.

SupportGemPinThree.name: Pin III
SupportGemPinThree.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing its Physical damage to Pin enemies but making it unable to Stun. Pin buildup caused by Supported Skill is lessened, but Pin duration is significantly longer.

SupportGemAmbush.name: Ambush
SupportGemAmbush.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Critically Hit enemies on full life.

SkillGemProfaneRitual.name: Profane Ritual
SkillGemProfaneRitual.description: Mark a Corpse with a profane rune, dealing Chaos damage over time to nearby enemies. When the ritual is complete the Corpse is consumed and you gain a Power Charge.

SkillGemSoulOffering.name: Soul Offering
SkillGemSoulOffering.description: Skewer a Skeleton on a bone spike, granting you a powerful Spell damage Buff as long as the spike remains. Does not affect your Minions.  The bone spike is itself a Minion. If it dies, the effect ends immediately.

SkillGemDarkEffigy.name: Dark Effigy
SkillGemDarkEffigy.description: Raise a Totem that bombards enemies afflicted by Chaos damage over time Debuffs.

SupportGemBounty.name: Bounty I
SupportGemBounty.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

SupportGemBountyTwo.name: Bounty II
SupportGemBountyTwo.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

SupportGemManaBounty.name: Mana Bounty
SupportGemManaBounty.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Mana Flask charges.

SupportGemLifeBounty.name: Life Bounty
SupportGemLifeBounty.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing enemies it kills to grant more Life Flask charges.

SkillGemSkeletalWarriorWeaponSkill.name: Skeletal Warrior
SkillGemSkeletalWarriorWeaponSkill.description: Activate to summon Reviving Skeletal Warriors.

SupportGemMinionInstability.name: Minion Instability
SupportGemMinionInstability.description: Supports skills which create Minions, causing them to violently explode when reduced to Low Life.

SupportGemBreakEndurance.name: Break Endurance
SupportGemBreakEndurance.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when it Fully Breaks an enemy's Armour.

SupportGemHeightenedCurse.name: Heightened Curse
SupportGemHeightenedCurse.description: Supports Curse Skills, magnifying their power.

SupportGemCorpseConservation.name: Corpse Conservation
SupportGemCorpseConservation.description: Supports skills that consume Corpses, giving them a chance to take effect without destroying the Corpse.

SupportGemDecayingHex.name: Decaying Hex
SupportGemDecayingHex.description: Supports Curse skills. Supported skill Trigger Profane Decay on each target they curse to inflict a damaging Debuff.

SupportGemFocusedCurse.name: Focused Curse
SupportGemFocusedCurse.description: Supports Curse skills, causing them to Curse enemies more quickly after being cast.

SupportGemRitualisticCurse.name: Ritualistic Curse
SupportGemRitualisticCurse.description: Supports Curse skills, causing them to cover a larger area but take longer to Curse enemies.

SupportGemMinionPact.name: Minion Pact I
SupportGemMinionPact.description: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.

SupportGemMinionPactTwo.name: Minion Pact II
SupportGemMinionPactTwo.description: Supports damaging skills you use yourself, draining the life from one of your Minions on use in order to boost the skill's damage. Only takes effect if you have a Minion with enough life to drain the full amount.

SupportGemLastGasp.name: Last Gasp
SupportGemLastGasp.description: Supports Skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a short duration.

SupportGemTecrodsRevenge.name: Tecrod's Revenge
SupportGemTecrodsRevenge.description: Supports Skills that create Persistent Minions, causing those Minions to fight on when they are fatally wounded, dying after a duration. Minions from Supported Skills gain Soul Eater and a burst of speed on entering this state.

SupportGemLifeDrain.name: Life Drain
SupportGemLifeDrain.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Life when it Culls an enemy.

SupportGemSoulDrain.name: Soul Drain
SupportGemSoulDrain.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing you to recover Mana when it Culls an enemy.

SkillGemGrimFeast.name: Grim Feast
SkillGemGrimFeast.description: While active, your Reviving Minions store a percentage of their maximum Life in a collectible Grim Remnant on death. Using Grim Resurrection Consumes the Life you've collected to Revive up to that much total Life of dead Minions.

SupportGemInnervate.name: Innervate
SupportGemInnervate.description: Supports damaging skills you use yourself. Killing a Shocked enemy with supported skills imbues your damage with Lightning damage for a short time.

SkillGemCastOnMinionDeath.name: Cast on Minion Death
SkillGemCastOnMinionDeath.description: While active, gains Energy when one of your Persistent Minions is Killed, and triggers socketed Spells upon reaching maximum Energy. Very underlevelled Minions will incur an Energy generation penalty. Cannot socket Spells which create Minions.

SupportGemComorbidity.name: Escalating Poison
SupportGemComorbidity.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, allowing it to inflict an extra Poison on enemies but shortening the duration of those Poisons.

SupportGemProfusion.name: Charge Profusion I
SupportGemProfusion.description: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so.

SupportGemProfusionTwo.name: Charge Profusion II
SupportGemProfusionTwo.description: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so, as well as a chance to generate an additional Charge of a random type.

SupportGemPremeditation.name: Premeditation
SupportGemPremeditation.description: Supports skills that can Empower skills other than themselves, causing skills they Empower to deal more damage.

SupportGemMurderousIntent.name: Murderous Intent
SupportGemMurderousIntent.description: Supports skills that can Empower skills other than themselves, causing skills they Empower to Cull enemies.

SkillGemScavengedPlating.name: Scavenged Plating
SkillGemScavengedPlating.description: While active, uses fragments of armour scavenged from enemies to bolster your own. Fully Breaking an enemy's Armour grants you stacks of Scavenged Plating for a duration based on the enemy's Rarity, and you gain Armour and Thorns per stack. Normal enemies grant 1 stack, Magic enemies grant 2 stacks, Rare enemies grant 5 stacks and Unique enemies grant 10 stacks.

SkillGemManaDrain.name: Mana Drain
SkillGemManaDrain.description: Leech Mana from an enemy over a prolonged period, as well as briefly Hindering them.

SkillGemBoneBlast.name: Bone Blast
SkillGemBoneBlast.description: Conjure a circle of ritual inscriptions that last for a short duration. When the duration ends, spikes of bone erupt from enemies in the area, damaging them and potentially causing Bleeding.

SkillGemBlink.name: Blink
SkillGemBlink.description: While active, replaces your dodge roll with a short-cooldown Spell that allows you to tunnel through space, instantly reappearing a medium distance away.

SkillGemBlackPowderBlitz.name: Black Powder Blitz
SkillGemBlackPowderBlitz.description: Replaces your dodge roll with an explosive-assisted leap, firing off a round from your prosthetic cannon leg that Blinds and Ignites enemies in the area you escape from. The explosion will cause any Grenades in its area of effect to also explode.

SkillGemMoltenBlast.name: Molten Blast
SkillGemMoltenBlast.description: Gouge molten rock from the ground and fling it at the target. The Projectile explodes on collision, damaging enemies and scattering shrapnel in a cone behind it.

SkillGemMalice.name: Malice
SkillGemMalice.description: While active, emits an Aura that continuously inflicts Critical Weakness on enemies in your Presence.

SkillGemHydra.name: Hydra Familiar
SkillGemHydra.description: While active, a companion Hydra will rear up from your body and regularly cast socketed Projectile Spells at nearby Shocked, Frozen, and Ignited enemies.

SkillGemHammerOfTheGods.name: Hammer of the Gods
SkillGemHammerOfTheGods.description: Build Glory by Heavy Stunning enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may entreat the Ancestors to crush your enemies, manifesting a massive hammer that falls from the sky onto your target, Slamming into the ground after a short duration and dealing immense damage based on your weapon.

SkillGemLivingBombPlayer.name: Living Bomb
SkillGemLivingBombPlayer.description: Plant a seed of Fire inside an enemy. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes the seed to explode, dealing damage in an area and leaving behind a Fire Infusion Remnant.

SkillGemAbyssalLivingBomb.name: Untether
SkillGemAbyssalLivingBomb.description: Plant a seed of Abyssal Energy on the enemy's heart. Dealing enough damage to the enemy, or killing it outright, causes their heart to explode, dealing Physical damage in an area.

SkillGemStampede.name: Stampede
SkillGemStampede.description: Charges forward, cracking the earth and leaving a patch of Jagged Ground with every footstep. At the end of your charge, a massive leaping Slam damages enemies and causes all nearby patches of Jagged Ground to explode, damaging enemies standing on them. Once you begin your charge, the use speed of this Skill is affected by movement speed instead of Attack speed.

SkillGemShieldWall.name: Shield Wall
SkillGemShieldWall.description: Ram your Shield into the ground, throwing up a wall of earth. Enemies can attack your wall segments, and your Slams, Warcries, and Shield Charge will instantly shatter them all. The segments explode when shattered, damaging enemies in front of and around them.

SkillGemFortifyingCry.name: Fortifying Cry
SkillGemFortifyingCry.description: Perform a Warcry that grants Guard and Triggers Shield Wave when subsequent Shield Attacks deal damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

SkillGemEmberFusillade.name: Ember Fusillade
SkillGemEmberFusillade.description: Conjure a blazing Ember that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Ember launches at an enemy, dealing Fire damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Embers. Multiple Embers fired in the same Fusillade will attempt to target different enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to cause the entire Fusillade to create beams that Chain to enemies.

SkillGemScatteringCalamity.name: His Scattering Calamity
SkillGemScatteringCalamity.description: Conjure a crackling Wellsprite that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Wellsprite launches at an enemy, dealing Lightning damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Wellsprites.

SkillGemHighVelocityRounds.name: High Velocity Rounds
SkillGemHighVelocityRounds.description: Load your Crossbow with Piercing bolts that apply Riven Armour to enemies with Fully Broken Armour, causing any Hits against those enemies to deal extra damage.

SkillGemFragmentationRounds.name: Fragmentation Rounds
SkillGemFragmentationRounds.description: Load your Crossbow with Piercing bolts that fragment in flight. Bolts that hit a Frozen enemy Consume the Freeze and cause an explosion of shrapnel. Bolts that hit an Ice Crystal cause it to explode. These fragments can Merge.

SkillGemSiegeCascade.name: Siege Cascade
SkillGemSiegeCascade.description: Load your Crossbow with enemy-seeking payloads which are fired into the air, dropping a bolt near every enemy in the target area. These bolts lodge in the ground and explode after a short delay.

SkillGemArmourPiercingRounds.name: Armour Piercing Rounds
SkillGemArmourPiercingRounds.description: Load your Crossbow with a clip of bolts that can be fired rapidly and Break enemy Armour. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.

SkillGemExplosiveShot.name: Explosive Shot
SkillGemExplosiveShot.description: Load your Crossbow with flaming bolts that explode on impact. The explosion will cause any Grenades in its area of effect to also explode.

SkillGemIncendiaryShot.name: Incendiary Shot
SkillGemIncendiaryShot.description: Load your Crossbow with flaming bolts that fragment in flight, damaging and Igniting enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. These fragments can Merge.

SkillGemRapidShot.name: Rapid Shot
SkillGemRapidShot.description: Load your Crossbow with a large clip of heated bolts. Heat builds up on your Crossbow as you fire them, and reaching maximum Heat will prevent you from firing or reloading these bolts for a short time. However, other Skills can Consume Heat for extra benefits. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.

SkillGemGlacialBolt.name: Glacial Bolt
SkillGemGlacialBolt.description: Load your Crossbow with icy bolts that create two walls of Ice Crystals at the end of their flight.

SkillGemPermafrostBolts.name: Permafrost Bolts
SkillGemPermafrostBolts.description: Load your Crossbow with icy bolts that fragment in flight, damaging enemies on hit and in a small cone behind their final target. The icy coating on the bolts makes them extremely potent at Freezing enemies. These fragments can Merge.

SkillGemHailstormRounds.name: Hailstorm Rounds
SkillGemHailstormRounds.description: Passively generate bolts of ice at a frequency equal to reload time, up to a cap. Activate to Load the accumulated bolts into your Crossbow. All loaded bolts are fired at once, causing them to rain down over the target area.

SkillGemIceShards.name: Ice Shards
SkillGemIceShards.description: Load your Crossbow with a clip of icy bolts that rapidly fire at the ground, leaving a shard of ice at the impact location that arms after a duration. After arming, the ice shards explode when enemies step on them, dealing more damage the longer they have been armed, up to a maximum. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.

SkillGemPlasmaBlast.name: Plasma Blast
SkillGemPlasmaBlast.description: Load your Crossbow with unstable bolts that require a lengthy charging period to fire but deal devastating damage, Pierce through enemies, and explode upon hitting terrain. Additional Projectiles are fired in a spread, unlike other Crossbow Skills.

SkillGemGalvanicShards.name: Galvanic Shards
SkillGemGalvanicShards.description: Load your Crossbow with charged bolts that fragment in flight, releasing Chaining Lightning beams when they Hit enemies. These fragments can Merge.

SkillGemStormblastBolts.name: Stormblast Bolts
SkillGemStormblastBolts.description: Load your Crossbow with charged bolts that land around the target location and explode if hit by a Detonator Skill. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.

SkillGemShockburstRounds.name: Shockburst Rounds
SkillGemShockburstRounds.description: Load your Crossbow with a clip of charged bolts which release damaging pulses upon Hitting an enemy affected by a Lightning Ailment. Using this Skill again reloads the clip.

SupportGemRagingCry.name: Raging Cry
SupportGemRagingCry.description: Supports Warcry skills, causing them to grant you Rage on use depending on counted monster Power.

SupportGemDemolisher.name: Armour Demolisher I
SupportGemDemolisher.description: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger.

SupportGemDemolisherTwo.name: Armour Demolisher II
SupportGemDemolisherTwo.description: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger.

SupportGemUruksSmelting.name: Uruk's Smelting
SupportGemUruksSmelting.description: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger. Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills permanently increases the Physical Damage taken by those affected, up to a cap.

SupportGemRageforged.name: Rageforged I
SupportGemRageforged.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use or Trigger yourself, causing it to spend Rage to deal more damage. If you don't have enough Rage to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

SupportGemRageforgedTwo.name: Rageforged II
SupportGemRageforgedTwo.description: Supports any damaging skill that you use or Trigger yourself, causing it to spend Rage to deal more damage, with a chance to skip spending Rage while still benefitting as though it had. If you don't have enough Rage to spend, the damage bonus will not apply.

SkillGemPlayerDefaultSpearThrow.name: Spear Throw
SkillGemPlayerDefaultSpearThrow.description: Hurl your Spear with force. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if you have one to cause the Spear to explode at the end of its flight.

SkillGemPlayerDefaultBow.name: Bow Shot
SkillGemPlayerDefaultBow.description: Fire an arrow with your Bow.

SkillGemPlayerDefaultCrossbow.name: Crossbow Shot
SkillGemPlayerDefaultCrossbow.description: Fire a bolt from your crossbow.

SkillGemPlayerDefaultGrenadeLauncher.name: Grenade
SkillGemPlayerDefaultGrenadeLauncher.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that unleashes a shrapnel blast when its fuse expires.

SkillGemPlaytestAttack.name: Playtest Attack
SkillGemPlaytestAttack.description: Strike your foes down with a powerful blow using a melee weapon.

SkillGemPlaytestSlam.name: Playtest Slam
SkillGemPlaytestSlam.description: Jump into the air, damaging enemies where you land.

SkillGemPlaytestSpell.name: Playtest Spell
SkillGemPlaytestSpell.description: Launch a fiery Projectile towards a target.

SkillGemAscendancyLifeRemnants.name: Life Remnants
SkillGemAscendancyLifeRemnants.description: Drink the blood of your enemies to restore your Life. While active, enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Life Remnant, and Hitting a target spawns a Life Remnant every few seconds. Picking up a Life Remnant grants you Life which can Overflow maximum Life.

SkillGemAscendancyExplosiveConcoction.name: Explosive Concoction
SkillGemAscendancyExplosiveConcoction.description: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Fire Attack damage in an area. Additional smaller flasks are thrown at nearby Ignited Enemies. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack

SkillGemAscendancyFulminatingConcoction.name: Fulminating Concoction
SkillGemAscendancyFulminatingConcoction.description: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Lightning Attack damage in an area with high chance to Shock. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack

SkillGemAscendancyShatteringConcoction.name: Shattering Concoction
SkillGemAscendancyShatteringConcoction.description: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Cold Attack damage in an area and inflicting Exposure. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack

SkillGemAscendancyPoisonousConcoction.name: Acidic Concoction
SkillGemAscendancyPoisonousConcoction.description: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Physical Attack damage in an area. The thrown flask Consumes Poison on Hit to cause an acidic burst. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack

SkillGemAscendancyBleedingConcoction.name: Bleeding Concoction
SkillGemAscendancyBleedingConcoction.description: Consume charges from your Mana Flask to throw a flask that explodes, dealing Physical Attack damage in an area and Aggravating Bleeding on Enemies hit. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an Unarmed Attack

SkillGemAscendancyMeditate.name: Meditate
SkillGemAscendancyMeditate.description: Channel to Recharge Energy Shield and allow that Recharge to Overflow. Channelling ends when you take damage or your Energy Shield is fully Overflowed.

SkillGemAscendancyElementalStorm.name: Elemental Storm
SkillGemAscendancyElementalStorm.description: Create a stationary Fire, Cold or Lightning storm at a target location for a duration, based on the highest Elemental Damage type for the Hit that Triggered the storm. Hits which do not deal Elemental Damage will not Trigger the storm.

SkillGemAscendancyUnboundAvatar.name: Unbound Avatar
SkillGemAscendancyUnboundAvatar.description: Gain Unbound Fury by inflicting Elemental Ailments with Hits on enemies. Once you reach maximum Unbound Fury, consume it to become Unbound for a duration, vastly augmenting your Elemental prowess.

SkillGemAscendancySummonInfernalHound.name: Summon Infernal Hound
SkillGemAscendancySummonInfernalHound.description: Activate to summon a Reviving Infernal Hound which Ignites enemies near it.

SkillGemAscendancySummonWaterDjinn.name: Navira, the Last Mirage
SkillGemAscendancySummonWaterDjinn.description: Summon Navira, an invulnerable Water Djinn Minion to do your bidding. Navira will only act when you Command her to do so, bestowing restorative blessings upon you and your Allies with her Spells.

SkillGemAscendancySummonFireDjinn.name: Ruzhan, the Blazing Sword
SkillGemAscendancySummonFireDjinn.description: Summon Ruzhan, an invulnerable Flame Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Ruzhan emerges to Strike enemies with his greatsword whenever you use a damaging Skill, and casts devastating Fire Spells when Commanded to do so.

SkillGemAscendancySummonSandDjinn.name: Kelari, the Tainted Sands
SkillGemAscendancySummonSandDjinn.description: Summon Kelari, an invulnerable Sand Djinn Minion, to do your bidding. Kelari will only act when you Command him to do so. Kelari delivers swift Hits with massive Critical Hit potential.

SkillGemAscendancyCorpseBeetles.name: Kelari's Malediction
SkillGemAscendancyCorpseBeetles.description: Harness Kelari's power to passively Consume Corpses in your Presence, causing Corpse Beetle Minions to burst forth. The Beetles passively follow you until Commanded. On your Command, they rush the target and explode.

SkillGemAscendancyAlignFate.name: Align Fate
SkillGemAscendancyAlignFate.description: While active, visages of yourself from alternate timelines will occasionally appear and cast one of your Spells from your first valid Weapon Set. Until the next visage appears, your next cast of the same Spell aligns your fate, Empowering that Spell. Visages can only cast damaging, non-Channelling, non-Buff Spells you could cast that have no cooldown.

SkillGemAscendancyMomentOfVulnerability.name: Moment of Vulnerability
SkillGemAscendancyMomentOfVulnerability.description: Send out a temporal Nova to take advantage of enemies' moment of vulnerability. Hitting enemies that are Primed for Stun, Electrocution, or Freeze causes a visage of them to appear, lasting as long as the original target would have been affected by the form of Immobilisation used to create the visage. A portion of the damage dealt to visages is also dealt to the original.

SkillGemAscendancyTemporalRift.name: Temporal Rift
SkillGemAscendancyTemporalRift.description: While active, passively leaves afterimages of your recent past. Cast the Spell to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location and resetting your Life, Mana and Energy Shield to the values they had at the time. Removes any upcoming damage delayed by Phased Form on use.

SkillGemAscendancyTimeFreeze.name: Time Freeze
SkillGemAscendancyTimeFreeze.description: Release a large wave that stops time for all affected enemies for a duration. Duration is lower the more times the enemy has had time stopped for them.

SkillGemAscendancyTimeSnap.name: Time Snap
SkillGemAscendancyTimeSnap.description: Manipulate time, resetting the cooldowns of your other Skills.

SkillGemAscendancyEncasedInJade.name: Encase in Jade
SkillGemAscendancyEncasedInJade.description: Consume all stacks of Jade to grant Guard based off your maximum Life for each Jade consumed. You cannot gain Jade stacks while you have Guard.

SkillGemAscendancyDemonForm.name: Demon Form
SkillGemAscendancyDemonForm.description: Shapeshift into a demon, vastly boosting the power of your Spells. You gain Demonflame every second you remain in demon form, causing your Life to be lost at an ever-increasing rate. Maximum 10 Demonflame. Revert to human form if you reach 1 Life, use a Skill that isn't a Spell, or reactivate this Skill.

SkillGemAscendancySorceryWard.name: Sorcery Ward
SkillGemAscendancySorceryWard.description: Passively manifests a protective barrier which takes Elemental Damage from Hits for you until depleted. The barrier instantly recharges to its full value a short time after it stops taking damage or is fully depleted.

SkillGemAscendancyIntoTheBreach.name: Into the Breach
SkillGemAscendancyIntoTheBreach.description: Create a Breach around you, allowing you to see nearby Flames of Chayula. You are considered to be in a Breach while this skill is active.

SkillGemAscendancyAncestralSpirits.name: Ancestral Spirits
SkillGemAscendancyAncestralSpirits.description: This skill is Triggered each time you summon a Totem, summoning an Ancestral Spirit Minion to fight for you. If the Totem dies then the Ancestral Spirit triggered by it's summoning will die too.

SkillGemAscendancyRitualSacrifice.name: Ritual Sacrifice
SkillGemAscendancyRitualSacrifice.description: Sacrifice the Corpse of a Rare Monster to grant you its Modifiers for a duration, or gain a single random Modifier at the cost of your own life force.

SkillGemAscendancyBloodBoil.name: Blood Boil
SkillGemAscendancyBloodBoil.description: Enemies in your Presence accumulate blood boils periodically. When they die, the boils pop applying Corrupted Blood to enemies near them.

SkillGemAscendancyVividStampede.name: Vivid Stampede
SkillGemAscendancyVividStampede.description: Call upon Spirits of the Stag, sending them leaping forward. Each Stag releases a damaging shockwave each time it lands, and any Stags that travel the maximum possible distance also leave behind Shocked Ground.

SkillGemWildProtector.name: Wild Protector
SkillGemWildProtector.description: Call upon a Bear Spirit Companion to maul your foes. The Bear Spirit leaps at enemies to Maim them, Leeches Life with its slam, and periodically roars to Intimidate enemies. The Bear Spirit does not count toward your Companion limit.

SkillGemAscendancyHollowForm.name: Hollow Form
SkillGemAscendancyHollowForm.description: Channel to create fleeting images of your astral self near the target location. The images perform a Socketed Melee Attack once then vanish, targeting the closest enemy if possible. The images cannot perform Channelled Skills or Conditional Skills. Consuming a Power Charge creates additional images.

SkillGemAscendancyHollowFocus.name: Hollow Focus
SkillGemAscendancyHollowFocus.description: While active, ethereal bells periodically appear near you. Your Hits immediately destroy the bells, creating a shockwave that damages nearby enemies and causes a Heavy Stun on enemies that are Primed for Stun. The bells are themselves always Primed for Stun, they can be Culled, and Hits against them are always Critical Hits.

SkillGemAscendancyHollowResonance.name: Hollow Resonance
SkillGemAscendancyHollowResonance.description: Attaches an ethereal bell to your back. Critical Hits with other Skills will cause the bell to ring out, damaging nearby enemies.

SkillGemAscendancyMirageDeadeye.name: Mirage Deadeye
SkillGemAscendancyMirageDeadeye.description: While active, firing a ranged Projectile Attack will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.

SkillGemAscendancyInevitableAgony.name: Inevitable Agony
SkillGemAscendancyInevitableAgony.description: Debuff all targets in an area, causing a portion of Damage they take from Hits to be tracked by the Debuff. When the debuff's duration expires or can kill the target, the target loses life equal to that tracked damage all at once.

SkillGemAscendanyMetaDeadeyeMarks.name: Called Shots
SkillGemAscendanyMetaDeadeyeMarks.description: Applies a socketed Mark Skill to a nearby unmarked Enemy every few seconds. Consuming socketed Marks will cause them to be reapplied to an unmarked Enemy. This reapplication can happen at most once every few seconds.

SkillGemAscendancyFireSpellOnHit.name: Fire Spell on Hit
SkillGemAscendancyFireSpellOnHit.description: While active, gains Energy when you Hit enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed Fire spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemAscendancyManifestWeapon.name: Manifest Weapon
SkillGemAscendancyManifestWeapon.description: Manifest a copy of your main hand Melee Martial Weapon as an immortal Companion to fight by your side. In addition to its standard Strikes, the Manifested Weapon gains an additional Attack depending on its weapon type.

SkillGemAscendancyTemperWeapon.name: Temper Weapon
SkillGemAscendancyTemperWeapon.description: Channel to temper your main hand Melee Martial Weapon. Each hit of the hammer against the anvil Empowers subsequent Attacks to Combust when Hitting enemies.

SkillGemAscendancySupportingFire.name: Supporting Fire
SkillGemAscendancySupportingFire.description: Recruit artillery Minions that take up positions behind you. They will lie in wait for your Command, then fire volleys of arrows at the target location.

SkillGemAscendancyUnleash.name: Unleash
SkillGemAscendancyUnleash.description: Augment yourself with temporal magic for a short duration, Empowering the next Repeatable Spell you cast to Repeat multiple times. Cannot Empower Skills with a Cooldown.

SkillGemAscendancyVoidIllusion.name: Void Illusion
SkillGemAscendancyVoidIllusion.description: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will cause damaging explosions. Copies created this way have 1 Life.

SupportGemArmourExplosion.name: Armour Explosion
SupportGemArmourExplosion.description: Supports Attacks and Warcries, causing them to trigger a Fiery explosion when they Fully Break an enemy's Armour.

SupportGemStompingGround.name: Stomping Ground
SupportGemStompingGround.description: Supports Travel skills, causing your footsteps to crack the earth and emit damaging shockwaves while using the skill.

SupportGemCrescendo.name: Crescendo I
SupportGemCrescendo.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, allowing you to use the Final Strike twice in succession.

SupportGemCrescendoTwo.name: Crescendo II
SupportGemCrescendoTwo.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, allowing you to use the Final Strike twice in succession, and causing Non-Final Strike Attacks to be faster.

SupportGemCrescendoThree.name: Crescendo III
SupportGemCrescendoThree.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the Final Strike to be Ancestrally Boosted.

SupportGemFireExposure.name: Fire Exposure
SupportGemFireExposure.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when Igniting.

SupportGemLightningExposure.name: Lightning Exposure
SupportGemLightningExposure.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when inflicting Shock.

SupportGemColdExposure.name: Cold Exposure
SupportGemColdExposure.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Exposure when it Critically Hits an enemy.

SupportGemDeadlyPoison.name: Deadly Poison I
SupportGemDeadlyPoison.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.

SupportGemDeadlyPoisonTwo.name: Deadly Poison II
SupportGemDeadlyPoisonTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.

SupportGemDeepCuts.name: Deep Cuts I
SupportGemDeepCuts.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

SupportGemDeepCutsTwo.name: Deep Cuts II
SupportGemDeepCutsTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

SupportGemCorruptingCry.name: Corrupting Cry I
SupportGemCorruptingCry.description: Supports Warcries, Triggering Corrupted Cry to inflict Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect.

SupportGemCorruptingCryTwo.name: Corrupting Cry II
SupportGemCorruptingCryTwo.description: Supports Warcries, Triggering Corrupted Cry to inflict Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect.

SupportGemCorruptingCryThree.name: Paquate's Pact
SupportGemCorruptingCryThree.description: Supports Warcries, Triggering Twisted Pact  to inflict Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect., at the cost of your Life.

SupportGemWindowOfOpportunity.name: Window of Opportunity I
SupportGemWindowOfOpportunity.description: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.

SupportGemWindowOfOpportunityTwo.name: Window of Opportunity II
SupportGemWindowOfOpportunityTwo.description: Supports Channelling skills that have special effects if released with Perfect Timing, causing them to deal much more damage and grant Perfect Deflection if released with Perfect Timing but reducing the Perfect Timing window.

SupportGemFireMastery.name: Fire Mastery
SupportGemFireMastery.description: Supports Fire skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemColdMastery.name: Cold Mastery
SupportGemColdMastery.description: Supports Cold skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemLightningMastery.name: Lightning Mastery
SupportGemLightningMastery.description: Supports Lightning skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemChaosMastery.name: Chaos Mastery
SupportGemChaosMastery.description: Supports Chaos skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemPhysicalMastery.name: Physical Mastery
SupportGemPhysicalMastery.description: Supports Physical skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemMinionMastery.name: Minion Mastery
SupportGemMinionMastery.description: Supports Minion skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SkillGemShockchainArrow.name: Shockchain Arrow
SkillGemShockchainArrow.description: Fire a Lightning-charged arrow that homes in on enemies afflicted by Lightning Ailments. Hitting such an enemy will cause your arrow to release a damaging shockwave and Chain towards nearby targets, with those Chaining Hits also releasing a shockwave. After the final Chain, the arrow lodges into the ground as a Lightning Rod. Consumes Shock from enemies it Hits, but not Electrocution.

SkillGemVaultingImpact.name: Vaulting Impact
SkillGemVaultingImpact.description: Leap forward and Slam the ground, sending out a shockwave. The shockwave applies Broken Stance to Dazed enemies, causing any Hits against those enemies to deal extra damage.

SkillGemStormWave.name: Storm Wave
SkillGemStormWave.description: Sweep your Quarterstaff, projecting a bolt of Lightning through the ground in a long fissure ahead of you.

SkillGemMantraOfDestruction.name: Mantra of Destruction
SkillGemMantraOfDestruction.description:
Build Combo by successfully Striking Enemies with other skills. After reaching maximum Combo, use this skill to Empower your next Quarterstaff Attack, causing it to deal additional Chaos damage. Each kill with the Empowered Attack grants
Purple Flames of Chayula for a duration.

SupportGemSwiftAffliction.name: Swift Affliction I
SupportGemSwiftAffliction.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing it to deal more non-Ailment damage over time but have a shorter duration.

SupportGemSwiftAfflictionTwo.name: Swift Affliction II
SupportGemSwiftAfflictionTwo.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing it to deal more non-Ailment damage over time but have a shorter duration.

SupportGemSwiftAfflictionThree.name: Swift Affliction III
SupportGemSwiftAfflictionThree.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, causing effects with a duration of one second or less to deal more non-Ailment damage over time.

SupportGemIntenseAgony.name: Intense Agony
SupportGemIntenseAgony.description: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment damage over time, causing them to have a shorter duration but deal substantially more damage over time with Debuffs inflicted against enemies on full life.

SupportGemDrainAilments.name: Drain Ailments
SupportGemDrainAilments.description: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment damage over time, causing them to consume Ailments on enemies it applies damage over time Debuffs to in order to deal substantially more damage over time.

SupportGemChaoticFreeze.name: Chaotic Freeze
SupportGemChaoticFreeze.description: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment Chaos damage over time. Enemies taking damage over time from Debuffs caused by supported skills will suffer Freeze build up from Chaos damage Hits from any source. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemHinder.name: Hinder
SupportGemHinder.description: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment Chaos damage over time, causing damage over time they inflict to also Hinder enemies. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemFusillade.name: Fusillade
SupportGemFusillade.description: DNT-UNUSED Supports Bow Attacks you use yourself. Supported Attacks fire multiple projectiles into the air,

SupportGemComboFinisher.name: Combo Finisher I
SupportGemComboFinisher.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo.

SupportGemComboFinisherTwo.name: Combo Finisher II
SupportGemComboFinisherTwo.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal massively more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo.

SupportGemAilithLineage.name: Ailith's Chimes
SupportGemAilithLineage.description: Supports Skills which can expend Combo. On expending Combo with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain Power Charges based on the amount of Combo expended.

SupportGemEncumbrance.name: Slow Potency
SupportGemEncumbrance.description: Supports any skill, causing inflicted Slows to be more powerful.

SupportGemPrecision.name: Precision I
SupportGemPrecision.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.

SupportGemPrecisionTwo.name: Precision II
SupportGemPrecisionTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Accuracy while the Skill is active.

SupportGemClarity.name: Clarity I
SupportGemClarity.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.

SupportGemClarityTwo.name: Clarity II
SupportGemClarityTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.

SupportGemVitality.name: Vitality I
SupportGemVitality.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

SupportGemVitalityTwo.name: Vitality II
SupportGemVitalityTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain Life Regeneration while the Skill is active.

SupportGemHerbalism.name: Herbalism I
SupportGemHerbalism.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Life recovery from Flasks while the Skill is active.

SupportGemHerbalismTwo.name: Herbalism II
SupportGemHerbalismTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Life recovery from Flasks while the Skill is active.

SupportGemCannibalism.name: Cannibalism I
SupportGemCannibalism.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to recover Life on kill while the Skill is active.

SupportGemCannibalismTwo.name: Cannibalism II
SupportGemCannibalismTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to recover Life on kill while the Skill is active.

SkillGemCorpsewadeCorpseCloud.name: Decompose
SkillGemCorpsewadeCorpseCloud.description: Consume a Corpse to create a cloud of flammable Poisonous gas. Any Burning effects or Detonator skills will explode the gas cloud, creating a fiery explosion.

SupportGemSoulbreaker.name: Soulbreaker
SupportGemSoulbreaker.description: Supports skills you use yourself, causing them to Trigger a Chaos Damage nova when breaking Enemy Energy Shield.

SupportGemRupture.name: Rupture
SupportGemRupture.description: Supports skills that Hit Enemies. Supported skills Aggravate Bleeding on Hitting Heavily Stunned Enemies.

SupportGemCullingStrike.name: Culling Strike I
SupportGemCullingStrike.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit.

SupportGemCullingStrikeTwo.name: Culling Strike II
SupportGemCullingStrikeTwo.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit, and increasing the threshold at which they will Cull Enemies.

SupportGemSpellCascade.name: Spell Cascade
SupportGemSpellCascade.description: Supports Cascadable Spells, causing them to Cascade to either side of the target area, along a randomly chosen axis.

SupportGemSplinter.name: Armour Break I
SupportGemSplinter.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

SupportGemSplinterTwo.name: Armour Break II
SupportGemSplinterTwo.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt. On Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain an Endurance Charge.

SupportGemSplinterThree.name: Armour Break III
SupportGemSplinterThree.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt. On Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain an Endurance Charge.

SupportGemLongshot.name: Longshot I
SupportGemLongshot.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage from farther away.

SupportGemLongshotTwo.name: Longshot II
SupportGemLongshotTwo.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage from farther away.

SupportGemDiscombobulate.name: Daze
SupportGemDiscombobulate.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to build up Daze based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

SupportGemBreakPosture.name: Break Posture
SupportGemBreakPosture.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Daze Enemies when they fully Break Armour.

SupportGemDazingCry.name: Dazing Cry
SupportGemDazingCry.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to Daze Enemies on use.

SupportGemCursedGround.name: Cursed Ground
SupportGemCursedGround.description: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse Enemies so long as they are within them.

SupportGemDoedresUndoing.name: Doedre's Undoing
SupportGemDoedresUndoing.description: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Skills create an area which Curses Enemies within it, and spawns Witchtoads in that area. Witchtoads leap at eneimes that get close, and seek out Cursed enemies with higher aggression. Dark Consequences will be Triggered when they hit enemies with their leap, violently exploding the Witchtoad.

SupportGemHayoxisFulmination.name: Hayoxi's Fulmination
SupportGemHayoxisFulmination.description: Supports Curse Skills, giving them a short cooldown but causing them to create areas which Curse enemies so long as they are within them. Cursed areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.

SupportGemZerphisLegacy.name: Zerphi's Infamy
SupportGemZerphisLegacy.description:
Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Supported Skills gain a Glory requirement, and build Glory when you spend Life on Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage and have significantly
 increased area of effect.

SupportGemHelbrymsHide.name: Helbrym's Hide
SupportGemHelbrymsHide.description: Supports Shapeshifting Skills, causing them to grant Helbrym's Composure for a brief duration when they cause you to Shapeshift. Shapeshifting into a different form before the Buff expires causes it to be removed without effect.

SupportGemPrimalArmament.name: Elemental Armament I
SupportGemPrimalArmament.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Elemental damage.

SupportGemPrimalArmamentTwo.name: Elemental Armament II
SupportGemPrimalArmamentTwo.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Elemental damage.

SupportGemPrimalArmamentThree.name: Elemental Armament III
SupportGemPrimalArmamentThree.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more Damage for each Elemental Ailment on Enemies they Hit. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Elemental Ailments.

SupportGemIngenuity.name: Cooldown Recovery I
SupportGemIngenuity.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

SupportGemIngenuityTwo.name: Cooldown Recovery II
SupportGemIngenuityTwo.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

SkillGemAscendancyElementalExpression.name: Elemental Expression
SkillGemAscendancyElementalExpression.description: Create a fiery explosion, an arcing bolt of lightning, or an icy wave of projectiles. The chance for an explosion is proportional to your Strength, for a bolt proportional to your Dexterity, and for a wave proportional to your Intelligence.

SkillGemIceShot.name: Ice Shot
SkillGemIceShot.description: Fire an icy arrow that sprays a cone of ice shards when it hits a target.

SkillGemWarBanner.name: War Banner
SkillGemWarBanner.description: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Attack damage, Attack speed and Accuracy.

SkillGemDefianceBanner.name: Defiance Banner
SkillGemDefianceBanner.description: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Armour, Evasion and movement speed.

SkillGemDreadBanner.name: Dread Banner
SkillGemDreadBanner.description: While active, Attacking enemies builds Glory. When you have maximum Glory, you can place an inspiring Banner for a duration with an Aura that grants you and nearby Allies Elemental Ailment Threshold, Maximum Elemental Resistances and Flask charges.

SkillGemFreezingMark.name: Freezing Mark
SkillGemFreezingMark.description: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Frozen. When the Marked target is Frozen, the Mark Activates, granting you a Buff which gives extra Cold damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.

SkillGemVoltaicMark.name: Voltaic Mark
SkillGemVoltaicMark.description: Mark a target, making them more susceptible to being Electrocuted. When the Marked target is Electrocuted, the Mark Activates, granting a Buff which gives extra Lightning damage and Consuming the Mark. Marking another target while you have the Buff will remove the Buff.

SkillGemHandOfChayula.name: Hand of Chayula
SkillGemHandOfChayula.description: Dash to an enemy and Strike them, triggering socketed Marks with increased effect and applying socketed Curses with increased duration.

SkillGemTimeOfNeed.name: Time of Need
SkillGemTimeOfNeed.description: While active, periodically invokes divine blessings to heal you and remove Curses and Elemental Ailments from you.

SkillGemElementalInvocation.name: Elemental Invocation
SkillGemElementalInvocation.description: While active, gains Energy when you Freeze, Shock or Ignite an enemy. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

SkillGemAttrition.name: Attrition
SkillGemAttrition.description: While active, causes you to deal more Hit damage to Rare and Unique enemies the longer you've been fighting them, and gain Culling Strike against them once you've been fighting them for long enough.

SkillGemElementalConflux.name: Elemental Conflux
SkillGemElementalConflux.description: Tap into a current of raw and unpredictable Elemental power, causing you to deal greatly more damage of a randomly chosen Element. The Element affected changes frequently, though the same Element can be affected multiple times in succession.

SkillGemEmergencyReload.name: Emergency Reload
SkillGemEmergencyReload.description: Instantly reload all your Crossbow Ammunition clips and Empower each clip's Ammunition to deal more damage for a duration.

SupportGemFontofBlood.name: Font of Blood
SupportGemFontofBlood.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by supported Skills generate a Font of Blood which will Leech Life to Allies within it.

SupportGemFontofMana.name: Font of Mana
SupportGemFontofMana.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by supported Skills generate a Font of Mana which will Leech Mana to Allies within it.

SupportGemFontofRage.name: Font of Rage
SupportGemFontofRage.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by supported Skills generate a Font of Rage which will Leech Rage to Allies within it.

SupportGemAftershock.name: Aftershock I
SupportGemAftershock.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an Aftershock.

SupportGemAftershockTwo.name: Aftershock II
SupportGemAftershockTwo.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an Aftershock.

SupportGemAftershockThree.name: Aftershock III
SupportGemAftershockThree.description: Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills a chance to create an Aftershock as well as increased chance to cause Aftershocks the longer their Attack time

SupportGemSlamAftershocks.name: Tectonic Slams
SupportGemSlamAftershocks.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, causing them to create simultaneous Aftershocks behind the Slam, but lowering Aftershock damage and area of effect with Supported Skills. Cannot Support Skills which create Fissures.

SkillGemClusterGrenade.name: Cluster Grenade
SkillGemClusterGrenade.description: Fire a bouncing Grenade that explodes when its fuse expires, throwing out a ring of mini Grenades that explode when they come to a stop.

SkillGemTornadoShot.name: Tornado Shot
SkillGemTornadoShot.description: Fire a skyward shot that whips up a Tornado where it lands, dealing Physical damage over time and Hindering enemies standing in it. Arrows, thrown Spears and Crossbow bolts fired at the Tornado are sucked into it, causing the Tornado to spit out a ring of copied Projectiles. Copied Projectiles cannot be copied again, even by further Tornados.

SkillGemBlinkSandPlayer.name: Blink
SkillGemBlinkSandPlayer.description: While active, replaces your dodge roll with a short-cooldown Spell that allows you to tunnel through space, instantly reappearing a medium distance away.

SkillGemChargeInfusion.name: Charge Regulation
SkillGemChargeInfusion.description: While active, you gain powerful Buffs based on your active Charges. However, maintaining the Buff Consumes Charges every few seconds.

SupportGemHolyDescent.name: Holy Descent
SupportGemHolyDescent.description: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Consecrated Ground when you land.

SupportGemBurningInscription.name: Burning Inscription
SupportGemBurningInscription.description: Supports any Skill which creates Runic Inscriptions when Cast, causing those Runic Inscriptions to trigger Burning Inscription when they expire. Burning Inscription is a Spell which creates Ignited Ground based off of your Maximum Mana.

SkillGemShardScavenger.name: Shard Scavenger
SkillGemShardScavenger.description: While active, Consuming Freeze, Shock, Ignite, or Fully Broken Armour on an enemy reloads your Crossbow, restores one cooldown use for your Grenades and grants a Buff causing Crossbow Attacks to not consume bolts for a duration. This can only occur once every few seconds.

SupportGemDoubleBarrel.name: Double Barrel I
SupportGemDoubleBarrel.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.

SupportGemDoubleBarrelTwo.name: Double Barrel II
SupportGemDoubleBarrelTwo.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.

SupportGemDoubleBarrelThree.name: Double Barrel III
SupportGemDoubleBarrelThree.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed. Supported Skills will also automatically reload when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

SupportGemCombatReload.name: Ratha's Assault
SupportGemCombatReload.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load multiple extra bolts and attack faster. Supported Skills cannot reload normally, instead loading bolts when you Dodge.

SupportGemAutoReload.name: Auto Reload
SupportGemAutoReload.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to automatically reload when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

SupportGemAmmoConservation.name: Ammo Conservation I
SupportGemAmmoConservation.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.

SupportGemAmmoConservationTwo.name: Ammo Conservation II
SupportGemAmmoConservationTwo.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.

SupportGemAmmoConservationThree.name: Ammo Conservation III
SupportGemAmmoConservationThree.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing, at the cost of Reload speed.

SupportGemAmmoConservationFour.name: Arjun's Medal
SupportGemAmmoConservationFour.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, causing them to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill.

SupportGemNimbleReload.name: Nimble Reload
SupportGemNimbleReload.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to Reload bolts significantly faster.

SupportGemFreshClip.name: Fresh Clip I
SupportGemFreshClip.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 6 seconds.

SupportGemFreshClipTwo.name: Fresh Clip II
SupportGemFreshClipTwo.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 8 seconds.

SupportGemSacrificialLamb.name: Sacrificial Lamb I
SupportGemSacrificialLamb.description: Supports Skills which create Minions, causing your Skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill before your other Minions where possible.

SupportGemSacrificialLambTwo.name: Sacrificial Lamb II
SupportGemSacrificialLambTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Minions, causing your Skills which can target Minions to prioritise targeting Minions from the Supported Skill before your other Minions where possible, as well as causing them to always be considered Detonatable.

SkillGemOverwhelmingPresence.name: Overwhelming Presence
SkillGemOverwhelmingPresence.description: While active, emits an Aura that makes enemies in your Presence easier to Stun and inflict Elemental Ailments upon.

SkillGemAlchemistsBoon.name: Alchemist's Boon
SkillGemAlchemistsBoon.description: While active, grants you Flask charges passively and causes Life and Mana recovery from your Flasks to also apply to Allies in your Presence.

SkillGemReapersInvocation.name: Reaper's Invocation
SkillGemReapersInvocation.description: While active, gains Energy when you kill an enemy with a Melee Attack. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

SkillGemSacrifice.name: Sacrifice
SkillGemSacrifice.description: While active, your undead Reviving Minions can be used in place of Corpses by your skills, but your Minions Revive more slowly.

SkillGemArchmage.name: Archmage
SkillGemArchmage.description: While active, causes your Non-Channelling Spells to cost additional mana and deal extra Lightning damage, both based on your maximum Mana.

SkillGemMagneticSalvo.name: Magnetic Salvo
SkillGemMagneticSalvo.description: Aim skyward and fire energy missiles at lingering bolts or arrows created by other Lightning Attacks in front of you. The missiles explode if they land close to a lingering bolt or arrow, dealing more damage in a larger area but destroying that bolt or arrow in the process.

SkillGemFreezingSalvo.name: Freezing Salvo
SkillGemFreezingSalvo.description: Passively gains Seals over time. Using the skill fires a projectile, and breaks the Seals, Repeating for each of them, and for each additional projectile the skill is given. For each time it Repeats normally, it will also Repeat an additional time targeting a different Ice Fragment in its area of effect if able, Detonating those Ice Fragments immediately.

SkillGemTriggeredGasCloud.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Gas Cloud
SkillGemTriggeredGasCloud.description: DNT-UNUSED Creates a Poison cloud. Burning effects or Detonator skills will cause the cloud to explode in a fiery blast. (Wording copied from Toxic Grenade.)

SkillGemBerserk.name: Berserk
SkillGemBerserk.description: While active, strengthens your Rage, but causes you to lose Life while not losing Rage.

SkillGemHeraldOfPlague.name: Herald of Plague
SkillGemHeraldOfPlague.description: While active, killing a Poisoned enemy spreads its Poison to other nearby enemies, and has a chance to also Hinder them.

SkillGemHeraldOfBlood.name: Herald of Blood
SkillGemHeraldOfBlood.description: While active, killing an enemy with Blood Loss will cause a bloody explosion that deals Physical Attack damage to surrounding enemies. This damage is not based on your Weapon, but is partially based on their accumulated Blood Loss. The explosion destroys their Corpse if the enemy was Normal or Magic, and has a chance to Aggravate Bleeding.

SkillGemWitheringPresence.name: Withering Presence
SkillGemWitheringPresence.description: While active, emits an Aura that periodically Withers enemies in your Presence.

SkillGemRavenousSwarm.name: Ravenous Swarm
SkillGemRavenousSwarm.description: While active and enemies are present, swarms of insects emerge from your body to pursue nearby enemies. The swarms are untargetable Minions that Attack and Poison enemies.

SkillGemMirageArcher.name: Mirage Archer
SkillGemMirageArcher.description: While active, dodge rolling will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged Attacks for a short duration, then vanish.

SkillGemCombatFrenzy.name: Combat Frenzy
SkillGemCombatFrenzy.description: While active, grants you a Frenzy Charge when you Freeze, Electrocute or Pin an enemy. This can only occur once every few seconds.

SkillGemCastOnBlock.name: Cast on Block
SkillGemCastOnBlock.description: While active, gains Energy when you Block and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemCastCurseOnBlock.name: Curse on Block
SkillGemCastCurseOnBlock.description: While active, gains Energy when you Block and triggers socketed Curses on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemGatheringStorm.name: Gathering Storm
SkillGemGatheringStorm.description: Flip backward and Channel to charge your Quarterstaff with Lightning. Releasing dashes towards the target location, damaging enemies along the way. Releasing with Perfect Timing performs a Lightning-assisted dash that releases shockwaves from enemies you dash through. Perfectly Timed dash also explodes Tempest Bells on hit creating a shockwave that deals more damage and has a larger area, leaving Shocked Ground in its wake. This skill cannot be Ancestrally Boosted.

SupportGemIronWill.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Iron Will
SupportGemIronWill.description: DNT-UNUSED Modifiers to Melee damage also apply to Spell damage for supported skill

SupportGemIronGrip.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Iron Grip
SupportGemIronGrip.description: DNT-UNUSED Modifiers to Melee damage also apply to Projectile damage for supported skill

SupportGemBranchingFissures.name: Branching Fissures I
SupportGemBranchingFissures.description: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.

SupportGemBranchingFissuresTwo.name: Branching Fissures II
SupportGemBranchingFissuresTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.

SupportGemUpheaval.name: Upheaval I
SupportGemUpheaval.description: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create an additional fissure at the cost of damage and speed.

SupportGemUpheavalTwo.name: Upheaval II
SupportGemUpheavalTwo.description: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional fissures at the cost of damage and speed.

SupportGemKaomsMadness.name: Kaom's Madness
SupportGemKaomsMadness.description: Supports Skills which create fissures in the ground, causing them to create many additional fissures at the cost of damage, speed, and area of effect.

SupportGemDespoiler.name: Lasting Ground
SupportGemDespoiler.description: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those surfaces to last longer.

SupportGemRicochet.name: Ricochet I
SupportGemRicochet.description: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, giving those Projectiles a chance to Chain when impacting terrain.

SupportGemRicochetTwo.name: Ricochet II
SupportGemRicochetTwo.description: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, giving those Projectiles a chance to Chain when impacting terrain.

SupportGemRicochetThree.name: Ricochet III
SupportGemRicochetThree.description: Supports any Skill which creates Projectiles, causing those Projectiles to Chain when impacting terrain, at the cost of any additional Projectiles, as well as causing them to always Pierce.

SupportGemAncestralUrgency.name: Urgent Totems I
SupportGemAncestralUrgency.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

SupportGemAncestralUrgencyTwo.name: Urgent Totems II
SupportGemAncestralUrgencyTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly.

SupportGemAncestralUrgencyThree.name: Urgent Totems III
SupportGemAncestralUrgencyThree.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Skills to place Totems much more quickly. Totems created by Supported Skills have increased Attack and Cast Speed.

SupportGemLongFuse.name: Long Fuse I
SupportGemLongFuse.description: Supports Skills which have a Detonation Time, causing those Skills to have much higher Detonation Time and detonation damage.

SupportGemLongFuseTwo.name: Long Fuse II
SupportGemLongFuseTwo.description: Supports Skills which have a Detonation Time, causing those Skills to have much higher Detonation Time and detonation damage.

SupportGemPayload.name: Payload
SupportGemPayload.description: Supports Skills which fire Grenades, giving fired Grenades a chance to activate again, but lengthening their cooldowns.

SupportGemStripAway.name: Potent Exposure
SupportGemStripAway.description: Supports Skills which apply Exposure to Enemies, increasing the effect of applied Exposure.

SupportGemIronwood.name: Reinforced Totems I
SupportGemIronwood.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by Supported Skills have additional Elemental Resistances.

SupportGemIronwoodTwo.name: Reinforced Totems II
SupportGemIronwoodTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by Supported Skills have additional Elemental Resistances.

SupportGemConsideredCasting.name: Considered Casting
SupportGemConsideredCasting.description: Supports Spell Skills that Hit Enemies and you cast yourself, boosting Damage at the cost of Cast Speed.

SupportGemWildshards.name: Wildshards I
SupportGemWildshards.description: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

SupportGemWildshardsTwo.name: Wildshards II
SupportGemWildshardsTwo.description: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have a chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle.

SupportGemWildshardsThree.name: Sione's Temper
SupportGemWildshardsThree.description: Supports Projectile Spells. Supported Spells have an increasingly higher chance to fire many additional Projectiles in a circle, resetting when they do.

SupportGemIcicle.name: Icicle
SupportGemIcicle.description: Supports any Skill which creates Ice Crystals, causing them to be created with lower Life.

SupportGemGlacier.name: Glacier
SupportGemGlacier.description: Supports any Skill which creates Ice Crystals, causing them to be created with higher Life.

SupportGemHeft.name: Heft
SupportGemHeft.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum Physical Damage of their Hits.

SupportGemRisingTempest.name: Rising Tempest
SupportGemRisingTempest.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage, raising Elemental Damage dealt for each Skill used Recently of a different Elemental type. Cannot support Minion Skills.

SupportGemExtraction.name: Extraction
SupportGemExtraction.description: Supports Spell Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Using supported Spells will cause you to Sacrifice a portion of your Life on use, gaining extra Chaos Damage in exchange. Does not support Persistent Skills, Minion Skills, or Triggered Skills.

SupportGemAstralProjection.name: Astral Projection
SupportGemAstralProjection.description: Supports Nova Skills, causing those Skills to take place at the targeted location when used instead of around you.

SupportGemPracticedCombo.name: Practiced Combo
SupportGemPracticedCombo.description: Supports Strike Skills. Supported Skills have a chance to build additional Combo on Hit. Cannot support Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemLeverage.name: Leverage
SupportGemLeverage.description: Supports Skills which Hit Enemies. Supported Skills gain increased chance to Critically Hit against Immobilised Enemies.

SupportGemCulmination.name: Culmination I
SupportGemCulmination.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemCulminationTwo.name: Culmination II
SupportGemCulminationTwo.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemPotential.name: Potential
SupportGemPotential.description: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a Power Charge on use if possible, and will be much more likely to Critically Hit if they do. Supported Skills cannot generate Power Charges. Cannot Support Skills which consume Power Charges.

SupportGemExpanse.name: Expanse
SupportGemExpanse.description: Supports any Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher Area of Effect but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

SupportGemExcise.name: Excise
SupportGemExcise.description: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to Critically Hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

SupportGemExecrate.name: Execrate
SupportGemExecrate.description: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to inflict Ailments on hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

SupportGemEnergyRetention.name: Energy Retention
SupportGemEnergyRetention.description: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills gain a chance to partially Refund a portion of Energy cost when Triggering or Invoking other Skills.

SupportGemFerocity.name: Ferocity
SupportGemFerocity.description: Supports Skills that you use yourself. Supported Skills will consume a Frenzy Charge on use if possible, and will gain significant Skill Speed if they do, but cannot generate Frenzy Charges. Cannot Support Skills which consume Frenzy Charges.

SupportGemAblation.name: Sacrificial Offering
SupportGemAblation.description: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use, but deal much more damage and have more powerful Buffs in return.

SupportGemGuatelitzi.name: Guatelitzi's Ablation
SupportGemGuatelitzi.description: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills Sacrifice a portion of your life on use. While Offering spikes from Supported Skills persist, you are periodically granted a Power Charge. When spikes from Supported Skills die, Regenerate a percentage of your maximum Life and Mana per second based on the duration the Offering persisted.
