SupportGemDanseMacabre.name: Danse Macabre
SupportGemDanseMacabre.description: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills have increased Buff effect and deal more damage, but will target an additional skeletal Minion when cast. If there is not an additional skeletal Minion to target, no damage or Buff effect will be granted.

SupportGemCapacitor.name: Energy Capacitor
SupportGemCapacitor.description: Supports Invocation Skills which Trigger other Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Maximum Energy.

SupportGemImpetus.name: Boundless Energy I
SupportGemImpetus.description: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills generate Energy significantly faster.

SupportGemImpetusTwo.name: Boundless Energy II
SupportGemImpetusTwo.description: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills generate Energy significantly faster.

SupportGemDissipate.name: Harmonic Remnants I
SupportGemDissipate.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away.

SupportGemDissipateTwo.name: Harmonic Remnants II
SupportGemDissipateTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away, with a chance to create an additional Remnant.

SupportGemFluke.name: Fluke
SupportGemFluke.description: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.

SupportGemFlukeTwo.name: Ixchel's Torment
SupportGemFlukeTwo.description: Supports Skills which Trigger other Skills. Skills Triggered by Supported Skills have their Damage, Area of Effect, and Projectile Speed randomly raised or lowered when Triggered, as well as recovering a random amount of their cost when Triggered.

SupportGemZenith.name: Zenith I
SupportGemZenith.description: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills deal more damage while you are above 90% of your Maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemZenithTwo.name: Zenith II
SupportGemZenithTwo.description: Supports Spell Skills. Supported Skills have increased Mana cost Efficiency and deal more damage while you are above 90% of your maximum Mana. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemBidding.name: Bidding I
SupportGemBidding.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions deal more damage and have increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

SupportGemBiddingTwo.name: Bidding II
SupportGemBiddingTwo.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions deal more damage and have increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

SupportGemBiddingThree.name: Bidding III
SupportGemBiddingThree.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions have significantly increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

SupportGemCommandment.name: Commandment
SupportGemCommandment.description: Supports Minions which have Command Skills. Supported Minions have massively increased cooldown recovery speed for Command Skills they use, but deal no damage with non-Command Skills.

SupportGemFlow.name: Flow
SupportGemFlow.description: Supports Skills which require Combo to use. Supported Skills lose their Combo stacks after a longer delay spent not gaining any Combo.

SupportGemAdhere.name: Adhesive Grenades I
SupportGemAdhere.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land, but doing lower damage when they detonate.

SupportGemAdhereTwo.name: Adhesive Grenades II
SupportGemAdhereTwo.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land.

SupportGemAdhereThree.name: Adhesive Grenades III
SupportGemAdhereThree.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land. Grenades from Supported Skills have longer cooldowns, and a chance to detonate an additional time.

SupportGemRetaliate.name: Retaliate I
SupportGemRetaliate.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.

SupportGemRetaliateTwo.name: Retaliate II
SupportGemRetaliateTwo.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain much more damage and are more capable of Stunning Enemies the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.

SupportGemTremors.name: Tremors
SupportGemTremors.description: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain multiple independent chances to cause Aftershocks, but deal less Damage.

SupportGemSalvo.name: Salvo
SupportGemSalvo.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which fire Projectiles, Sealing them over time. The Seals are broken when used, causing additional Projectiles to be fired. Projectiles from Supported Skills are fired in random directions. Cannot Support Skills which require Combo, have a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

SupportGemCadence.name: Cadence
SupportGemCadence.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more Attack speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame. Sustained Skills will instead gain Attack speed periodically while being used.

SupportGemVolt.name: Volt
SupportGemVolt.description: Supports Projectile Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills gain Voltaic Charge as you move, up to a maximum. When used, Supported Skills expend that Charge to gain extra Lightning Damage.

SupportGemBoneShrapnel.name: Bone Shrapnel
SupportGemBoneShrapnel.description: Supports Skills which Hit Enemies. Supported Skills trigger Bone Shrapnel explosions when killing Pinned Enemies.

SupportGemAlignment.name: Alignment I
SupportGemAlignment.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

SupportGemAlignmentTwo.name: Alignment II
SupportGemAlignmentTwo.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

SupportGemAlignmentThree.name: Alignment III
SupportGemAlignmentThree.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction fire additional Projectiles. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

SupportGemDerange.name: Derange
SupportGemDerange.description: Supports Skills which you use yourself which can deal damage. Supported Skills gain an Energy Shield cost equal to your Intelligence, while also dealing more non-Ailment Damage over time based off of your Intelligence. Cannot support Channelling Skills.

SupportGemChargedShots.name: Charged Shots I
SupportGemChargedShots.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills restores a portion of its Mana cost and Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.

SupportGemChargedShotsTwo.name: Charged Shots II
SupportGemChargedShotsTwo.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.

SupportGemProfanity.name: Profanity I
SupportGemProfanity.description: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume a Corpse on use, dealing more Chaos Damage if they do.

SupportGemProfanityTwo.name: Profanity II
SupportGemProfanityTwo.description: Supports Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills consume many Corpses on use, dealing more Chaos Damage per Corpse consumed.

SupportGemBurgeon.name: Burgeon I
SupportGemBurgeon.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been Channelled.

SupportGemBurgeonTwo.name: Burgeon II
SupportGemBurgeonTwo.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been Channelled.

SupportGemSteadfast.name: Steadfast I
SupportGemSteadfast.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, granting you higher Stun Threshold while Channelling them.

SupportGemSteadfastTwo.name: Steadfast II
SupportGemSteadfastTwo.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, granting you higher Stun Threshold and Ailment Threshold  while Channelling them.

SupportGemFlamepierce.name: Flamepierce
SupportGemFlamepierce.description: Supports Skills which can fire Projectiles. Initial Projectile created by Supported Skills will always Pierce Ignited Enemies, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Ignite themselves.

SupportGemFreezefork.name: Freezefork
SupportGemFreezefork.description: Supports Skills which can fire Projectiles. Projectiles from Supported Skills always Fork when the initial Projectile Hits Frozen Enemies, but Supported Skills cannot build up Freeze themselves.

SupportGemStormchain.name: Stormchain
SupportGemStormchain.description: Supports Projectile Skills and Skills which can Chain. Supported Skills always Chain when initially Hitting a Shocked Enemy, but cannot themselves inflict Shock. Does not support Skills which cannot Chain.

SupportGemVerglas.name: Verglas
SupportGemVerglas.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can Hit Enemies. Supported Skills Gain a percentage of their Damage as Cold Damage when you destroy Ice Crystals.

SupportGemEmbitter.name: Embitter
SupportGemEmbitter.description: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies with Hits, causing all sources of Damage Gained to instead be treated as Damage Gained as extra Cold for Supported Skills.

SupportGemBattershout.name: Battershout
SupportGemBattershout.description: Supports Warcry Skills. Supported Skills Consume Fully Broken Armour to trigger Physical Damage explosions on Enemies within their range but cannot themselves Break Armour.

SupportGemNadir.name: Nadir
SupportGemNadir.description: DNT-UNUSED Supports Skills which gain Stages or Seals. Supported Skills have lower Maximum Stage or Seal count, but have a Minimum Stage or Seal count they cannot fall below.

SupportGemAbidingHex.name: Abiding Hex
SupportGemAbidingHex.description: Supports Curse Skills you cast yourself. Supported Skills will consume Power Charges on use, gaining significant Curse duration if they do. Cannot Support Skills which consume Power Charges.

SupportGemRustedSpikes.name: Rusted Spikes
SupportGemRustedSpikes.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage with Hits. When Supported Skills Pin an Enemy, they also Aggravate Bleeding on that Enemy.

SupportGemCrazedMinions.name: Crazed Minions
SupportGemCrazedMinions.description: Supports Minion Skills which summon Reviving Minions. Supported Minions deal significantly more Damage if they have Revived Recently.

SupportGemSpectralVolley.name: Spectral Volley
SupportGemSpectralVolley.description: Supports Bow or Spear Projectile Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills deal lower damage initially, but generate Spectral Projectiles, which deal more damage when they fire. Spectral Projectiles linger and will fire a short duration after no new Spectral Projectiles have been created. Cannot support Channelling Skills, Leaping skills, or skills which rain Projectiles from above.

SupportGemRally.name: Rally
SupportGemRally.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills Consume all Endurance Charge on use, causing you to restore a percentage of your maximum Life for each Charge Consumed. Cannot Support Skills which consume Endurance Charges.

SupportGemHoarfrost.name: Hoarfrost
SupportGemHoarfrost.description: Supports Skills which create Ice Crystals. Supported Skills create chilling areas which deal Cold Damage over time instead of creating Ice Crystals.

SupportGemDeathmarch.name: Deathmarch
SupportGemDeathmarch.description: Supports Skills which create Persistent Minions. Supported Minions will restore Life to nearby Allied Minions on death, as well as removing Ailments from those Minions.

SupportGemAcrimony.name: Acrimony
SupportGemAcrimony.description: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies. Enemies affected by Damage over time from Supported Skills which was not caused by a Damaging Ailment have reduced Life regeneration rate. Only the strongest instance of this Debuff will apply. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemConcoct.name: Concoct I
SupportGemConcoct.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life Flask charges, inflicting more powerful Bleeding based on Life Flask charges consumed.

SupportGemConcoctTwo.name: Concoct II
SupportGemConcoctTwo.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life Flask charges, inflicting more powerful Bleeding based on Life Flask charges consumed.

SupportGemAmbrosia.name: Ambrosia
SupportGemAmbrosia.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of damage as extra Lightning damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.

SupportGemAmbrosiaTwo.name: Ambrosia II
SupportGemAmbrosiaTwo.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of damage as extra Lightning damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.

SupportGemDomain.name: Persistent Ground I
SupportGemDomain.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer.

SupportGemDomainTwo.name: Persistent Ground II
SupportGemDomainTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer and only end when their duration expires.

SupportGemDomainThree.name: Persistent Ground III
SupportGemDomainThree.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing created Surfaces to last much longer as well as lowering the Cooldown Recovery Speed of affected Enemies. Ground Surfaces from Supported Skills only end when their duration expires.

SupportGemFigurehead.name: Selfless Remnants
SupportGemFigurehead.description: Supports Skills that generate Remnants, causing those Remnants to affect Allies in your Presence when collected instead of you.

SupportGemInterlude.name: Remnant Potency I
SupportGemInterlude.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful.

SupportGemInterludeTwo.name: Remnant Potency II
SupportGemInterludeTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful, but delaying their effect.

SupportGemInterludeThree.name: Remnant Potency III
SupportGemInterludeThree.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, making those Remnants more powerful, but delaying their effect.

SupportGemReverberate.name: Reverberate
SupportGemReverberate.description: Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills that have a chance to Aftershock have increased chance to cause Aftershocks the longer their Attack time.

SupportGemClash.name: Clash
SupportGemClash.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills deal more Damage while you have a lower percentage of your Life remaining than the target struck, but less Damage when the reverse is true.

SupportGemMalady.name: Malady
SupportGemMalady.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits, causing base chance to inflict Bleeding with Supported Skills to instead apply to base chance to Poison, and causing base chance to Poison to instead apply to Bleeding.

SupportGemDazzle.name: Dazzle
SupportGemDazzle.description: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills always hit Dazed Enemies, but Consume Daze on Hit, and cannot themselves inflict Daze. Cannot Support Skills which Consume Daze.

SupportGemSyzygy.name: Syzygy
SupportGemSyzygy.description: Supports Slam Skills you use yourself. Hits from Supported Skills are considered Crushing Blows against Enemies which are both Ignited and Fully Armour Broken. Hits with Supported Skills that Heavily Stun Ignited and Fully Armour Broken Enemies will Intimidate them.

SupportGemUnyielding.name: Unyielding
SupportGemUnyielding.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, a percentage of Damage taken is Recouped as Life, with the percentage scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the Supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

SupportGemDesperation.name: Desperation
SupportGemDesperation.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used while Surrounded.

SupportGemOverextend.name: Overextend
SupportGemOverextend.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills deal more Damage with Critical Hits, but Critically Hitting an Enemy with them will Daze you for a short time.

SupportGemExcoriate.name: Excoriate
SupportGemExcoriate.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills deal more Melee Damage for each Elemental Ailment on Enemies they hit, but cannot themselves inflict Elemental Ailments.

SupportGemUnbending.name: Unbending
SupportGemUnbending.description: Supports Spell Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, a percentage of Damage taken is Recouped as Mana, with the percentage scaling higher the longer the Cast time of the Supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

SupportGemRetreat.name: Retreat I
SupportGemRetreat.description: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.

SupportGemRetreatTwo.name: Retreat II
SupportGemRetreatTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.

SupportGemRetreatThree.name: Retreat III
SupportGemRetreatThree.description: Supports Skills which create Projectiles. Supported Skills deal more damage with Projectiles if you have struck with a Melee Hit in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal Melee Damage.

SupportGemPursuit.name: Pursuit I
SupportGemPursuit.description: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.

SupportGemPursuitTwo.name: Pursuit II
SupportGemPursuitTwo.description: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last eight seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.

SupportGemPursuitThree.name: Pursuit III
SupportGemPursuitThree.description: Supports Melee Attacks. Supported Skills deal more Melee damage if you have struck with a Projectile Attack Hit in the last two seconds, but cannot themselves deal Projectile Damage.

SupportGemReach.name: Overreach
SupportGemReach.description: Supports Attack Skills which deal Damage in an Area. Supported Skills have significantly increased Area of Effect, but are less Accurate against nearby targets.

SupportGemCommiserate.name: Commiserate
SupportGemCommiserate.description: Supports Skills you use or Trigger yourself, which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills inflict more powerful Ailments if you are afflicted with those Ailments when you inflict them, while also removing from you any Ailment that they inflict.

SupportGemBlindside.name: Blindside
SupportGemBlindside.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills are more likely to Critically Hit Blinded Enemies, and deal more Damage with Critical Hits against Blinded Enemies, but cannot themselves inflict Blind.

SupportGemHitAndRun.name: Hit and Run
SupportGemHitAndRun.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills can only be used after you have moved a certain distance, but have massively increased Skill Speed. Cannot support Skills which have a cooldown.

SupportGemCracklingBarrier.name: Crackling Barrier
SupportGemCracklingBarrier.description: Supports Channelling Skills. While Channelling Supported Skills, you gain Lightning Thorns based off of your maximum Mana.

SupportGemDefy.name: Defy I
SupportGemDefy.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Hit Damage from Supported Skills is Lucky if you are Surrounded.

SupportGemDefyTwo.name: Defy II
SupportGemDefyTwo.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Hit Damage from Supported Skills is Lucky and Insufficient Mana doesn't prevent Supported Skills from being used if you are Surrounded.

SupportGemVolatility.name: Volatility
SupportGemVolatility.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills grant Volatility on Critical Hit.

SupportGemMuster.name: Muster
SupportGemMuster.description: Supports Skills which summon Minions. Supported Minions deal more Damage the more different kinds of Reviving Minions you have summoned.

SupportGemEnormity.name: Hulking Minions
SupportGemEnormity.description: Supports Skills which summon Persistent Minions. Supported Minions are larger, have more Life, and deal more Damage, but cost significantly more Spirit.

SupportGemCaltrops.name: Caltrops
SupportGemCaltrops.description: Supports Ranged Spear Attacks. Supported Skills create Caltrops when Projectiles they create reach the end of their flight.

SupportGemHaemocrystals.name: Haemocrystals
SupportGemHaemocrystals.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Consume Bleeding on Hit to create explosive blood-filled crystals, but cannot themselves inflict Bleeding. Cannot Support Skills which already Consume Bleeding.

SupportGemSpar.name: Spar
SupportGemSpar.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills are more capable of Stunning Enemies the closer you are to being Heavily Stunned.

SupportGemDauntless.name: Dauntless
SupportGemDauntless.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills cannot be used unless you have been stationary for a certain duration, but deal increasingly more damage the longer you are stationary. Cannot support Skills which have a cooldown or another usage Condition.

SupportGemMagnetism.name: Magnetic Remnants
SupportGemMagnetism.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away.

SupportGemAncestralCall.name: Ancestral Call I
SupportGemAncestralCall.description: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemAncestralCallTwo.name: Ancestral Call II
SupportGemAncestralCallTwo.description: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemAncestralCallThree.name: Ancestral Call III
SupportGemAncestralCallThree.description: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every second, at the cost of a damage penalty. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemQuillBurst.name: Quill Burst
SupportGemQuillBurst.description:
Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills trigger Quill Burst, which deals your Thorns Damage in an Area around the target struck. Quill Burst can only be triggered on Hit after you've
Retaliated with Thorns Damage.

SupportGemUnsteadyTempo.name: Unsteady Tempo
SupportGemUnsteadyTempo.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use yourself. Attacking with Supported Skills will cycle through various effects, with the first Attack in sequence inflicting Hobble on you. The second and third Attacks in sequence will powerfully scale chance to Critically Hit and overall damage, respectively, at which point the cycle will reset. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

SupportGemAncestralAid.name: Ancestral Aid
SupportGemAncestralAid.description: Supports Strikes you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until you have Blocked a certain number of Hits, but will be Ancestrally Boosted when used. After use, this Blocked Hit counter will reset. Cannot Support Channelled Skills or Skills which already have a Condition for use.

SupportGemTitanicArrows.name: [DNT-UNUSED] Titanic Arrows
SupportGemTitanicArrows.description: DNT-UNUSED Supports Bow Attacks which impact the ground, triggering stunning novas when they do.

SupportGemShockingLeap.name: Shocking Leap
SupportGemShockingLeap.description: Supports Skills that leap into the air and deal damage, causing them to create Shocked Ground the first time they Critically Hit an enemy.

SupportGemBarbs.name: Barbs I
SupportGemBarbs.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills. After you Retaliate with Thorns Damage, you also deal your Thorns damage to enemies you Hit with Supported Skills.

SupportGemBarbsTwo.name: Barbs II
SupportGemBarbsTwo.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills. After you Retaliate with Thorns Damage, you also deal your Thorns damage to enemies you Hit with Supported Skills.

SupportGemBarbsThree.name: Barbs III
SupportGemBarbsThree.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills. After you Retaliate with Thorns Damage, you also deal your Thorns damage twice to enemies you Hit with Supported Skills.

SupportGemRime.name: Rime
SupportGemRime.description: Supports Skills which create Ground Surfaces, causing Enemies Chilled by those Surfaces to be more easily Frozen, but at the cost of some Chill magnitude.

SupportGemArmsLength.name: Arms Length
SupportGemArmsLength.description: Supports Skills which Hit Enemies, causing Knockback from those Hits to be significantly more effective.

SupportGemCharmBounty.name: Charm Bounty
SupportGemCharmBounty.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Charm charges.

SupportGemThornskin.name: Thornskin I
SupportGemThornskin.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemThornskinTwo.name: Thornskin II
SupportGemThornskinTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Thorns Damage while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemMysticism.name: Mysticism I
SupportGemMysticism.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemMysticismTwo.name: Mysticism II
SupportGemMysticismTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Spell Damage while on full Energy Shield while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemDireStrike.name: Direstrike I
SupportGemDireStrike.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemDireStrikeTwo.name: Direstrike II
SupportGemDireStrikeTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemUpwelling.name: Upwelling I
SupportGemUpwelling.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemUpwellingTwo.name: Upwelling II
SupportGemUpwellingTwo.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing your Minions to deal increased Damage while you are not on full Mana while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemWarmBlooded.name: Warm Blooded
SupportGemWarmBlooded.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Freeze applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemCoolHeaded.name: Cool Headed
SupportGemCoolHeaded.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Ignite applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemStrongHearted.name: Strong Hearted
SupportGemStrongHearted.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Shock applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

SupportGemUntouchable.name: Untouchable
SupportGemUntouchable.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased Evasion Rating, with the increase scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

SupportGemRefraction.name: Refraction I
SupportGemRefraction.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which grants Deflection Rating and causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.

SupportGemRefractionTwo.name: Refraction II
SupportGemRefractionTwo.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing those affected by Auras they create to gain Refractive Plating, a Buff which grants Deflection Rating and causes Armour to partially apply to Elemental Hit Damage.

SupportGemRefractionThree.name: Refraction III
SupportGemRefractionThree.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing Enemies within their area to gain Refractive Dissolution, a Debuff which lowers Elemental Resistances.

SupportGemGreatwood.name: Cirel's Cultivation
SupportGemGreatwood.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing you from having more than one of that Totem but granting significant benefits for Supported Totems based how many allied Totems are near them. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemGreatwoodTwo.name: Greatwood II
SupportGemGreatwoodTwo.description: DNT Supports Skills which create Totems, limiting their active Totem count to one but granting significant benefits for supported Totems based how many allied Totems are near them. Does not support Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemSplinteringTotem.name: Splinter Totem I
SupportGemSplinteringTotem.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing having more than one active Totem but causing that Totem to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an Attack or Spell, with each Totem becoming less effective. Each splintered Totem can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by Minions. Only one Totem can be splintering at a time.

SupportGemSplinteringTotemTwo.name: Splinter Totem II
SupportGemSplinteringTotemTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing having more than one active Totem but causing that Totem to splinter into smaller versions of itself after it uses an Attack or Spell, with each Totem becoming less effective. Each splintered Totem can further splinter, up to a maximum. Does not Support Skills used by Minions. Only one Totem can be splintering at a time.

SupportGemUnabating.name: Unabating
SupportGemUnabating.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. While using Supported Skills, you gain increased Armour, with the increase scaling higher the longer the Attack time of the supported Skill. Cannot Support Channelling Skills.

SupportGemPunchThrough.name: Punch Through
SupportGemPunchThrough.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills apply Easy Target when Knocking Back Enemies, causing the next Projectile Attack Hit they take to deal increased Damage.

SupportGemRip.name: Rip
SupportGemRip.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills you use or Trigger yourself. Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies create a Blood Remnant. Blood Remnants increase your Life regeneration rate for a short while after being collected.

SupportGemTear.name: Tear
SupportGemTear.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use or Trigger yourself. On-Kill effects caused by Killing Blows with Supported Skills on Bleeding enemies have a chance to occur twice.

SupportGemBrink.name: Brink I
SupportGemBrink.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Heavy Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Heavy Stun.

SupportGemBrinkTwo.name: Brink II
SupportGemBrinkTwo.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Stun.

SupportGemTireless.name: Tireless
SupportGemTireless.description: Supports Warcry Skills. Attacks Empowered by Supported Skills have a chance not to lower the Empowerment count of Supported Skills when they are used.

SupportGemVolcanicEruption.name: Volcanic Eruption
SupportGemVolcanicEruption.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills trigger Volcanic Eruption on Hit against Ignited Enemies.

SupportGemFirstBlood.name: First Blood
SupportGemFirstBlood.description: Supports Attacks. Supported Skills are far more likely to inflict Bleeding on Hitting full Life Enemies.

SupportGemRetort.name: Frenzied Riposte
SupportGemRetort.description: Supports Attacks you use or Trigger yourself, causing them to Consume the Parried Debuff on Hit to grant you a Frenzy Charge. Cannot support Skills which already Consume the Parried Debuff.

SupportGemBloodintheEyes.name: Hobble
SupportGemBloodintheEyes.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Hobble Bleeding Enemies based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

SupportGemTwofold.name: Heightened Charges
SupportGemTwofold.description: Supports any Skill that Consumes Charges, granting a chance for benefits of that Consumption to be doubled.

SupportGemIncision.name: Incision
SupportGemIncision.description: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills inflict Incision on Hit, which causes Enemies to be increasingly more likely to be inflicted with Bleeding. All Incision is removed from a target on inflicting it with Bleeding.

SupportGemCatharsis.name: Catharsis
SupportGemCatharsis.description: Supports any Skill you use yourself, causing supported Skill to detonate Volatility that is present on you. Supported Skill can only be used while you have a certain amount of Volatility and cannot support Skills which already have another Condition.

SupportGemDelayedGratification.name: Delayed Gratification
SupportGemDelayedGratification.description: Supports Skills which require some Condition to be met for use. Supported Skills can be used an additional time after their Condition has been met, but meeting that Condition is harder.

SupportGemLoyalty.name: Loyalty
SupportGemLoyalty.description: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life.

SupportGemRomirasRequital.name: Romira's Requital
SupportGemRomirasRequital.description: Supports Skills that create Companions which can be damaged. Minions created by Supported Skills take a portion of Hit Damage you would otherwise have taken, but have lowered maximum Life. A percentage of Damage taken this way is Recouped by you as Life.

SupportGemRearm.name: Rearm I
SupportGemRearm.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards. Hazards created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.

SupportGemRearmTwo.name: Rearm II
SupportGemRearmTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards. Hazards created by Supported Skills have a chance to be rearmed a short duration after triggering.

SupportGemDelayedReaction.name: Delayed Reaction
SupportGemDelayedReaction.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to only be able to trigger immediately after creation or at the end of their duration. Created Hazards have significantly lowered duration, and deal more damage.

SupportGemVolatilePower.name: Volatile Power
SupportGemVolatilePower.description: Supports Skills which you use yourself. On using Supported Skills while they are Empowered, you gain Volatility.

SupportGemGambleshot.name: Gambleshot
SupportGemGambleshot.description: Supports Skills which fire Projectiles that are not ground targeted. Projectiles from Supported Skills randomly Fork, Chain or Pierce.

SupportGemUnerringPower.name: Unerring Power
SupportGemUnerringPower.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. When Supported Attacks are Empowered, they have significantly lowered cost and raised Accuracy.

SupportGemImpale.name: Impale
SupportGemImpale.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Impale on Hit but making them unable to Extract Impale themselves.

SupportGemPerfection.name: Perfection
SupportGemPerfection.description: Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Perfection, which is a powerful damage buff. However, failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Perfection) will remove all Perfection on you.

SupportGemDeliberation.name: Deliberation
SupportGemDeliberation.description: Supports skills that can be used while moving, causing you to move slower while using them, but granting more damage in exchange.

SupportGemSeeRed.name: See Red
SupportGemSeeRed.description: Supports Attack Skills. Bleeding inflicted with Supported Skills lasts significantly longer, but enemies you inflict Bleeding onto with Supported Skills will move and Attack faster.

SupportGemExpedite.name: Short Fuse I
SupportGemExpedite.description: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, shortening the time before Detonation.

SupportGemExpediteTwo.name: Short Fuse II
SupportGemExpediteTwo.description: Supports Skills which Detonate after some amount of time has elapsed, massively shortening the time before Detonation at the cost of Damage.

SupportGemUndermine.name: Undermine
SupportGemUndermine.description: Supports Attack Skills. Supported Skills Consume Maim on hit, Breaking a percentage of the Maimed target's Armour in doing so. Supported Skills cannot themselves inflict Maim.

SupportGemOutmaneuver.name: Outmaneuver
SupportGemOutmaneuver.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Break Armour against Parried Enemies.

SupportGemSingleOut.name: Mark for Death
SupportGemSingleOut.description: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.

SupportGemSingleOutTwo.name: Mark for Death II
SupportGemSingleOutTwo.description: Supports Mark Skills. Enemies affected by Supported Marks will have their Armour Broken by Physical Damage they take.

SupportGemTumult.name: Tumult
SupportGemTumult.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills consume a Frenzy Charge on use to powerfully Break Armour.

SupportGemAdmixture.name: Admixture
SupportGemAdmixture.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Bleeding inflicted by those Hits is more effective against Poisoned Enemies, and Poison inflicted by Supported Skills is more effective against Bleeding Enemies.

SupportGemStoicism.name: Stoicism I
SupportGemStoicism.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.

SupportGemStoicismTwo.name: Stoicism II
SupportGemStoicismTwo.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself. Supported Skills steadily gain more Damage, up to a cap. This Damage bonus is reset if you Dodge Roll or use a Travel Skill.

SupportGemGrudge.name: Relentless Rage
SupportGemGrudge.description: Supports Skills you use yourself. On spending Rage with any skill you will gain a Buff. Using Supported Skills consumes this Buff to grant you Rage.

SupportGemBrambleslam.name: Brambleslam
SupportGemBrambleslam.description: Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills create Hazardous Brambles on the ground that activate after a duration. Enemies which come in contact with these thorns take damage and are Maimed. A maximum of 20 Brambles are allowed at one time. Does not modify Skills used by Minions or Totems.

SupportGemInhibitor.name: Inhibitor
SupportGemInhibitor.description: Supports any Skill you use or Trigger yourself. Supported Skills cannot consume Charges or Infusion by any means. Cannot Support Skills which require Charges or Infusion to be used.

SupportGemStaticShocks.name: Static Shocks
SupportGemStaticShocks.description: Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Hits from Supported Skills Triggers Static Shocks, causing that enemy to become a source of Lightning damage sending pulses towards nearby enemies.

SkillGemUniqueDuskVigilTriggeredBlazingC.name: Ember Fusillade
SkillGemUniqueDuskVigilTriggeredBlazingC.description: Conjure a blazing Ember that hovers above you. After a short duration, the Ember launches at an enemy, dealing Fire damage in an area on impact and prioritising the last enemy targeted. Recasting this spell resets the duration for all active Embers. Multiple Embers fired in the same Fusillade will attempt to target different enemies. Consumes a Lightning Infusion if possible to cause the entire Fusillade to create beams that Chain to enemies.

SkillGemUniqueEarthboundTriggeredSpark.name: Spark
SkillGemUniqueEarthboundTriggeredSpark.description: Launch a spray of sparking Projectiles that travel erratically along the ground until they hit an enemy or expire. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to fire many sparks in a circle.

SupportGemHardyTotems.name: Hardy Totems I
SupportGemHardyTotems.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.

SupportGemHardyTotemsTwo.name: Hardy Totems II
SupportGemHardyTotemsTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.

SupportGemHardyTotemsThree.name: Tawhoa's Tending
SupportGemHardyTotemsThree.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life. Totems created by Supported Skills explode on death, dealing Physical damage based on their Life.

SupportGemSuffuse.name: Encroaching Ground
SupportGemSuffuse.description: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those Surfaces to grow over time, up to a limit.

SkillGemUniqueBreachLightningBolt.name: Lightning Bolt
SkillGemUniqueBreachLightningBolt.description: Call down a Shocking bolt of Lightning to strike enemies in a small area.

UniqueSkillGemHeraldOfAsh.name: Herald of Ash
UniqueSkillGemHeraldOfAsh.description: While active, enemies you sufficiently Overkill with non-Herald Attacks will cause an explosion that Ignites nearby enemies based on the Overkill damage dealt.

UniqueSkillGemHeraldOfIce.name: Herald of Ice
UniqueSkillGemHeraldOfIce.description: While active, Shattering an enemy with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause an icy explosion that deals Attack damage to surrounding enemies.

UniqueSkillGemHeraldOfThunder.name: Herald of Thunder
UniqueSkillGemHeraldOfThunder.description: While active, killing Shocked enemies with a non-Herald Attack Hit will cause subsequent Attack Hits to release lightning bolts which deals Attack damage to all surrounding enemies.

UniqueSkillGemWitheringPresence.name: Withering Presence
UniqueSkillGemWitheringPresence.description: While active, emits an Aura that periodically Withers enemies in your Presence.

SkillGemWhirlwindLance.name: Whirlwind Lance
SkillGemWhirlwindLance.description: Throw a Spear with enough force to kick up a Whirlwind where it lands, Slowing enemies and Blinding them in its area of effect. Entering the Whirlwind collapses it, dealing damage and causing Knockback. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to create the Whirlwind with one more than its normal maximum number of stages.

SkillGemPrimalStrikes.name: Primal Strikes
SkillGemPrimalStrikes.description: Perform a Lightning-charged stab that can be chained into a combination of up to three attacks. The first two attacks conjure a charging Wildwood spirit if they Hit a Shocked enemy and refresh Shock duration. The third attack is a large swipe that inflicts Elemental Exposure, and can Consume Shock to conjure a stampede of spirits.

SkillGemCullTheWeak.name: Cull The Weak
SkillGemCullTheWeak.description: Dash to an enemy and run them through, Culling enemies if their life is low enough. If this Attack kills at least one enemy, it grants you a Frenzy Charge, with higher Rarity monsters granting additional Charges. Enemies around you that can be Culled will be highlighted.

SkillGemFangsOfFrost.name: Fangs of Frost
SkillGemFangsOfFrost.description: Perform an icy stab that exploits enemies who are already off balance. Hitting a Parried target Consumes the Debuff to cause an explosion of frost and leave Chilled Ground.

SkillGemWindSerpentsFury.name: Wind Serpent's Fury
SkillGemWindSerpentsFury.description: Consume all Frenzy Charges to perform a gigantic spear thrust that Knocks Back enemies. For each Frenzy Charge consumed, a Wind Serpent follows in the spear's wake. Each Serpent also damages and Knocks Back enemies.

SkillGemRake.name: Rake
SkillGemRake.description: Dash towards an enemy and perform a lacerating slash, inflicting Bleeding on all enemies struck.

SkillGemBloodhoundsMark.name: Bloodhound's Mark
SkillGemBloodhoundsMark.description: Mark a target, making them suffer Heavy Stun build up from Blood Loss. The Mark will Activate, Consuming itself to Trigger Blood Explosion, when they are Heavy Stunned, or when they are killed if they suffered enough Blood Loss. The Mark's duration does not expire while the Marked target is suffering Blood Loss.

SkillGemTameBeast.name: Tame Beast
SkillGemTameBeast.description: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a Rare Beast for a duration, Hindering them. If you defeat the Beast while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the Beast as a Reviving Companion.

SkillGemSpearOfSolaris.name: Spear of Solaris
SkillGemSpearOfSolaris.description: Build Glory by inflicting Freeze, Shock or Ignite on enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may call forth the Azmeri goddess Solaris, jumping backwards and throwing your Spear in the air. On landing the spear deals heavy damage in an area, then calls a divine skybeam that pulses periodically and creates expanding Ignited Ground. Modifiers to number of Projectiles fired do not apply to this skill.

SkillGemStormLance.name: Storm Lance
SkillGemStormLance.description: Throw an electrified Spear that lodges in the ground and periodically zaps nearby enemies with Lightning bolts. If the Spear is Detonated by another Skill, it immediately unleashes a volley of bolts and expires. Consumes a Frenzy Charge if possible to fire bolts more frequently for a shorter duration, automatically Detonate at the end of its duration, and create Shocked Ground on Detonation.

SkillGemParry.name: Parry
SkillGemParry.description: Ready your Buckler to parry the next Hit you would take, Blocking the Hit and retaliating with a quick sweep that leaves enemies off balance, causing them to take massively increased Attack damage for a short duration. Parrying causes you to accumulate Heavy Stun buildup. You cannot Evade a Hit you could parry, but Evasion instead grants an equal chance to avoid this Heavy Stun buildup.

SkillGemElementalSundering.name: Elemental Sundering
SkillGemElementalSundering.description: Plunge your Spear into the ground to emit a pulse that Consumes Freeze, Shock and Ignite on a number of nearby enemies, Allies and Corpses. The pulse itself deals no damage, but each Ailment Consumed causes an explosion of the corresponding elemental damage type.

SkillGemSummonBeast.name: Companion: {0}
SkillGemSummonBeast.description: Summon a Reviving Beast Companion to aid you in combat.

SkillGemCastOnCharmUse.name: Cast on Charm Use
SkillGemCastOnCharmUse.description: While active, gains Energy when one of your Charms is used and triggers socketed Spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemTrinity.name: Trinity
SkillGemTrinity.description: Become attuned to all Elements building up Fire, Cold and Lightning Affinity based off the highest Elemental Damage type dealt by your Hits. Your Elemental Damage is enhanced the more Affinity of any type you have.

SkillGemTrailOfCaltrops.name: Trail of Caltrops
SkillGemTrailOfCaltrops.description: While active, scatters caltrops in your wake when you dodge.

SkillGemAscendancyInfuseWeapon.name: Elemental Surge
SkillGemAscendancyInfuseWeapon.description: Grants your weapon Surges. Non-Melee Projectile Attacks with that weapon Consume Surges to cause the Projectiles fired to explode at the end of their flight.

SkillGemChaoticInfusion.name: Chaotic Surge
SkillGemChaoticInfusion.description: Grants your weapon Surges. Non-Melee Projectile Attacks with that weapon Consume Surges to cause the Projectiles fired to explode at the end of their flight.

SkillGemLightningSpellOnHit.name: Thundergod's Wrath
SkillGemLightningSpellOnHit.description: While active, gains Energy when you Hit enemies with Melee Attacks and triggers socketed Lightning spells on reaching maximum Energy.

SkillGemConvalescence.name: Convalescence
SkillGemConvalescence.description: While active, grants a skill that you can use to instantly begin Recharging Energy Shield and gain a Buff for a duration that prevents that Recharge being interrupted. The Buff is removed at maximum Energy Shield and the skill cannot be used while Energy Shield is full.

SkillGemGeminiSurge.name: Gemini Surge
SkillGemGeminiSurge.description: Grants your weapon Surges. Non-Melee Projectile Attacks with that weapon Consume Surges to cause the Projectiles fired to explode at the end of their flight.

SkillGemWingBlast.name: Wing Blast
SkillGemWingBlast.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and launch yourself backwards with a powerful wingbeat that Knocks Back enemies. Enemies Primed for Heavy Stun will be stunned, release a shockwave, and have a chance to grant you a Power Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.

SkillGemExplodingPoisonToad.name: Bursting Fen Toad
SkillGemExplodingPoisonToad.description: This skill creates a toad that jumps around briefly, then explodes the toad, dealing Attack damage in an area and inflicting Poison.  Damage you deal with skill is not based on your Weapon

SkillGemOilBarrage.name: Oil Barrage
SkillGemOilBarrage.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and spit Oil at enemies, creating Oil Ground where the Projectiles land. Consumes Power Charges if possible to instead Channel a sustained barrage of electrified Oil that does not create Oil Ground. Projectiles are fired in sequence, allowing multiple Projectiles to Hit the same target.

SkillGemIronWard.name: Iron Ward
SkillGemIronWard.description: While active, stores a percentage of the Physical damage that is prevented by your Armour or other sources of damage reduction. Using this Skill releases the stored damage as a nova of spikes.

SkillGemWyvernFlameBreath.name: Flame Breath
SkillGemWyvernFlameBreath.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and take to the skies, immolating enemies with a jet of fire. Channelling ends after a short amount of time but can be prolonged by spending Rage. Consumes a Power Charge if possible to Empower the Skill, Gaining extra Lightning damage and spending Rage more slowly.

SkillGemEntangle.name: Entangle
SkillGemEntangle.description: Conjures a rootbound fissure that crawls forward, damaging enemies in its path. While the fissure persists, vines lash out from it and attach to nearby enemies, damaging and Slowing them.

SkillGemWolfShred.name: Shred
SkillGemWolfShred.description: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and lash out with a flurry of claw swipes. The first Attack can dash to faraway enemies and the final Attack Strikes twice. Attacking a Frozen enemy will create Ice Fragments, which are Projectiles that land and explode after a short delay.

SkillGemBearFuryOfTheMountain.name: Fury of the Mountain
SkillGemBearFuryOfTheMountain.description: Shapeshift into a Bear and repeatedly pound the ground, creating Molten Fissures that travel randomly in a wide arc in front of you.

SkillGemWolfCrossSlash.name: Cross Slash
SkillGemWolfCrossSlash.description: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and leap backwards as you gouge the ground with both claws. Enemies can be Hit separately by both gouges. Hitting a Marked enemy with both gouges will Activate the Mark and cause an additional shockwave. Ice Fragments will be pulled into the location where the gouges cross and explode immediately. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.

SkillGemIcestorm.name: Icestorm
SkillGemIcestorm.description: Conjure a hail of icy bolts over the targeted area. Chill and Freeze on enemies in front of you are Consumed to fuel the Icestorm by creating improved bolts.

SkillGemPinnacleOfPower.name: Pinnacle of Power
SkillGemPinnacleOfPower.description: Consume all Power Charges to master the elements, gaining Elemental Damage and the ability to apply Elemental Ailments with other damage types. Can only be used while you have maximum Power Charges.

SkillGemCrossbowRequiem.name: Requiem
SkillGemCrossbowRequiem.description: Your weapon passively accumulates anguish from the tormented souls within. When fully charged, use this skill to compose the Requiem, transforming your Crossbow shot into a torrent of anguish for a short, fixed amount of time. Does not use Ammunition.

SkillGemLunarAssault.name: Lunar Assault
SkillGemLunarAssault.description: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and swipe with your claws, projecting an arc of moonlight and ice forward in a crescent.

SkillGemHeartOfIce.name: Heart of Ice
SkillGemHeartOfIce.description: Chills all enemies in your Presence.

SkillGemPrimalAvatar.name: Primal Avatar
SkillGemPrimalAvatar.description: Conjure Azmeri wisps to engulf a Rare Beast for a duration, Hindering them. If you defeat the Beast while it is engulfed in wisps, it will be captured by this gem, transforming the gem to instead allow you to summon the Beast as a Reviving Companion.

SkillGemWyvernDevour.name: Devour
SkillGemWyvernDevour.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and devour a Corpse or Cullable enemy, and additional nearby Corpses. For each enemy or corpse devoured, you regenerate life and gain a Power Charge. If the target is far enough away, you will leap to them and damage nearby enemies where you land. Targeting nearby enemies or corpses will not perform a leap or a Slam.

SkillGemThrashingVines.name: Thrashing Vines
SkillGemThrashingVines.description: Spur the growth of huge vines, which emerge randomly within the target area. The vines crash to the ground then retreat, targeting nearby enemies if possible.

SkillGemWolfLunarBlessing.name: Lunar Blessing
SkillGemWolfLunarBlessing.description: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and offer your Rage to the moon to receive a blessing, gaining bonus Cold damage for yourself and any Wolf Minions you have from Wolf Pack or Predator's Mark. Spends all Rage to extend the Buff's duration. While the Buff is active, your Werewolf Melee Attacks call down Moonbeams on Hit.

SkillGemWolfArcticHowl.name: Arctic Howl
SkillGemWolfArcticHowl.description: Shapeshift into a Werewolf and let out an icy howl that damages enemies and Freezes Primed enemies. If an enemy is Frozen or a Frozen enemy is Hit, this Skill Empowers your attacks with added Cold damage, causes Empowered Slams to create Chilled Ground, and grants your Allies added Cold damage. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending an Endurance Charge.

SupportGemLivingLightning.name: Living Lightning
SupportGemLivingLightning.description: Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

SupportGemLivingLightningTwo.name: Living Lightning II
SupportGemLivingLightningTwo.description: Supports Skills which cause Damaging Hits. Living Lightning Minions are created when dealing Lightning damage with Supported Skills - bundles of living electricity that target nearby enemies with Chaining Attacks. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

SupportGemFrozenSpite.name: Frozen Spite
SupportGemFrozenSpite.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to create Ice Fragments on killing Frozen Enemies. Cannot Support Totem Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemShockingRift.name: Electromagnetism
SupportGemShockingRift.description: Supports Skills that Hit enemies. When Supported Skills Shock an enemy that is nearby other Shocked enemies, trigger Electromagnetism, sucking in nearby enemies, Hindering them, and dealing Lightning damage at an interval.

SupportGemPietysMercy.name: Dominus' Grasp
SupportGemPietysMercy.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain more times.

SupportGemFlamePillar.name: Flame Pillar
SupportGemFlamePillar.description: Supports any Skill you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Consume Ignite on Hit to create pillars of flame, but cannot themselves inflict Ignite. Cannot Support Skills which already Consume Ignite, and does not modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemStreamlinedRounds.name: Streamlined Rounds
SupportGemStreamlinedRounds.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Attack speed and bolt capacity, but deal less damage and have longer reload time.

SupportGemPerfectedEndurance.name: Perfected Endurance
SupportGemPerfectedEndurance.description: Supports skills which have a benefit for Perfect Timing. Supported Skills grant at least one Endurance Charge when Hitting an enemy with Perfect Timing.

SupportGemEnduringImpact.name: Enduring Impact I
SupportGemEnduringImpact.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.

SupportGemEnduringImpactTwo.name: Enduring Impact II
SupportGemEnduringImpactTwo.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.

SupportGemCrater.name: Crater
SupportGemCrater.description: Supports Melee Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Fissures when you land. Cannot Support Totem Skills, and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemVanguard.name: Vanguard I
SupportGemVanguard.description: Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.

SupportGemVanguardTwo.name: Vanguard II
SupportGemVanguardTwo.description: Supports Shield Skills, causing you to gain Guard on Stunning Enemies with the Supported Skill.

SupportGemCrystallineShards.name: Crystalline Shards
SupportGemCrystallineShards.description: Supports Skills which create Ice Crystals. Damaging Explosions caused by Ice Crystals from Supported Skills will Impale Enemies.

SupportGemSkitteringStone.name: Skittering Stone I
SupportGemSkitteringStone.description: Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone Minions.

SupportGemSkitteringStoneTwo.name: Skittering Stone II
SupportGemSkitteringStoneTwo.description: Supports Skills which create shatterable earthen objects. After killing enough Enemies in range of these objects, they will shatter, releasing skittering stone Minions.

SupportGemDiallasDesire.name: Dialla's Desire
SupportGemDiallasDesire.description: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.

SupportGemKalisasCrescendo.name: Kalisa's Crescendo
SupportGemKalisasCrescendo.description: Supports Curse Skills. Enemies Cursed by Supported Skills are Pacified for the final portion of the Supported Curse's duration.

SupportGemDurability.name: Durability
SupportGemDurability.description: Supports Skills which create objects that are destroyed after being Hit a number of times, allowing for them to last for additional Hits. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

SupportGemXophsPyre.name: Xoph's Pyre
SupportGemXophsPyre.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Ignites.

SupportGemEshsRadiance.name: Esh's Radiance
SupportGemEshsRadiance.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Shock.

SupportGemTulsStillness.name: Tul's Stillness
SupportGemTulsStillness.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Contribute to Freeze Buildup.

SupportGemUulNetolsEmbrace.name: Uul-Netol's Embrace
SupportGemUulNetolsEmbrace.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, granting extra Chaos damage and causing Chaos damage to Break Armour.

SupportGemRakiatasFlow.name: Rakiata's Flow
SupportGemRakiatasFlow.description: Supports Skills that can cause Damaging Hits, causing those Hits to treat Enemy Elemental Resistances as inverted.

SupportGemRigwaldsFerocity.name: Rigwald's Ferocity
SupportGemRigwaldsFerocity.description: Supports Attack skills, granting them Attack Speed at the cost of Damage or Damage at the cost of Attack Speed depending on Weapon Set they are used in. Does not modify skills used by Minions.

SupportGemUhtredsExodus.name: Uhtred's Exodus
SupportGemUhtredsExodus.description: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them many additional levels provided no other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemUhtredsOmen.name: Uhtred's Omen
SupportGemUhtredsOmen.description: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly one other support is used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemUhtredsAugury.name: Uhtred's Augury
SupportGemUhtredsAugury.description: Supports Skills which can gain levels, granting them additional levels provided exactly two other supports are used with the supported Skill. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemDaressosPassion.name: Daresso's Passion
SupportGemDaressosPassion.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.

SupportGemAtzirisAllure.name: Atziri's Allure
SupportGemAtzirisAllure.description: Supports Curse Spells you cast yourself, causing those Curses to ignore the usual Curse Limit, but be reflected back to you when inflicted.

SupportGemAtzirisCall.name: Atziri's Call
SupportGemAtzirisCall.description: DNT Supports Spells you use yourself which Hit enemies. On Critical Hit with supported Spells, Trigger Atziri's Storm at the location of the nearest enemy.

SupportGemAtzirisCommunion.name: Atziri's Communion
SupportGemAtzirisCommunion.description: Supports Persistent Skills, making them Reserve Life instead of Spirit. Cannot Support Skills which create Minions.

SupportGemAtzirisImpatience.name: Atziri's Impatience
SupportGemAtzirisImpatience.description: Supports Skills you use yourself that have Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover, but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support Meta Skills or Persistent Skills, or modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemTacatisIre.name: Tacati's Ire
SupportGemTacatisIre.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Poison inflicted with Supported Skills deals Damage faster the higher your Rage.

SupportGemZarokhsRefrain.name: Zarokh's Refrain
SupportGemZarokhsRefrain.description: Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells Echo thrice, but are given a Cooldown. Cannot support skills which already have a Cooldown.

SupportGemGarukhansResolve.name: Garukhan's Resolve
SupportGemGarukhansResolve.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Supported Skills have a maximum Critical Hit chance, but will Bifurcate Critical Hit Chance.

SupportGemKurgalsLeash.name: Kurgal's Leash
SupportGemKurgalsLeash.description: Supports Commandable Minions causing you and the Supported Minion to gain Unholy Might when you Command them.

SupportGemKulemaksDominion.name: Kulemak's Dominion
SupportGemKulemaksDominion.description: Supports Offering Skills, causing your Cascadable Spells to Cascade to the locations of Supported Offerings.

SupportGemAmanamusTithe.name: Amanamu's Tithe
SupportGemAmanamusTithe.description: Supports Persistent Minion Skills, granting a chance when Supported Minions die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.

SupportGemVarashtasBlessing.name: Varashta's Blessing
SupportGemVarashtasBlessing.description: Supports any Skill that can deal damage, causing it to deal more damage for each different Command Skill you have used in the past few seconds. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemArbitersIgnition.name: Arbiter's Ignition
SupportGemArbitersIgnition.description: Supports Fire Spell Skills causing you to gain Elemental Archon when Igniting with them.

SupportGemArakaalisLust.name: Arakaali's Lust
SupportGemArakaalisLust.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.

SupportGemTasaliosRhythm.name: Tasalio's Rhythm
SupportGemTasaliosRhythm.description: Supports Skills which have a benefit for Perfectly Timing their use. On successfully executing Perfect Timing with Supported Skills, gain Tasalio's Rhythm. Tasalio's Rhythm causes Supported Skills to deal more damage and have shorter Perfect Timing windows for each stack. Failing to execute any Perfect Timing (even with skills not supported by Tasalio's Rhythm) will remove all Tasalio's Rhythm on you.

SupportGemXibaquasRending.name: Xibaqua's Rending
SupportGemXibaquasRending.description: Supports Skills that leap into the air, causing Corpses in the area you land to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies.

SupportGemKhatalsRejuvenation.name: Khatal's Rejuvenation
SupportGemKhatalsRejuvenation.description: Supports Skills that generate Remnants. Picking up Remnants from Supported Skills grants Khatal's Rejuvenation.

SupportGemMorganasTempest.name: Morgana's Tempest
SupportGemMorganasTempest.description: Supports Storm skills, increasing their Limit and causing them to move quickly from the user to the target location, but become less effective. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.

SkillGemForgeHammer.name: Forge Hammer
SkillGemForgeHammer.description: Hurl a fiery hammer that Slams into the ground and lodges there. While the hammer is lodged in the ground, reusing this Skill recalls the hammer and resets the Skill's cooldown. Alternatively, using a Warcry near the lodged hammer causes it to shatter, releasing a number of Molten Fissures in a spiral.

SkillGemFulmination.name: Fulmination
SkillGemFulmination.description: While active, the first time any Skill Hits a Shocked enemy in your Presence, that Skill also Hits other Shocked enemies in your Presence, up to a maximum.

SkillGemMortarCannon.name: Mortar Cannon
SkillGemMortarCannon.description: Raise a cannon Ballista Totem which uses socketed Grenade Skills, with significantly improved Cooldown Recovery Rate.

SkillGemAncestralCry.name: Ancestral Cry
SkillGemAncestralCry.description: Perform a Warcry using Glory gained by Igniting enemies to turn you into an embodiment of Kaom. While embodying Kaom, you Trigger Volcanic Steps while travelling, Melee Strikes and Slams are Ancestrally Boosted, and your Melee Strikes Trigger Volcanic Eruption.

SkillGemPrimalBounty.name: Primal Bounty
SkillGemPrimalBounty.description: Empowers the next Projectile Skill you use, causing it to create additional Projectiles and fly faster.

SkillGemFeastOfFlesh.name: Feast of Flesh
SkillGemFeastOfFlesh.description: Consume Corpses near you to recover Life and Mana over a short time per Corpse Consumed.

SkillGemToxicDomain.name: Toxic Domain
SkillGemToxicDomain.description: Create an area of Toxic Bloom on the ground around you. While in the Bloom, you have increased Skill costs, Regenerate Life, and your Projectile Attacks attach a Toxic Pustule, which can be Poisoned. Pustules will Detonate after a duration or when enough Poison has been applied, dealing more damage based on the stored Poison damage and applying Poison in an area around it.

SkillGemSpellslinger.name: Spellslinger
SkillGemSpellslinger.description: While active, gains Energy when you cast Spells. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to trigger socketed Spells, and can trigger them multiple times if it has enough Energy.

SkillGemIceTippedArrows.name: Ice-Tipped Arrows
SkillGemIceTippedArrows.description: Ready your active Bow or Spear, Empowering your next Repeatable Bow or Projectile Spear Attacks to Convert Physical Damage to Cold Damage and Trigger Ice Fragments on Hit. This Skill's cooldown can be bypassed by expending a Frenzy Charge. Cannot Empower Sustained Skills.

SkillGemCracklingPalm.name: Crackling Palm
SkillGemCracklingPalm.description: When you Hit with Unarmed Melee Attacks, calls down lightning bolts which deal Unarmed Attack damage to all surrounding enemies.

SkillGemFuturePast.name: Future-Past
SkillGemFuturePast.description: Hinekora observes your Future-Past granting you the opportunity to subvert a lesser fate. After a period of Hindsight, she will grant you her Foresight, which prevents you from avoiding Hits while Dodge Rolling. When you are Hit while Dodge Rolling, Hinekora restores you to full Life immediately before taking damage from the Hit, and grants you Sight Beyond Sight, which prevents you from dying.

SkillGemRunicTempering.name: Runic Tempering
SkillGemRunicTempering.description: Channel to imbue your armour with Runic Plates. When you are Hit while you have these plates, some of the damage you would take will be prevented, and this skill will cause backlash, dealing your Thorns damage in an area around your attacker.

SkillGemHisWinnowingFlame.name: His Winnowing Flame
SkillGemHisWinnowingFlame.description: Conjure an abyssal scythe that sweeps across the targeted area, dealing Fire damage to enemies and Consuming Ignite to create pillars of flame. Cannot be Triggered.

SkillGemHisFoulEmergence.name: His Foul Emergence
SkillGemHisFoulEmergence.description: Conjure a horrific skull rising from the lightless depths to bite your enemies dealing high damage at target location and leaving Withering Ground in its wake. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast.

SkillGemSiphonElements.name: Siphon Elements
SkillGemSiphonElements.description: While active, has a chance to create an Infusion Remnant when you Freeze, Shock or Ignite a target.

SkillGemFrostDarts.name: Frost Darts
SkillGemFrostDarts.description: Conjures a number of icy Projectiles that launch towards the target. Projectiles that Hit a Chilled or Frozen target create chunks of ice that deal additional damage on impacting the ground. Consumes a Cold Infusion if possible to cause each Projectile to lodge into the enemy then explode.

SkillGemGraveCommand.name: His Grave Command
SkillGemGraveCommand.description: Conjure Abyssal spirits to Hinder a Rare Undead for a duration. If you defeat the Undead while it is Hindered, it will be captured and stored into a Soul Crystal Skill Gem. The Soul Crystal will allow a wielder of great Abyssal power to summon the bound Undead as a Reviving Companion.

SkillGemSoulCrystal.name: Soul Crystal: {0}
SkillGemSoulCrystal.description: Summon a Reviving Undead Companion to aid you in combat.

SkillGemTriggeredAbyssalApparition.name: Abyssal Apparition
SkillGemTriggeredAbyssalApparition.description: Consume a Power Charge when you cast a damaging Spell to trigger an Abyssal Apparition who will also cast that same Spell for you. Does not work with Channelling Spells, Spells with a Cooldown, Triggered Spells, Spells granted by items, or Spells which already consume a Power Charge. This Skill is not directly Supportable.

SupportGemCreepingChill.name: Creeping Chill
SupportGemCreepingChill.description: Supports any Skill that creates Ice Crystals, causing that Skill to Consume a Power Charge if possible to create Chilled Ground around the Crystal.

SkillGemBriarpatch.name: Briarpatch
SkillGemBriarpatch.description: While active, a portion of the Physical Attack damage you deal is stored. Casting a Spell uses the stored damage to create a patch of Thorny Ground that deals Spell damage to moving enemies.

SkillGemEternalRage.name: Eternal Rage
SkillGemEternalRage.description: While active, you constantly regenerate Rage.

SkillGemSavageFury.name: Savage Fury
SkillGemSavageFury.description: While active, your Fury builds from Attacking enemies. Using this Skill releases your Fury to send you into a bestial frenzy, gaining damage and Onslaught but constantly losing life and forcing you into animal form. The frenzy ends immediately if you return to human form. You cannot gain Fury while in a frenzy.

SkillGemWalkingCalamity.name: Walking Calamity
SkillGemWalkingCalamity.description: Build Glory by gaining Rage while already at maximum Rage. When you have maximum Glory, roar to the heavens to bring them down upon your enemies. For the duration of the Skill, meteors rain down around you and you Gain Fire damage and Rage regeneration. This Skill's effects are suppressed if you leave Bear form, but will resume if you return to Bear form before the duration expires.

SkillGemTheStarsAnswer.name: The Stars Answer
SkillGemTheStarsAnswer.description: Leash the stars themselves by leveraging your vast magical power, repeatedly Triggering Starfall targeting an enemy in an area around you, or a random location in that area if no enemies can be targeted.

SkillGemAscendancyApocalypse.name: Apocalypse
SkillGemAscendancyApocalypse.description: Build Glory by Hitting enemies with Elemental damage. When you have maximum Glory, you may become the walking Apocalypse for a duration, Triggering one of multiple powerful Elemental Skills at an interval while this Buff lasts.

SupportGemMarkOfSiphoning.name: Mark of Siphoning
SupportGemMarkOfSiphoning.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.

SupportGemMarkOfSiphoningTwo.name: Mark of Siphoning II
SupportGemMarkOfSiphoningTwo.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing enemies they Mark to Leech Life and Mana to you when you Hit them with Attacks.

SupportGemThrillOfTheKill.name: Thrill of the Kill
SupportGemThrillOfTheKill.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage for a short time.

SupportGemThrillOfTheKillTwo.name: Thrill of the Kill II
SupportGemThrillOfTheKillTwo.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Culling a Shocked enemy with Supported Skills infuses all of your Attacks with Lightning damage and grants an increased chance to Shock for a short time.

SupportGemExposingCry.name: Exposing Cry
SupportGemExposingCry.description: Supports Warcries. Supported Skills apply Exposure on Hitting enemies.

SupportGemOpeningMove.name: Opening Move
SupportGemOpeningMove.description: Supports Travel Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against enemies on full life will Daze.

SupportGemExplosiveGrowth.name: Accelerated Growth
SupportGemExplosiveGrowth.description: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown.

SupportGemExplosiveGrowthTwo.name: Accelerated Growth II
SupportGemExplosiveGrowthTwo.description: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown, Blinding enemies Hit.

SupportGemFanTheFlames.name: Fan The Flames
SupportGemFanTheFlames.description: Supports Wind Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against Ignited enemies Trigger a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them.

SupportGemFanTheFlamesTwo.name: Fan The Flames II
SupportGemFanTheFlamesTwo.description: Supports Wind Skills which Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills against Ignited enemies Trigger a fiery explosion, dealing damage to that enemy and enemies in a cone behind them. The explosion Spreads the initial enemy's Ignite to other enemies Hit.

SupportGemDeadlyCurrent.name: Coursing Current
SupportGemDeadlyCurrent.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Supported Skills Triggers Coursing Current, which sends Chaining Lightning Projectiles to nearby Drenched enemies.

SkillGemMirrorOfRefraction.name: Mirror of Refraction
SkillGemMirrorOfRefraction.description: Mirrors of Refraction appear in your Presence periodically. Hitting a mirror with a Spell Projectile causes it to shatter, copying the projectiles in a nova around the destroyed mirror. Copied Projectiles may be copied again when colliding with other mirrors.

SkillGemBarkskin.name: Barkskin
SkillGemBarkskin.description: While active, taking Hit damage from enemies to your Energy Shield causes you to gain Armour for a short duration. Armour gained from multiple Hits can stack. The total Armour gained from this Skill cannot exceed the Item Armour on your Equipped Armour Items.

SkillGemFeralInvocation.name: Feral Invocation
SkillGemFeralInvocation.description: While active, gains Energy when you spend Mana. Using the Invocation once sufficient Energy is gathered will consume the Energy to create visages which attack once with a socketed Shapeshifting Attack, creating multiple visages if it has enough Energy.

SupportGemPoisonSpores.name: Poison Spores
SupportGemPoisonSpores.description: Supports Plant Skills which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Trigger Toxic Pustule on Hitting an enemy.

SupportGemDeadlyResolve.name: Deadly Resolve
SupportGemDeadlyResolve.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself. While Channelling Supported Skills, periodically gain stages of Deadly Resolve. Expend a stage of Deadly Resolve when an enemy Hits you to Trigger a deadly slash towards that enemy, dealing more damage based on your Armour.

SupportGemAdvancingStorm.name: Advancing Storm
SupportGemAdvancingStorm.description: Supports Storm skills, causing them to appear at the user's location and move towards the target location.

SupportGemEchoingCry.name: Echoing Cry
