SupportGemEchoingCry.description: Supports Warcries. Supported Skills Echo twice, and their area grows larger each time, but are less effective and require you to have travelled a certain distance before use.

SupportGemGorge.name: Gorge
SupportGemGorge.description: Supports skills that consume Corpses. Consuming Corpses with supported skills grants Flask charges.

SupportGemEmpoweredSparks.name: Empowered Sparks I
SupportGemEmpoweredSparks.description: Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.

SupportGemEmpoweredSparksTwo.name: Empowered Sparks II
SupportGemEmpoweredSparksTwo.description: Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.

SupportGemControlledHazard.name: Controlled Hazard
SupportGemControlledHazard.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to be unable to be triggered for 3 seconds after being created.

SupportGemBrittleArmour.name: Brittle Armour
SupportGemBrittleArmour.description: Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills which Freeze enemies cause Physical damage against them to Break their Armour while they remain Frozen.

SupportGemRendingApex.name: Rending Apex
SupportGemRendingApex.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the Final Strike to Break Armour based on a portion of Attack damage dealt.

SupportGemPracticalMagic.name: Practical Magic I
SupportGemPracticalMagic.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.

SupportGemPracticalMagicTwo.name: Practical Magic II
SupportGemPracticalMagicTwo.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Heavy Stunning an enemy with Supported Skills increases your Spell damage for a duration.

SupportGemBlazingCritical.name: Blazing Critical
SupportGemBlazingCritical.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Critical Hits with Supported Skills imbue all of your Attacks with Fire damage for a duration.

SupportGemConcussiveSpells.name: Concussive Spells
SupportGemConcussiveSpells.description: Supports Spells which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Daze on Critically Hitting enemies with Physical damage.

SupportGemEternalMark.name: Eternal Mark
SupportGemEternalMark.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to not be Consumed the first time they are Activated.

SupportGemCatalysingElements.name: Catalysing Elements
SupportGemCatalysingElements.description: Supports Skills which are boosted by Elemental Ground Surfaces, Triggering Catalysing Discharge of the corresponding type when they are boosted by an allied Elemental Ground Surface.

SupportGemNovaProjectilesTwo.name: Nova Projectiles II
SupportGemNovaProjectilesTwo.description: Supports Projectile Skills, making them fire extra Projectiles in a circle, at the cost of Damage and gaining a cooldown. Does not Support Skills which rain down Projectiles from above. Cannot Support Skills which already have a cooldown.

SupportGemChargedMark.name: Charged Mark
SupportGemChargedMark.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to Trigger Charged Mark when they are Activated. Charged Mark creates Shocked Ground at the target's location.

SupportGemMinionMeleeSplash.name: Minion Splash I
SupportGemMinionMeleeSplash.description: Supports Skills which create Minions which Strike, causing those Minions' Strikes to have Melee Splash.

SupportGemMinionMeleeSplashTwo.name: Minion Splash II
SupportGemMinionMeleeSplashTwo.description: Supports Skills which create Minions which Strike, increasing their Area of Effect and causing those Minions' Strikes to have Melee Splash.

SkillGemArchonOfChayula.name: Archon of Chayula
SkillGemArchonOfChayula.description: Build Glory by dealing Chaos damage to enemies. When you have maximum Glory, you can entreat the Dreamer to inhabit you, briefly becoming his Archon.

SkillGemAncientGifts.name: Wildwood's Gifts
SkillGemAncientGifts.description: You are chosen by Azmerian spirits who provide guidance, allowing you to see nearby Ancient Blooms.

SkillGemStarbornOnslaught.name: Starborn Onslaught
SkillGemStarbornOnslaught.description: Build up Glory by Freezing or Chilling enemies. When you have maximum Glory you may jump backwards loosing your Mace with the force of a falling comet onto your target. The impact releases Fissures and causes stars to fall in the area for a brief period.

SkillGemAzmerianSwarm.name: Azmerian Swarms
SkillGemAzmerianSwarm.description: While active, summons short-lived Azmerian Swarms when you kill enemies affected by Elemental Ailments or hit Rare or Unique enemies affected by Elemental Ailments. The swarms are untargetable Minions that pursue nearby enemies to Attack them and infict Faerie Fire on Hit.

SkillGemHarbingerOfMadness.name: Harbinger of Madness
SkillGemHarbingerOfMadness.description: Draws out the latent fears of enemies you kill and Rare or Unique enemies you Hit, turning them into unstable apparitions which charge towards enemies and then explode.

SkillGemGlacialClash.name: Soaring Midnight
SkillGemGlacialClash.description: Hurl your Shield as a Projectile which Returns to you at the end of its flight. While the Shield is in flight, this skill is replaced with Embrace the Fall. This skill's cooldown is skipped if you catch the Shield as it Returns, or destroy an Ice Crystal with the Embrace the Fall.

SkillGemSpiritVessel.name: Spirit Vessel
SkillGemSpiritVessel.description: Summons a Shapeshifting Spirit Vessel Companion that uses copies of socketed Bear, Werewolf, and Wyvern Skills.

SupportGemHerDeclaration.name: Her Declaration
SupportGemHerDeclaration.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing enemies that enter your Presence to become Intimidated while the Skill is active.

SupportGemPrototypeSeventeen.name: Prototype Seventeen
SupportGemPrototypeSeventeen.description: Supports non-Channelling skill you use yourself that Hits enemies, causing it to gain Critical Hit chance based on Rage, but also remove all Rage upon Critically Hitting.

SupportGemSeraphsHeart.name: Seraph's Heart
SupportGemSeraphsHeart.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, providing a chance for enemies to calculate their Hits as though your Resistances were 90% while the skill is active.

SupportGemUhtredsRite.name: Uhtred's Rite
SupportGemUhtredsRite.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, causing them to grant Overflowing Chalice when used. Supported skills deal more damage during the effect of your Life Flask and have increased Mana Cost Efficiency during the effect of your Mana Flask.

SupportGemTrickstersShard.name: Trickster's Shard
SupportGemTrickstersShard.description: Supports non-instant Spells you cast yourself. Supported Spells will Trigger Fragment Self, creating a Fractured Mimic which will cast that Spell if you get enough of them.

SupportGemArbitersReach.name: Arbiter's Reach
SupportGemArbitersReach.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you periodically grant Guard to allies in your Presence while the Skill is active.

SupportGemTangmazusThurible.name: Tangmazu's Thurible
SupportGemTangmazusThurible.description: Supports Skills which summon Companions causing them to be Gigantic and gain Evasion and Deflection based on your own.

SkillGemMidnightStar.name: Midnight Zenith
SkillGemMidnightStar.description: While active, Critical Hits with other skills that kill targets, or hit powerful targets cause you to gain Arctic Petals. Once you have enough Arctic Petals they will be Consumed to create Ice Crystals near the most recent target.

SkillGemHazardousHoldout.name: Kinetic Bash
SkillGemHazardousHoldout.description: DNT Raise your Crossbow to Block all incoming Blockable hits. Releasing performs a Kinetic Bash, damaging enemies in front of you dealing more damage based on your Heavy Stun Buildup. While your Crossbow is raised Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you.

SupportGemEshsProwess.name: Esh's Prowess
SupportGemEshsProwess.description: Supports Lightning skills that Hit targets, granting them an additional level and causing them to only roll the minimum or maximum value for Lightning damage. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

SupportGemBreachlordsRift.name: Breachlord's Rift
SupportGemBreachlordsRift.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to Break Armour of enemies it Freezes or Electrocutes.

SupportGemBreachlordsAmalgam.name: Breachlord's Amalgam
SupportGemBreachlordsAmalgam.description: Supports Lightning or Cold skills you use yourself which fire Projectiles and do not already have cooldowns, adding a cooldown and making the Projectiles return, piercing through targets as they do so.

SupportGemVruunsAftermath.name: Vruun's Aftermath
SupportGemVruunsAftermath.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to destroy Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments. Supported Skills empower additional Attacks if they destroy enough Ice Crystals and Ice Fragments.

SupportGemVruunsInevitability.name: Vruun's Inevitability
SupportGemVruunsInevitability.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills expend their Combo when used, gaining more area of effect the higher Combo they had. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Cannot modify the Skills of Minions.

SupportGemUhtredsConstellation.name: Uhtred's Constellation
SupportGemUhtredsConstellation.description: Supports non-instant skills which have a cooldown, granting them two additional cooldown uses and more damage per different skill with a cooldown you have used recently.

SupportGemMedvedsFelling.name: Medved's Felling
SupportGemMedvedsFelling.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself, causing them to attack faster the more Rage you have and grant Rage on Hit, but also making you lose Life based on your Rage when using them.

SupportGemVoranasSiege.name: Vorana's Siege
SupportGemVoranasSiege.description: Supports skills which Hit targets and have an area of effect, increasing the affected area and causing it to Hit Isolated targets harder.

SupportGemStyrnsMountain.name: Styrn's Mountain
SupportGemStyrnsMountain.description: Supports Skills that Raise your Shield causing your other melee skills to deal more damage if you block.

SupportGemStyrnsFerocity.name: Styrn's Ferocity
SupportGemStyrnsFerocity.description: Supports Shield Skills that Hit enemies, causing those Hits to Crush their targets, additionally causing any Physical Damage Hits against those targets while Crushed to Break their Armour.

SupportGemCathasBrilliance.name: Catha's Brilliance
SupportGemCathasBrilliance.description: Supports skills which create Companions, causing enemies near them to be Blinded and Ignited. The damage of the Ignite is based on the Life of the supported Minion.

SupportGemMorrigansInsight.name: Mórrigan's Insight
SupportGemMorrigansInsight.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage and trigger Nature's Exchange when consuming Freeze on enemies. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

SupportGemTulsAvalanche.name: Tul's Avalanche
SupportGemTulsAvalanche.description: Supports Cascadable Spells you cast yourself, Sealing them when you Block, The Seals are broken when used, each making the Spell Echo. Cannot support skills with a Cooldown or which already gain Seals.

SkillGemAscendancyVirtuousBarrier.name: Virtuous Barrier
SkillGemAscendancyVirtuousBarrier.description: While active, conjures a glittering barrier that accumulates protective gemstone Motes of each Attribute type over time, but loses a random Mote when you are Hit.

SupportGemConcussiveRunes.name: Concussive Runes
SupportGemConcussiveRunes.description: Supports Attacks, causing a Runic Shockwave to erupt under enemies they Heavy Stun. The Shockwave costs Runic Ward, and will not Trigger if you do not have enough Runic Ward.

SkillGemLeylines.name: Leylines
SkillGemLeylines.description: While active, areas of intense runic energy are revealed to you. Standing over them grants you a powerful Spell damage boost but constantly drains your Runic Ward. Running out of Runic Ward causes the energy to temporarily dissipate.

SkillGemFrostflameNova.name: Frostflame Nova
SkillGemFrostflameNova.description: Unleash a wave of volatile ice that feeds on flames. While the wave doesn't deal damage, the ice latches onto Ignited enemies, refreshing the duration of their active Ignite and rapidly Freezing them but preventing them from being Ignited further until the Ignite expires.

SkillGemHollowShell.name: Hollow Shell
SkillGemHollowShell.description: Sacrifice your Runic Ward to send out an energy pulse that grants nearby Allies Guard.

SkillGemMoltenShower.name: Molten Shower
SkillGemMoltenShower.description: Fires molten Projectiles from the enemy hit, which will explode when they land nearby, dealing Attack damage in an area.

SupportGemRunicInfusion.name: Runic Infusion
SupportGemRunicInfusion.description: Supports Attacks you use or Trigger yourself, causing them to cost Runic Ward to use but deal additional Physical damage based on their Runic Ward cost. Cannot Support Channelling Skills, Sustained Skills, or Skills without a cost.

SupportGemRuneforgedBlades.name: Runeforged Blades
SupportGemRuneforgedBlades.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself, causing them to Consume Fully Broken Armour on enemies to fire a nova of runic Projectiles at the cost of Runic Ward. The Projectiles cannot Hit the enemy from which they originated. Cannot support skills that Consume Broken Armour.

SkillGemPoweredByVerisium.name: Powered by Verisium
SkillGemPoweredByVerisium.description: Spends Ward to generate Verisium Infusions, which can be used in place of any Elemental Infusions.

SkillGemRefutation.name: Refutation
SkillGemRefutation.description: Spends all your Ward to gain a short-duration Buff that causes you to Block all Blockable Hits and apply Parried to enemies from which you've Blocked a Hit. This Buff is removed if you are Heavy Stunned. While this Buff is active, you cannot be Light Stunned, but Blocking too much damage may Heavy Stun you.

SkillGemRepulsion.name: Repulsion
SkillGemRepulsion.description: Target an area and Curse enemies within with a Verisium Rune, inflicting them with Fragility. Hitting these enemies causes the Curse to Trigger an explosion to deal damage in an area and apply significant Knockback to other enemies near the Cursed target, with more Stun buildup based on the Fragility on the target Hit.

SkillGemTriskelionCascade.name: Triskelion Cascade
SkillGemTriskelionCascade.description: Tap into the power of the Triskelion Flame to Empower the next Cascadable Spell you cast. The Empowered Spell becomes centred on your location, and Cascades to six areas around you in a Triskelion pattern.

SkillGemGelidPalm.name: Gelid Palm
SkillGemGelidPalm.description: When you Hit with Unarmed Melee Attacks, projects icy wind which deal Unarmed Attack damage to all surrounding enemies and destroy Ice Crystals.

SkillGemSkyfall.name: Skyfall
SkillGemSkyfall.description: Build Glory by spending Runic Ward. When you have maximum Glory, you may call down a mass of Verisium from the sky, dealing high damage at the targeted location and summoning a Temporary Minion. Targeting close to you will cause you to jump back as you cast. Consumes a Verisium Infusion, if possible, to increase the number of Minions summoned .

SkillGemDetonateLiving.name: Detonate Living
SkillGemDetonateLiving.description: Hit an enemy under the Culling Strike Threshold, causing them to violently explode, damaging surrounding enemies. Highlights enemies under the Culling Strike Threshold.

SkillGemAnimusExchange.name: Animus Exchange
SkillGemAnimusExchange.description: Sacrifice a portion of your Life to recover Runic Ward. Runic Ward recovered by this Skill can Overflow.

SkillGemBitterDead.name: Bitter Dead
SkillGemBitterDead.description: Spend Ward and target an area, transforming Corpses into bitter cores that seek out enemies and Chill enemies near them. The cores explode at the end of their duration, creating runes which deal additional Cold damage over time.

SkillGemEternalMarch.name: Eternal March
SkillGemEternalMarch.description: Spend Runic Ward to instantly Revive your Minions. Prioritises the most powerful minions first.

SkillGemGrimPillars.name: Grim Pillars
SkillGemGrimPillars.description: Spend Runic Ward to cause damaging Ice-Crystal spears to erupt from the ground around you. These spears can be destroyed for an explosion of Cold damage.

SkillGemVerisiumManifestation.name: Verisium Manifestations
SkillGemVerisiumManifestation.description: While active, Hitting with an Attack will spend Runic Ward to summon a Verisium Manifestation, a short-lived Temporary Minion that rapidly Attacks nearby enemies, ignoring commands. Enemies will not directly engage these Minions, and can pass through them.

SkillGemRemnantsOfKalguur.name: Remnants of Kalguur
SkillGemRemnantsOfKalguur.description: While active, enemies you Stun or kill have a chance to generate a Runic Ward Remnant. These Remnants can Overflow your Runic Ward.

SkillGemWardboundMinions.name: Wardbound Minions
SkillGemWardboundMinions.description: Spend all your Runic Ward to summon Temporary Wardbound Casters. These Minions target nearby enemies with damaging Cold Spells.

SupportGemRunicExtraction.name: Runic Extraction
SupportGemRunicExtraction.description: Supports any Skill that deals damage. Enemies you kill with supported Skills have a chance to drop a Verisium Infusion Remnant.

SkillGemFragmentsOfThePast.name: Fragments Of The Past
SkillGemFragmentsOfThePast.description: Spend Runic Ward to create a Verisium volcano that deals damage on initial eruption and Triggers Ice Fragments.

SkillGemConductiveRunes.name: Conductive Runes
SkillGemConductiveRunes.description: Spend Runic Ward to create a number of Hazardous Runes in a cone in front of you, which arm after a time. After arming, these Runes will activate when enemies step on them, exploding to deal Attack damage that is not based on your Weapon's damage and apply Electrocution buildup.

SkillGemUniqueAtziriHerald.name: Herald of the Royal Queen
SkillGemUniqueAtziriHerald.description: Killing an enemy with Blood Loss will cause a bloody explosion that deals Physical Attack damage to surrounding enemies. This damage is not based on your Weapon Damage, but is based on their accumulated Blood Loss. The explosion destroys their Corpse if the enemy was Normal or Magic.

SkillGemAnimusSplinters.name: Animus Splinters
SkillGemAnimusSplinters.description: Expend a large amount of Runic Ward to instantly create a short-lived copy of yourself that uses a Socketed Skill once, then vanishes. This Skill's cost is equal to the total cost of Socketed Skills. The copy cannot perform Channelled, Remote, Cooldown or Conditional Skills, or summon Minions.

SupportGemScouringFlame.name: Scouring Flame
SupportGemScouringFlame.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing inflicted Ignites to deal more damage but the skill to gain a Runic Ward cost.

SkillGemRunicReprieve.name: Runic Reprieve
SkillGemRunicReprieve.description: Channel to create a protective bubble all around you, Blocking Hits against you. While Channelling this Skill, you cannot be Light Stunned by Hits you Block, and damage you take from Hits is also removed from Runic Ward. Blocking Hits this way causes you to accumulate Heavy Stun buildup. You cannot recover Runic Ward while this Skill is active.

SupportGemFistOfKalguur.name: Fist Of Kalguur
SupportGemFistOfKalguur.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, allowing them to spend large amounts of Runic Ward to become Runically Boosted. Runically Boosted Slams are Empowered with extra Physical damage and create a rune the first time they hit an enemy. The rune erupts in an Aftershock after a duration. Cannot support Channelling Skills.

SkillGemVoltaicBarrier.name: Voltaic Barrier
SkillGemVoltaicBarrier.description: Raise a pair of electrified pylons in front of you which project a wall of electricity between them, damaging and Electrocuting enemies caught between them. Projectiles you fire through the wall become energised, and discharge that energy on Hit as Chaining Lightning beams.

SupportGemHealingRunes.name: Healing Runes
SupportGemHealingRunes.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to lose Runic Ward and heal nearby allies based on the Ward lost. Healing done is split between allies who are not on full Life.

SupportOlrothsConviction.name: Olroth's Conviction
SupportOlrothsConviction.description: Supports skills that can Empower a specific number of other skills, causing them to apply to more skill uses.

SkillGemExplosiveTransmutation.name: Explosive Transmutation
SkillGemExplosiveTransmutation.description: While active, picking up Remnants Triggers a deadly explosion, dealing damage at the location of the Remnant based on the type of Remnant picked up.

SkillGemRainOfBlades.name: Rain of Blades
SkillGemRainOfBlades.description: Pour your Runic Ward into conjuring blades. For the duration of the Buff, these blades fall on enemies Hit by your Projectile Attacks.

SupportGemOlrothsHubris.name: Olroth's Hubris
SupportGemOlrothsHubris.description: Supports Attacks you use or Trigger yourself, causing them to cost Runic Ward to use but deal additional Physical and Cold damage based on their Runic Ward cost, in addition to causing Physical damage to Contribute to Freeze buildup. Cannot Support Channelling Skills, Sustained Skills, or Skills without a cost.

SkillGemSmashToSmithereens.name: Smash to Smithereens
SkillGemSmashToSmithereens.description: Blows strong enough to Heavy Stun an enemy reverberate in an area around the enemy and heavily Break Armour.

SkillGemAscendancyQueensProcession.name: Queen's Procession
SkillGemAscendancyQueensProcession.description: While active, Sprinting turns you into a locust swarm which deals Physical Attack damage, which is not based on your Weapon's damage, in an area around you. You take damage and gain Heavy Stun buildup if this Hits any targets, but damage you take from other sources while sprinting will not apply Heavy Stun or interrupt your sprinting.
